abathur.1_1: Increases the range of Symbiote's Spike Burst by 25% and decreases the cooldown by 1 second.
abathur.1_2: Toxic Nests deal 75% more damage over 3 seconds and reduce the Armor of enemy Heroes hit by 10 for 4 seconds.
abathur.1_3: Increase the Shield amount of Carapace by 40%.
abathur.1_4: Increases Locust's Health by 100% and damage by 60%.
abathur.4_1: Heroic Symbiote hosts gain 25% increased Attack Speed.
abathur.4_2: Increases the damage and range of Symbiote's Stab by 20%.
abathur.4_3: Increase the duration of Toxic Nests by 45 seconds, reduce its cooldown by 2 seconds, and add 2 additional charges.
abathur.7_1: Toxic Nests Slow enemy Movement Speed by 40% for 2.5 seconds.
abathur.7_2: Using Symbiote's Carapace also applies an untalented Carapace Shield to all nearby allied Heroes, Minions, and Mercenaries.
abathur.7_3: Activate to calldown a Mule that repairs Structures, one at a time, near target point for 40 seconds, healing for 90 Health every 1 second.
abathur.10_1: Clone target allied Hero and control it for 20 seconds. Abathur has perfected the clone, granting it 20% Spell Power, 20% bonus Attack Damage, and 10% bonus Movement Speed. Cannot use their Heroic Ability.
abathur.10_2: Turn an allied Minion or Locust into a Monstrosity. When enemy Minions near the Monstrosity die, it gains 2% Health and 2% Basic Attack damage, stacking up to 40 times.  The Monstrosity can be healed by Carapace and has the ability to Burrow to a visible location every 80 seconds.  Using Symbiote on the Monstrosity allows Abathur to control it, in addition to Symbiote's normal benefits.  This Ability can be reactivated to automatically cast Symbiote on his Monstrosity.
abathur.13_1: Symbiote's Stab gains 1 additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by .5 seconds.
abathur.13_2: Symbiote's Spike Burst heals the host for 64 (+4% per level) Health per enemy Hero hit.
abathur.13_3: Locust's Basic Attacks become a long-range siege attack and their duration is increased by 75%.
abathur.16_1: Abathur's Symbiote's Spike Burst also Slows enemy Movement Speed by 40% for 2 seconds.
abathur.16_2: Symbiote's Carapace increases the Movement Speed of the target by 40% for 3.5 seconds.
abathur.16_3: Ultimate Evolution clones and Monstrosities deal 137 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies every 3 seconds and when they die. Enemy Heroes hit heal the clone or Monstrosity for 100% of the damage dealt.
abathur.16_4: Activate to spawn 3 Locusts at a nearby location.
abathur.20_1: Increase the duration of Ultimate Evolution by 50%.  As long as the Ultimate Evolution is alive, the original target of the clone gains a Shield equal to 35% of their maximum Health.  Refreshes every 5 seconds.
abathur.20_2: Increase Monstrosity's Basic Attack damage by 100%.
abathur.20_3: Symbiote creates an additional Symbiote on a nearby allied Hero.  This Symbiote mimics the commands of the first, but does half damage and Shielding.
abathur.20_4: Activate to create a nest that periodically spawns Locusts. Only one Locust Nest can be active at a time.

alarak.1_1: Hitting an enemy Hero with Discord Strike grants 40% Attack Speed and causes Basic Attacks to heal for 50% of the damage dealt for 4 seconds.
alarak.1_2: Reduce the Mana cost of Telekinesis from 30 to 20.  Telekinesis's cooldown recharges 100% faster while above 80% Health.
alarak.1_3: Reduce Sadism by 10%.  Quest: Hit Heroes with the center of Lightning Surge.  Reward: After hitting 5 Heroes, increase Lightning Surge's range by 20%.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, Lightning Surge's center also Slows enemies by 40% for 2 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 3 Heroes with the center of a single cast, increase Sadism by 10% and instantly gain all other Rewards.
alarak.4_1: Quest: Hit Heroes with Discord Strike.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, increase Discord Strike's damage by 60.  Reward: After hitting 2 Heroes with a single Discord Strike, increase its damage by 60.  Reward: After hitting 3 Heroes with a single Discord Strike, increase its damage by 100 and instantly gain all other Rewards.
alarak.4_2: Increase the Lightning Surge damage bonus to enemies between Alarak and his victim to 175%.  Repeatable Quest: Each Hero hit by the center of Lightning Surge permanently increases the damage bonus by 5%.
alarak.4_3: Heroes hit with 3 of Alarak's Abilities within 2 seconds take an additional 61 (+4% per level) damage and increase Sadism by 2%, stacking up to 20%.   Sadism gained from Show of Force is lost on death.
alarak.7_1: Increase Discord Strike's Silence duration by 0.75 seconds.
alarak.7_2: Telekinesis Slows enemies by 30% for 3 seconds.
alarak.7_3: Reduce Sadism by 10%, but Telekinesis pushes 20% further and has 20% increased range.
alarak.10_1: After channeling, Alarak charges forward dealing 200 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies in his path. Distance is increased based on the amount of time channeled, up to 1.5 seconds.  Issuing a Move order while this is channeling will cancel it at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.
alarak.10_2: Alarak targets an area and channels for 1 second, becoming Protected and Unstoppable. After, if he took damage from an enemy Hero, he sends a shockwave that deals 275 (+4% per level) damage.
alarak.13_1: Basic Attacks against Heroes increase Sadism by 2% stacking up to 40%.  Sadism gained from Blade of the Highlord is lost on death.
alarak.13_2: Increase Sadism by 10% any time an allied Hero dies, up to 40%.  Sadism gained from Pure Malice is lost on death.
alarak.13_3: Activate to mark an enemy Hero for 300 seconds.  Hitting the marked Hero with Discord Strike increases Sadism by 3%. Killing the marked Hero increases Sadism by 5% and lowers the cooldown of Rite of Rak'Shir to 10 seconds.  Sadism gained from Rite of Rak'Shir is lost on death.
alarak.16_1: Hitting an enemy Hero with Discord Strike grants 50% of Sadism's damage bonus to Alarak's Basic Attacks for 4 seconds. Basic Attacks against Heroes refresh this duration.
alarak.16_2: Hitting an enemy Hero with the center of Lightning Surge allows it to be cast again for free on a different primary target within the next 3 seconds. This free cast cannot benefit from Lightning Barrage.
alarak.16_3: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Alarak's Basic Abilities by 1.5 seconds.  This bonus is doubled against enemy Heroes who are Stunned, Silenced, Slowed, or Rooted.
alarak.20_1: Alarak targets an area and channels for 1 second, becoming Protected and Unstoppable. After, if he took damage from an enemy Hero, he sends a shockwave that deals 275 (+4% per level) damage.  This ability will take over Alarak's Trait button.
alarak.20_2: After channeling, Alarak charges forward dealing 200 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies in his path. Distance is increased based on the amount of time channeled, up to 1.5 seconds.  Issuing a Move order while this is channeling will cancel it at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.
alarak.20_3: Activate to teleport to the chosen location and remove all Roots, Slows, and damage over time effects. If Alarak fails to hit enemy Heroes 3 times with Basic Abilities within 4 seconds of using Last Laugh, his Health is reduced to 1.
alarak.20_4: Activate to permanently reduce Alarak's Sadism by 4% and reset the cooldowns of his Basic Abilities.

alexstrasza.1_1: While Alexstrasza is above 75% Health, Gift of Life's cooldown recharges 125% faster.
alexstrasza.1_2: Quest: Collect Regeneration Globes.  Reward: After collecting 10 Regeneration Globes, Abundance heals for an additional 5% maximum Health.  Reward: After collecting 15 Regeneration Globes, Abundance's healing burst creates a Regeneration Globe.
alexstrasza.1_3: Reduce the Mana cost of Flame Buffet from 50 to 40.  Quest: Hit 20 Burning Heroes with Flame Buffet.  Reward: Hitting a Burning Hero with Flame Buffet reduces Dragonqueen's cooldown by 5 seconds.
alexstrasza.4_1: Abundance's healing burst grants allied Heroes 30% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
alexstrasza.4_2: Increase Flame Buffet's Slow from 40% to 50% and cause it to no longer decay.
alexstrasza.4_3: While above 75% Health, gain 15% Movement Speed.
alexstrasza.7_1: While Alexstrasza is above 75% Health, Gift of Life creates a Lifeblossom at the target's location. Alexstrasza can collect the Lifeblossom to make her next Gift of Life cost no Health.  Passive: Reduces the cost of Gift of Life to 10% of Alexstrasza's current Health.
alexstrasza.7_2: Alexstrasza receives 40% more healing from Abundance and 100% more healing from Regeneration Globes.
alexstrasza.7_3: Hitting a Burning Hero with Flame Buffet heals Alexstrasza for 10% of her maximum Health.
alexstrasza.10_1: Bind Alexstrasza's life force with an allied Hero. Both her and her target are healed for 480 (+4% per level) Health over 2 seconds. Afterwards, the Hero with a lower percentage of Health is healed to the same Health percentage as the other Hero.
alexstrasza.10_2: After 1.25 seconds, take to the sky and drop 5 fireballs over 6 seconds at the position of the mouse cursor. Fireballs deal 135 (+4% per level) damage to enemies and heal allied Heroes for 300 (+4% per level) Health.  2 seconds after dropping all fireballs, Alexstrasza lands at the position of the mouse cursor.
alexstrasza.13_1: Gain 50 Armor while Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced, and for 2 seconds after. Can only trigger once every 10 seconds.
alexstrasza.13_2: Activate to Slow and reduce an enemy Hero's damage by 50% for 3 seconds.  Healing a Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced ally reduces Pacify's cooldown by 30 seconds.
alexstrasza.13_3: Activate to heal an allied Hero for 15% of their maximum Health and deal 200 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.  Healing a Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced ally reduces Life Unbound's cooldown by 30 seconds.  Cannot be used on Alexstrasza.
alexstrasza.16_1: Gift of Life grants its target 10 Armor for 2.5 seconds, increased to 30 while Alexstrasza is above 75% Health.
alexstrasza.16_2: Heroes healed by Abundance gain a Shield for 6 seconds equal to 70% of the amount healed.
alexstrasza.16_3: Increase Dragonqueen's duration by 6 seconds, and Basic Attack healing by 50%.
alexstrasza.20_2: Healing or damaging Heroes 8 or more times with Cleansing Flame activates Dragonqueen for 15 seconds upon landing.
alexstrasza.20_3: While Dragonqueen is active, Alexstrasza's Basic Attacks apply Flame Buffet.
alexstrasza.20_4: Activate to grant an allied Hero 500 bonus maximum Health until they die.  Cannot be used on Alexstrasza, or on a Hero who already has Blessing of the Red.

ana.1_1: Hitting Heroes with Biotic Grenade increases its damage and healing by 30% per Hero hit.
ana.1_2: Reduce the cooldown of Sleep Dart by 2 seconds. Upon waking, enemy Heroes are Slowed by 25% for 3 seconds.
ana.1_3: Quest: Stack 5 Doses on an enemy Hero or Basic Attack a Hero with 5 Doses.  Reward: Stack 5 Doses to increase Shrike's healing by 1%.  Reward: Basic Attack a Hero with 5 Doses to increase Shrike's healing by 0.25%.
ana.4_1: Increase the bonus healing duration of Biotic Grenade by 50% and reduce its cooldown by 3 seconds.
ana.4_2: Sleep Dart applies 4 Doses.  While Aim Down Sights is active, Sleep Dart pierces all enemy Heroes.
ana.4_3: Fire a dart which Slows the Movement Speed and reduces the damage dealt by the first enemy Hero it hits by 50% for 4 seconds. If no Heroes are hit, reduce this cooldown by 8 seconds.
ana.7_1: Increase the area of Biotic Grenade by 25% and the duration of the healing reduction by 0.75 seconds.
ana.7_2: Gain 25% Movement Speed for 2 seconds for every Hero hit by Sleep Dart. Upon waking, enemy Heroes take 8% of their Maximum Health in damage.
ana.7_3: Every Dose a Hero has reduces their Spell Power by 10%.
ana.10_1: Instantly boost an allied Hero, restoring 200 Mana. For the next 8 seconds, they gain 30% Spell Power and their Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 150% faster.  Cannot be used on Ana.
ana.10_2: Assume a sniping position, gaining the ability to fire up to 6 specialized rounds with unlimited range. Rounds pierce allied and enemy Heroes but collide with enemy Structures in their path. Allies are healed for 225 (+4% per level) and enemies are damaged for 135 (+4% per level). Deals 50% less damage to Structures.  Ana is unable to move while Eye of Horus is active.
ana.13_1: Healing Dart grants 25% Movement Speed to affected Heroes for 2 seconds.
ana.13_2: Healing Dart removes Roots and Slows from the target, and heals for 20% more when doing so.
ana.13_3: Healing Dart removes Stuns from the target, and grants them 50 Armor for 2 seconds when doing so.
ana.16_1: Healing Dart's healing is increased by 5% if it heals a Hero, up to 50%. At maximum bonus, further increase its healing by 35%. This bonus is reset if Healing Dart fails to hit a Hero.
ana.16_2: Increase Healing Dart's healing by 12% for each Dose active on enemy Heroes.
ana.16_3: Activate to instantly gain 3 charges of Healing Dart.
ana.20_1: Allies affected by Nano Boost heal for 50% of Spell Damage dealt.
ana.20_2: Increase Eye Of Horus' healing and damage by 5% for every Hero hit. This bonus resets after all shots have been fired.
ana.20_3: Increase Shrike's damage by 50%. While Aim Down Sights is active, gain 25 Armor.
ana.20_4: Basic Attacks increase Attack Speed by 10% for 3 seconds, up to 100%. While Aim Down Sights is active, increase your Basic Attack Range by 4.

anduin.1_1: If Flash Heal is cast on a different target from its last, increase its healing by 15% and refund 40% of its cooldown.
anduin.1_2: While Divine Star is traveling out, allies in its path gain a Shield that absorbs 128 (+4% per level) damage for 4 seconds.  If Divine Star hits an enemy Hero, Anduin gains a Shield that absorbs 185 (+4% per level) damage for 4 seconds.
anduin.1_3: Summon a Lightwell that periodically heals a nearby allied Hero for 50 (+4% per level). The well only fades after healing 15 times or when recast.  This cooldown is reduced by 1 second each time Anduin heals an allied Hero.
anduin.4_1: Divine Star fires Basic Attacks at Heroes close to its apex.  Passive: Increase Attack Range by 1.1.
anduin.4_2: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Chastise by 0.75 seconds. Basic Attacks against Heroes Rooted by Chastise launch an additional Basic Attack and restore 25 Mana.
anduin.4_3: Chastise pierces to hit an additional Hero.  Quest: Hitting two Heroes with a single Chastise permanently increases Spell Power by 1, to a maximum of 10.
anduin.7_1: Casting Flash Heal on an ally heals Anduin for 135 (+4% per level).
anduin.7_2: If Anduin loses more than 8% of his maximum Health at once, recover 15% Health over 3 seconds.  This effect has a 10 second cooldown.  Current Health required: 133 (+4% per level)
anduin.7_3: Activate to instantly heal an allied Hero for 375 (+4% per level), but kneel for 2 seconds, unable to act.
anduin.10_1: After 0.5 seconds, Channel to invoke the Light for 3 seconds. While nearby, allied Heroes heal for up to 30% of their max Health and are Protected.
anduin.10_2: Imbue an allied Hero with the Light. After 1.5 seconds, it explodes, dealing 150 (+4% per level) damage to enemies and Stunning them for 1.25 seconds.  The target gains a Shield that absorbs 165 (+4% per level) damage per enemy Hero hit. Lasts for 5 seconds.
anduin.13_1: While Divine Star is traveling, gain 30% Movement Speed.  Each allied Hero healed by Divine Star on its return to Anduin reduces its cooldown by 1 second.
anduin.13_2: Damaging an enemy Hero increases Movement Speed by 2.5% and the amount healed by Pursued By Grace by 5% for 6 seconds. These effects stack up to 8 times.
anduin.13_3: Gain 5% Movement Speed. This bonus is quadrupled while Leap of Faith's cooldown is available. Allies pulled by Leap of Faith are healed for 280 (+4% per level) over 4 seconds.
anduin.16_1: Flash Heal heals an additional 180 (+4% per level) over 6 seconds. The duration of this heal is refreshed each time Anduin hits an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack.
anduin.16_2: After Anduin catches Divine Star, it explodes, healing nearby allied Heroes for 105 (+4% per level) and damaging enemies for 150 (+4% per level).
anduin.16_3: Leap of Faith gains a 2nd charge.
anduin.16_4: Activate to reset the cooldown of Flash Heal and its next cast heals for 25% more.  Damaging enemy Heroes reduces this cooldown by 1 second.
anduin.20_1: Holy Word: Salvation grants allied Heroes Invulnerability instead of Protected. This does not affect Anduin.  Channeling Holy Word: Salvation for its full duration reduces its cooldown by 60 seconds.
anduin.20_2: The target of Light Bomb gains 40% Move Speed and 50 Armor for 3 seconds.
anduin.20_3: Chastise Stuns for 0.75 seconds and its Root duration is increased by 0.5 seconds.
anduin.20_4: Basic Attacks burn enemies for 87 (+4% per level) damage over 3 seconds and Anduin heals for 50% of the damage dealt.

anubarak.1_1: Increase Hardened Carapace's Spell Armor by 25.
anubarak.1_2: Beetles have 30 Spell Armor. Automatically spawn a Beetle every 12 seconds. Can be toggled on and off.
anubarak.1_3: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases your Health Regeneration by 1 per second, up to 30.  Reward: After gathering 30 Regeneration Globes, you also gain 500 Health.
anubarak.4_1: Create a bed of spikes along Impale's path that slows enemies by 25% and deals 21 (+4% per level) damage per second.  Spikes persist for 3.5 seconds.
anubarak.4_2: Harden Carapace grants 30% increased Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
anubarak.4_3: Increases Burrow Charge range by 20% and damage by 100%.
anubarak.7_1: While Harden Carapace is active, taking damage from enemy Abilities reduces its cooldown by 1 second, up to 3 seconds.
anubarak.7_2: Burrow Charge also grants a 400 (+4% per level) point Shield for 5 seconds.
anubarak.7_3: Beetles gain 30% bonus attack damage and they heal Anub'arak for 50% of their damage with each attack if he is nearby.
anubarak.10_1: Deal 68 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Each enemy damaged restores 24 (+4% per level) Health. Lasts 6 seconds.
anubarak.10_2: Wraps target enemy Hero in a cocoon, rendering them unable to act or be targeted for 7 seconds. Allies of the Hero can attack the cocoon to break it and free them early.
anubarak.13_1: Casting Harden Carapace will also deal 90 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. Deals double damage against Heroes.
anubarak.13_2: Deal 21 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Beetles deal 6 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies.
anubarak.13_3: Attacking a Hero that is slowed, rooted, or stunned increases Anub'arak's Basic Attack damage by 80% for 4 seconds.
anubarak.16_1: Increases Burrow Charge impact area by 60% and lowers the cooldown by 1 second for each Hero hit.
anubarak.16_2: Enemy Heroes hit by Burrow Charge or Impale have their Spell Power reduced by 50% for 4 seconds.
anubarak.16_3: Passive: Beetles gain 30% increased health.  Every 4th Basic Attack spawns a Beetle.
anubarak.20_1: Gain a permanent Vampire Locust that attacks a nearby enemy every 3 seconds. The Vampire Locust deals 165 (+4% per level) damage and returns to heal Anub'arak for 80 (+4% per level) health.
anubarak.20_2: Staying near the Cocoon allows Anub'arak to extend the duration by up to 6 seconds per Cocoon. Upon exiting the Cocoon, enemies take 60 (+4% per level) damage over 4 seconds. This damage is increased by 100% for each second that they were inside.
anubarak.20_3: Gain 10% bonus maximum Health and 20 Spell Armor.  Activate to gain 75 Armor for 4 seconds.
anubarak.20_4: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.

artanis.1_1: Damaging enemy Heroes with Twin Blades or Blade Dash grants Artanis 50 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing its damage by 50%.  Stores up to 2 charges.
artanis.1_2: Twin Blades attacks deal 150% bonus damage to non-Heroes.
artanis.1_3: Quest: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes increase Artanis's Attack damage by 0.1%.  Takedowns grant 1% bonus damage.
artanis.4_1: Hitting an enemy Hero with Phase Prism grants 30 Armor for 5 seconds.
artanis.4_2: Shield Overload's cooldown recharges 125% faster while its Shield is active.  Passive: Reduce Shield Overload's cooldown by 4 seconds.
artanis.4_3: Increases Shield Overload's Shields by 80% while below 25% Health.
artanis.7_1: Increases the damage of the first dash of Blade Dash by 175%.
artanis.7_2: Hitting an enemy Hero with Phase Prism grants 40% bonus Attack Speed for 5 seconds and Slows the enemy's Movement Speed by 30% for 4 seconds.
artanis.7_3: After using an Ability, your next Basic Attack within 6 seconds deals 40% additional damage. While under 25% Health, this damage bonus is increased to 60%.
artanis.10_1: Fire a large area pulse from the Spear of Adun, dealing 114 (+4% per level) damage and Blinding enemies for 4 seconds. Unlimited range.
artanis.10_2: Target an enemy Hero with an orbital beam from the Spear of Adun, dealing 184 (+4% per level) damage per second for 8 seconds. The beam will chase the target as they move.  Unlimited range.
artanis.13_1: Reduce the Mana cost of Blade Dash from 50 to 25. Each time that Shield Overload activates, reduce the cooldown of Blade Dash by 6 seconds.
artanis.13_2: Increases Twin Blades's number of Basic Attacks to 3, but increase its cooldown by 1 second.
artanis.13_3: Reduce the Mana cost of Phase Prism from 50 to 25. Hitting an enemy Hero with Basic Attacks or Blade Dash reduces the cooldown of Phase Prism by 2 seconds.
artanis.13_4: Shield Overload grants 50 Spell Armor while active and for 2 seconds after it expires.
artanis.16_1: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 0.5% of the target's maximum Health in damage, increased to 1.5% when empowered by Twin Blades.
artanis.16_2: Casting Basic Abilities reduces the cooldown of Shield Overload by 5 seconds.
artanis.16_3: Increase Attack Speed by 20%. Basic Attacks Slow by 20% for 1.25 seconds.
artanis.20_1: Suppression Pulse gains an additional charge.  There is a 10 second cooldown between uses.
artanis.20_2: Increase the speed of Purifier Beam by 15%. If the target of Purifier Beam dies, it automatically recasts on the nearest visible enemy Hero.
artanis.20_3: Increase Twin Blades' charge distance by 75%.
artanis.20_4: While Shield Overload is active, deal 70 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies.

arthas.1_1: Quest: Root enemy Heroes with Howling Blast.  Reward: After Rooting 5 Heroes, Howling Blast's cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.  Reward: After Rooting 10 Heroes, Howling Blast's range is increased by 20%.  Reward: After Rooting 20 Heroes, Howling Blast also Roots enemies in its path.
arthas.1_2: Quest: Use Frostmourne Hungers on an enemy Hero.  Reward: Increases the Mana it restores by 4, to a maximum of 40, and its damage by 4.
arthas.1_3: Every 5 seconds, gain 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%. Stores up to 3 charges.
arthas.4_1: Increase the range of Death Coil by 30%, reduce its cooldown by 3 seconds, and if Death Coil is used on an enemy Hero, its Mana cost is refunded.
arthas.4_2: Frozen Tempest Mana cost reduced by 2 per second.  Quest: Damage enemy Heroes with Frozen Tempest.  Reward: After damaging enemy Heroes 150 times with Frozen Tempest, the Movement and Attack Speed Slows of Frozen Tempest last an extra 1.5 seconds against enemy Heroes.
arthas.4_3: Gain 3% Attack Speed for 1.5 seconds every time a Hero is damaged by Frozen Tempest, to a maximum of 60%.
arthas.7_1: Gain the healing effect of Death Coil even when used on enemies. If Death Coil is used on Arthas, it heals for an additional 50% bonus healing.
arthas.7_2: Every 3rd Basic Attack heals Arthas for 5% of his max Health.
arthas.7_3: Activate to gain 25 Armor, reducing damage taken by 25%, and reduce the duration of Stuns, Slows, and Roots against Arthas by 75% for 3 seconds.
arthas.10_1: Summons Ghouls that last 15 seconds and atttack for 20 (+4% per level) damage. Sacrifice Ghouls to heal for 267 (+4% per level) Health.
arthas.10_2: Deals 230 (+4% per level) damage and Slows enemies by 60% for 4 seconds. Also disables Minions, Mercenaries, Monsters and Structures for 20 seconds.
arthas.13_1: Enemy Heroes hit by Howling Blast have their Armor reduced by 15 for 4 seconds.
arthas.13_2: Each second an enemy is damaged by Frozen Tempest, it deals 12.5% bonus damage, up to a 50% bonus.
arthas.13_3: Reduces Frostmourne Hungers' cooldown by 2 seconds. Frostmourne Hungers also Slows the enemy by 50% for 1.5 seconds.
arthas.16_1: Death Coil deals more damage and heals more the lower Arthas's current Health is, to a maximum of 100% bonus damage and healing.
arthas.16_2: Enemy Heroes that remain within Frozen Tempest for 3 seconds are Rooted for 1.25 seconds. This effect can only happen once every 10 seconds.
arthas.16_3: Increases the amount of Basic Attacks empowered by Frostmourne Hungers to 2.
arthas.20_1: 3 additional Ghouls are created. Ghouls deal 50% more damage, heal for an additional 50%, and last 5 seconds longer.
arthas.20_2: Sindragosa flies twice as far. Enemy Heroes are Rooted for 2.5 seconds, and then Slowed by 60% for 4 seconds.
arthas.20_3: Increases Movement Speed by 10%. Frozen Tempest's maximum Movement Speed Slow and Attack Speed Slow increased from 40% to 60%
arthas.20_4: Activate to make Arthas immune to Spell Damage for 4 seconds and heal Arthas for 25% of the damage prevented.

auriel.1_1: Quest: Every time Sacred Sweep hits a Hero in the center, increase the center damage by 2, up to 50.  Reward: After hitting 25 Heroes, this center damage bonus is increased to 180.
auriel.1_2: Reduces the cooldown of Sacred Sweep by 3 seconds for each enemy Hero hit by its center.
auriel.1_3: Ray of Heaven also deals damage to enemies in the area equal to 30% of the energy consumed.
auriel.4_1: Increases the radius of Sacred Sweep by 15%.
auriel.4_2: Detainment Strike Slows enemy Heroes by 20% for 2.5 seconds. Slow amount and duration doubled on enemies it Stuns.  Passive: Increase Detainment Strikes' Stun duration by 0.25 seconds.
auriel.4_3: Enemies hit by Detainment Strike are knocked back 25% farther.  Quest: Every time Detainment Strike stuns a Hero, increase the stun damage by 10, up to 60.  Reward: After stunning 6 Heroes, increase this damage bonus to 250.
auriel.7_1: Collecting a Regeneration Globe reduces the cost of Auriel's next Ray of Heaven by 75%.
auriel.7_2: Auriel stores 25% of damage taken by allies with Bestow Hope.
auriel.7_3: Increases the energy stored from Auriel's Basic Attacks to 120% of the damage against Heroes and 55% of the damage against non-Heroes.  Does not affect Auriel's Bestow Hope ally.
auriel.10_1: Channel on the spirit of a dead ally for 1 second. After a 5 second delay, they are brought back to life with 100% of their maximum Health at the location where they died.  Auriel can use this ability while dead to resurrect herself.
auriel.10_2: Place an allied Hero into Stasis for 2 seconds. Upon expiration, Crystal Aegis deals 255 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby enemies.
auriel.13_1: Enemies hit by the center area of Sacred Sweep are blinded for 2 seconds.
auriel.13_2: Enemies hit by the outer area are pushed slightly toward the center.
auriel.13_3: Detainment Strike now pierces and hits all enemy Heroes in a line, reducing the cooldown by 2 seconds for each Hero hit.
auriel.16_1: Quest: Each maximum energy Ray of Heaven Auriel casts increases the maximum amount of energy that can be stored by 75.
auriel.16_2: Allies with Bestow Hope gain 20% Attack Speed.  Passive: Auriel gains 10% increased Basic Attack Damage.
auriel.16_3: Allies with Bestow Hope gain 10% Spell Power.  Enemy Heroes hit by the center area of Sacred Sweep or the terrain collision of Detainment Strike have their Spell Armor reduced by 10 for 3 seconds.
auriel.20_1: Resurrected allies gain 200% increased Movement Speed, decaying over 4 seconds.  While a resurrected ally remains alive, Resurrect's next cooldown recharges 100% faster.
auriel.20_2: When Crystal Aegis expires, it grants the target 75 Armor for 5 seconds, reducing damage taken by 75%.
auriel.20_3: After 2 seconds, fly to a target location.
auriel.20_4: Activate to grant all nearby allied Heroes a shield for 3 seconds equal to 50% of the amount of Health they are missing.

azmodan.1_1: Globe of Annihilation deals 15% more damage to non-Heroic targets.  Quest: After gaining 200 Annihilation, increase the range of All Shall Burn by 25% and Demon Warriors gain 20% Attack Speed and Movement Speed.
azmodan.1_2: Increase the number of stacks of Annihilation gained by hitting Heroes with Globe of Annihilation from 2 to 4.  Quest: After gaining 200 Annihilation, each enemy hit by Globe of Annihilation reduces its cooldown by 0.25 seconds, doubled against Heroes.
azmodan.1_3: Basic Attacks against Heroes under 75% Health grant 1 Annihilation.  Quest: After gaining 200 Annihilation, hitting a Hero with Globe of Annihilation increases the damage of Azmodan's next Basic Attack against them within 3 seconds by 85% the amount of Annihilation he has.
azmodan.4_1: Summon Demon Warrior spawns an additional Demon, but its cooldown is increased by 10 seconds.
azmodan.4_2: Demon Warriors and Lieutenants gain 20 Armor and last 4 seconds longer.
azmodan.4_3: Reduce the Mana cost of Summon Demon Warrior from 25 to 20.  Azmodan's Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Summon Demon Warrior by 0.75 seconds and Demon Lieutenant by 1.5 seconds.
azmodan.7_1: If Globe of Annihilation hits 2 or more Heroes, restore 40 Mana and gain an extra 4 Annihilation.
azmodan.7_2: After casting Globe of Annihilation, Azmodan's Basic Attacks within the next 4 seconds have an additional 1.5 range and can hit 3 additional targets. Hitting Heroes with Basic Attacks empowered by Bombardment grant 1 Annihilation.
azmodan.7_3: If All Shall Burn's Channel kills or lasts its full duration, All Shall Burn's final damage applies to all enemies in an area around the target and grants 2 Annihilation per Hero hit.
azmodan.10_1: Rain a small army of Demonic Grunts down on enemies, dealing 85 (+4% per level) damage per impact. Grunts deal 39 (+4% per level) damage, have 750 (+4% per level) Health and last up to 10 seconds. When Grunts die they explode, dealing 40 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies, doubled against enemy Heroes.  Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn.
azmodan.10_2: Activate to make the next Globe of Annihilation cost no Mana and deal 50% more damage.  Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn.
azmodan.13_1: Demon Warriors and Lieutenants gain 25% increased Health. Demon Warriors Slow nearby enemies by 20%.
azmodan.13_2: Reduces the Channel time of All Shall Burn by 0.5 seconds. If All Shall Burn's Channel kills or lasts its full duration against a Hero, Azmodan is healed for 8% of his maximum Health.
azmodan.13_3: The cooldown of Demon Lieutenants' Demonic Smite is reduced by 2 seconds and they grant 25% increased damage to nearby friendly Minions, Mercenaries, and Azmodan's summoned Demons.
azmodan.16_1: Globe of Annihilation damages Heroes for an additional 4% of their maximum Health.
azmodan.16_2: If All Shall Burn Channels for its full duration or kills the target, a Demon Warrior is summoned at the target's location and all Demon Warriors deal 75% increased damage for 5 seconds.
azmodan.16_3: Activate to charge a short distance, dealing 275 (+4% per level) damage and Slowing enemies caught in the path by 60% for 1.25 second.
azmodan.20_1: Azmodan's Demons deal 40% increased damage to Structures.
azmodan.20_2: Globes of Annihilation empowered by Tide of Sin also leave a Black Pool at their impact location for 5 seconds. Enemies within the pool lose 8 Armor per second, up to 15, and take 56 (+4% per level) damage per second.
azmodan.20_3: After gaining 400 Annihilation, the area of Globe of Annihilation is increased by 15% and it deals 125 additional damage.
azmodan.20_4: All Shall Burn Slows enemy Heroes by 15% during its Channel. If All Shall Burn Channels for its full duration or kills an enemy Hero, its cooldown is reduced by 50%, and the target is Slowed by 50% for 2.5 seconds.

blaze.1_1: Passive: While over 80% Health, gain 25% bonus Attack Speed and 10% bonus Movement Speed.  Activate to gain 100% Attack Speed and 25% Movement Speed for 5 seconds.
blaze.1_2: Activate to gain a Shield that absorbs 590 (+4% per level) damage over 5 seconds.  When taking damage while below 30% maximum Health, Endurance Stimpack will automatically be cast if it is not on cooldown.
blaze.1_3: Activate to gain 40 Mana and cause Basic Ability cooldowns to recharge 100% faster for 5 seconds.
blaze.1_4: Collecting Regeneration Globes reduces the cooldown of Pyromania by 6 seconds.  Quest: Collect 15 Regeneration Globes.  Reward: Pyromania grants Unstoppable for 2 seconds.
blaze.4_1: Increase Oil Spill's area by 20%. Each enemy Hero hit by Flame Stream reduces the cooldown of Oil Spill by 0.75 seconds and refunds 5 Mana.
blaze.4_2: Hitting an enemy Hero with Pyromania reduces their damage dealt by 8% for 2.5 seconds, up to 40%.
blaze.4_3: Increase Basic Attack area by 15%, and Basic Attack damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters by 50%.
blaze.7_1: Each stream of Flame Stream reduces the Spell Power of Heroes hit by 25% for 4 seconds, up to 50%.
blaze.7_2: Enemies standing in Oil Spills and Ignited Oil Spills have their Attack Speed reduced by 50% for 3 seconds.
blaze.7_3: Jet Propulsion creates Oil Spills along Blaze's path. If Jet Propulsion impacts an enemy Hero, an additional Oil Spill is created underneath them.
blaze.10_1: After 0.5 seconds, deploy and enter a Bunker with 1435 (+4% per level) Health. Blaze and his allies can enter and exit the Bunker at will. While in the Bunker, occupants gain access to Flamethrower, dealing 170 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in a line.  Exiting the Bunker grants 25 Armor for 2 seconds. Bunkers last 10 seconds, or until destroyed.
blaze.10_2: Channel for up to 2.6 seconds. Upon ending, Slow nearby enemies by 60% and deal 55 (+4% per level) damage to them every 0.5 seconds. Combustion's Slow and damage over time duration is extended the longer Blaze Channels, from 1 second up to 5 seconds.  Blaze's Movement Speed is reduced by 40% while Channeling.
blaze.13_1: Increase Ignited Oil Spill damage by 45%.  Quest: Damage enemy Heroes with Ignited Oil Spills 30 times.  Reward: Increase Oil Spill's Ignite duration by 2.5 seconds.
blaze.13_2: Enemies standing in Oil Spill when it is Ignited are Slowed by 40% and take 35% more Basic Attack damage from Blaze for 3 seconds. Additionally, Basic Attack splashes Ignite Oil Spills.
blaze.13_3: Jet Propulsion's collision deals 275 (+4% per level) damage to the first enemy Hero hit.
blaze.16_1: Each enemy hit by Jet Propulsion grants 10 Armor for 3 seconds and reduces its cooldown by 1.25 seconds.
blaze.16_2: Heal for 75% of the damage dealt by Pyromania.
blaze.16_3: Activate to gain 50 Spell Armor for 3 seconds. Upon expiration, gain a Shield equal to 125% of the Spell Damage taken while Juggernaut Plating was active.
blaze.20_1: Occupants can cast Oil Spill from Bunker Drop every 6 seconds. Additionally, Bunker Drop's Armor bonus upon exiting is increased by 25, and its duration by 1 second.
blaze.20_2: While Channeling Combustion, Blaze's Movement Speed is no longer reduced, and nearby enemies are Slowed by 60%.
blaze.20_3: Basic Attacks Slow enemies by 5% and deal an additional 18 (+4% per level) damage over 2.5 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times.

brightwing.1_1: Passive: Increase Polymorph's range by 30%.  If Brightwing hits an enemy Hero with Arcane Flare's center within 2 seconds of being Polymorphed, then reduce Polymorph's cooldown by 7 seconds and gain 50 Mana.
brightwing.1_2: Increase Phase Shift's healing by an additional 6% of the target's maximum Health. Nearby enemy Minion deaths reduce Phase Shift's cooldown by 1 second.
brightwing.1_3: Activate to consume 20 stacks of Bribe to instantly defeat an uncaptured non-Elite Mercenary.  Passive: Gain 1 stack of Bribe when a nearby enemy Minion dies, and 5 stacks when hitting an enemy Hero with Arcane Flare's center. Maximum 80 stacks.
brightwing.4_1: Increase Arcane Flare's range by 50%. Hitting a Hero with Arcane Flare's center reduces its cooldown to 2 seconds.
brightwing.4_2: Increase Polymorph's Slow by 15%. Upon expiration, Polymorph deals damage to nearby enemy Heroes equal to 2% of their maximum Health.
brightwing.4_3: Increase Basic Attack range by 1.1. Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Soothing Mist by 4 seconds.
brightwing.7_1: Enemy Heroes hit by Arcane Flare have their Movement Speed Slowed by 20% for 3 seconds. Increase the Slow to 40% if they are hit by the center portion.
brightwing.7_2: Phase Shifting to an ally grants both Brightwing and her target a 335 (+4% per level) Shield for 4 seconds and reveals a large area around them for 5 seconds.
brightwing.7_3: Soothing Mist heals allied Heroes for 165 (+4% per level). Increase this healing by 140% if Soothing Mist removed a disabling effect from that ally.
brightwing.10_1: Teleport to a nearby ally. When teleporting to a Hero, heal them for 200 (+4% per level).  Stores up to 2 charges.
brightwing.10_2: After 0.5 seconds, create an expanding nova of wind, dealing 225 (+4% per level) damage and pushing enemies away.
brightwing.13_1: Pixie Dust gives 50% bonus Movement Speed, decaying to 20% over 3 seconds.
brightwing.13_2: Increase Pixie Dust's duration by 1 second. Soothing Mist and Blink Heal heal allies with an active Pixie Dust for 75% more.
brightwing.13_3: Reduce the cooldown of Pixie Dust by 3 seconds and increase the Spell Armor granted by 25.
brightwing.16_1: Enemy Heroes hit by the center of Arcane Flare are Silenced for 1 second and deal 25% less damage for 3 seconds.
brightwing.16_2: While Polymorphed, the target's Armor is reduced by 25, increasing the damage they take by 25%.
brightwing.16_3: Activate to place Brightwing in Stasis for 0.75 seconds.
brightwing.20_1: Blink Heal grants Stealth to Brightwing and her Heroic targets for 9 seconds, and they are Unrevealable for the first 0.5 seconds. While Stealthed by Invisible Friends, Heroes heal for 25 (+4% per level) health per second.  Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.
brightwing.20_2: Permanently reduce Emerald Wind's cooldown to 5 seconds.
brightwing.20_3: Permanently gain 20% Movement Speed. Reduce Phase Shift's cast time by 1 second.
brightwing.20_4: Activate to apply Pixie Dust to all nearby Heroes.  Passive: Pixie Dust always bounces back and applies to Brightwing.

cassia.1_1: Increase the damage of Lightning Fury by 15.  Quest: Lightning Fury's damage is increased by 1.5 every time it hits a Hero.
cassia.1_2: Increase Fend's cast range and area of effect by 25%. It deals an additional 50% damage to enemies below 50% Health.
cassia.1_3: Gain 15% Attack Speed. Every 3rd Basic Attack deals 20% bonus damage and bounces to nearby enemy Heroes.
cassia.4_1: Regenerate 6 (+4% per level) Health per second while Avoidance is active. If fully charged, gain an additional 12 (+4% per level) Health per second.
cassia.4_2: Basic Attacks against your primary target heal for 20% of their damage. If an enemy is Blinded, this also affects Lightning Fury and Fend.
cassia.4_3: Activate to heal for 25% of your maximum Health over 5 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit with Lightning Fury lower the cooldown of this ability by 10 seconds.
cassia.7_1: Enemies hit by Lightning Fury or Fend are Slowed by 20% for 2 seconds.
cassia.7_2: Basic Attacks against your primary enemy Hero grant 10 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Blinding Light by 2 seconds.  Passive: Increase the passive damage bonus of Blinding Light from 15% to 30%.
cassia.7_3: After taking 650 (+4% per level) damage with Avoidance active, Cassia can activate Avoidance to deal 220 (+4% per level) damage to enemies around her.
cassia.10_1: Throw a ball of lightning at an enemy Hero that bounces up to 6 times between nearby enemy Heroes and Cassia, dealing 180 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit.
cassia.10_2: Summon a Valkyrie that rushes to Cassia after 0.75 seconds, pulling the first enemy Hero hit, dealing 225 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds at the end of her path. The Valkyrie knocks back all other enemy Heroes in her way.
cassia.13_1: Cassia becomes Protected while Channeling Fend and for an additional 1 second if the Channel is completed.
cassia.13_2: Gain 5% Movement Speed. While Avoidance is fully charged, gain an additional 10% Movement Speed and Mounting is instant.
cassia.13_3: Gain 1 Basic Attack range. While Avoidance is fully charged, gain an additional 1 Basic Attack range.
cassia.16_1: Lightning Fury pierces but only splits on Heroes. Enemy Heroes hit reduce its cooldown by 1 second and become marked for 15 seconds. Upon reaching 3 marks, remove them and cast a Blinding Light at their feet.
cassia.16_2: Gain 2 additional charges of Lightning Fury. Fend's impact launches a lightning bolt towards each nearby enemy Hero.
cassia.16_3: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 1% of their maximum Health. Increase this to 3% if they are Stunned, Rooted, Slowed, or Blinded.
cassia.20_1: Ball Lightning can now bounce indefinitely. Every bounce reduces its cooldown by 5 seconds.
cassia.20_2: Upon impaling an enemy Hero, they are Blinded for 5 seconds and Cassia's Valkyrie creates a wave of light that deals 200 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. This wave Silences and Roots them for 3 seconds.
cassia.20_3: Cassia's Basic Attacks now ignore Armor and while Avoidance is fully charged, they deal an additional 20% bonus damage.
cassia.20_4: Activate to fully charge Avoidance and increase its Armor value to 60 for 4 seconds.   Losing Avoidance removes this bonus.

chen.1_1: Basic Attacks against Brew-soaked enemy Heroes deal 40% more damage and heal Chen for 40% of the damage done.
chen.1_2: Increase the healing duration of Regeneration Globes by 150%.  Quest: Gather 15 Regeneration Globes.  Reward: Reduce Fortifying Brew's cooldown by 2 seconds, and 50% of its Shield persists indefinitely after drinking.
chen.1_3: Chen heals for 3.5% of his maximum Health when his Basic Abilities hit an enemy Hero.
chen.4_1: Flying Kick no longer costs Brew. Additionally, its damage is increased by 125% while Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew.
chen.4_2: Increase Ignited damage by 20%.  Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes who are Ignited increase its duration by 0.75 seconds.
chen.4_3: Igniting an enemy Hero reduces their Spell Power by 60% for 4 seconds.
chen.7_1: Increase the duration of Stagger's damage prevention by 1.5 seconds, and reduce the amount of damage taken over time to 50% of damage taken.
chen.7_2: While at or below 50 Brew, gain 20% Movement Speed. While at or above 50 Brew, regenerate an additional 18 (+4% per level) Health per second.
chen.7_3: Activate to gain 30% Movement Speed and Evade enemy Basic Attacks for 2 seconds. Chen's Basic Attacks reduce this cooldown by 2 seconds.
chen.10_1: Roll around inside an Unstoppable barrel with 70% increased Movement Speed and 25 Armor, dealing 59 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in the way and knocking them back. Lasts for 5 seconds.
chen.10_2: After 1 second, Chen splits into three elemental spirits for 12 seconds, each with 70% of Chen's maximum Health and a unique Ability.  The last spirit Ability that is cast is empowered. If all three spirits are killed, Chen will die as well.  Storm can grant the spirits a Shield.  Earth can leap to an area and Slow enemies.  Fire can grant the spirits Attack Speed, damage.
chen.13_1: Flying Kick Slows the target enemy by 40% for 1 second, or by 80% if Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew.
chen.13_2: Increase the Slows from Keg Smash by 20% and its duration by 0.5 seconds.
chen.13_3: After Igniting an enemy, become bathed in a fiery aura, dealing 55 (+4% per level) damage every second to nearby enemies for 5 seconds.
chen.13_4: Fortifying Brew instantly grants Chen a Shield that absorbs 180 (+4% per level) damage, and each second grants nearby allied Heroes a Shield that absorbs 140 (+4% per level) damage, up to 420 (+4% per level).
chen.16_1: Increase Flying Kick's range by 15% and reduce its cooldown by 0.5 seconds each time an enemy Hero takes damage from being Ignited.
chen.16_2: Basic Attacks against Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Stagger by 2 seconds and grant Chen 30 Armor for 3 seconds.
chen.16_3: Every 3rd Basic Attack against the same target deals 75% bonus damage.  While Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew and for 2 seconds after, he gains 35% Attack Speed.
chen.20_1: Increase Wandering Keg's Movement Speed bonus from 70% to 125%, and its Armor bonus to 75 for its duration and 3 seconds afterwards.
chen.20_2: Increase the spirits' Health to 100% of Chen's maximum Health and all of their Abilities are empowered.
chen.20_3: Casting Fortifying Brew grants Chen Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds.
chen.20_4: If Chen Channels Fortifying Brew for its full duration, then he gains 20% bonus Health and 20% bonus damage for 25 seconds.

cho.1_1: Consuming Blaze heals for 150% more when a Hero is Ignited.
cho.1_2: While under 60% maximum Health, Cho gains 15% increased Movement Speed and healing received.
cho.1_3: Quest: Killing enemy Minions grants 1 stack of The Will of Cho, and Hero takedowns grant 10 stacks.  Gain 1 Armor for every 30 stacks of The Will of Cho, up to a maximum of 10 Armor.  This Armor bonus stacks with Ogre Hide.
cho.4_1: Hitting an enemy Hero with Surging Fist deals additional damage to Heroes equal to 5% of their max Health and reduces the cooldown of Surging Fist by 5 seconds.
cho.4_2: Rune Bomb rolls back to Cho, damaging enemies in its path.
cho.4_3: Each consecutive Basic Attack to enemy Heroes deals 20% more damage, to a maximum of 60% damage. This bonus lasts 5 seconds or until a non-Heroic enemy is attacked.
cho.7_1: Enemy Heroes who are hit by Surging Fist are Slowed by 30% for 2.5 seconds.  Gain 15% Movement Speed while charging Surging Fist and for 2.5 seconds after casting the Ability.
cho.7_2: Basic Attacks against ignited Heroes decreases the cooldown of Consuming Blaze by 1 second.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Consuming Blaze by 3 seconds.
cho.7_3: Each time Cho hits an enemy Hero with an Ability or Basic Attack, he heals for 60 (+4% per level) over 3 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit by Gall's Dread Orb receive 35% less healing for 2 seconds.
cho.10_1: Activate to swing the Hammer of Twilight, dealing 150 (+4.5% per level) damage, pushing enemies away, and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.  Passive: Cho's Basic Attacks deal 25% increased damage.
cho.10_2: After 1 second, pull enemies towards Cho'gall, Slowing them by 25% for 3 seconds and dealing 175 (+4% per level) damage.
cho.13_1: While Channeling Surging Fist, Cho heals for 150 (+4% per level) Health per second.
cho.13_2: Activate to increase the Armor bonus of Ogre Hide to 75 for 4 seconds. If cast while Ogre Rage is active, it instantly swaps to Ogre Hide.
cho.13_3: Activate to enter Stasis and gain Invulnerability for 3 seconds, damaging nearby enemies for 92 (+4% per level) damage per second.
cho.16_1: Gain 75% Attack Speed for 5 seconds after using Surging Fist.
cho.16_2: Gall's Runic Blast reduces Cho's Rune Bomb cooldown by 1 second per enemy hit, and 2 seconds for each Hero hit.
cho.16_3: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Cho and Gall's Heroic Abilities by 6%.
cho.20_1: Cho's Basic Attack becomes ranged and Slows targets by 20% for 2 seconds.
cho.20_2: Upheaval Roots enemy Heroes for 2 seconds.
cho.20_3: Basic Attacks against enemies cause them to explode, dealing 21 (+4% per level) damage to them and 45 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.  This damage is doubled against enemy Heroes.

chromie.1_1: Quest: Hit 40 Heroes with Sand Blast from Chromie or her Echoes.  Reward: Increase the maximum number of active Echoes to 2, and increase Echo damage to 45%.
chromie.1_2: Quest: Every time Dragon's Breath hits a Hero increase its damage by 1%, up to 20%.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes, reduce the cooldown of Dragon's Breath by 4 seconds and its Mana cost from 65 to 40.
chromie.1_3: Gain 10% Spell Power and reduce the arming time of Time Traps by 0.75 seconds. Activate to reveal the targeted area for 4 seconds. Enemies seen are revealed for 4 seconds.
chromie.4_1: After its Time Stop ends, enemies affected by Time Trap are Slowed by 30% for 3 seconds and allies gain 30% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
chromie.4_2: After its Time Stop ends, enemies affected by Time Trap lose 15 Armor for 3 seconds and allies gain 30 Armor for 3 seconds.
chromie.4_3: Increase the charges and maximum active Time Traps to 3, and reduce its cooldown by 8 seconds.
chromie.7_1: Hitting a Hero with Sand Blast from Chromie or her Echoes grants 50% additional Basic Attack damage for 5 seconds.
chromie.7_2: Dragon's Breath deals 30% bonus damage to enemies hit by its center.  Enemy Heroes hit by its center are Slowed by 60% for 0.75 seconds.
chromie.7_3: Damaging a Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed enemy Hero grants 20% additional damage for 3 seconds.
chromie.10_1: Summon a sand vortex that Slows enemies by 10% every 0.25 seconds, up to 70%.
chromie.10_2: Choose an enemy Hero. After 3 seconds, they are teleported back to the location where Temporal Loop was cast on them.  Basic Abilities recharge 500% faster for 3 seconds after casting Temporal Loop.
chromie.13_1: After casting Sand Blast, Chromie gains 20% Movement Speed and 200% increased Health Regeneration for 3 seconds.
chromie.13_2: Activate to teleport to an area near an Echo, swapping it with Chromie's previous location.
chromie.13_3: Activate to place Chromie in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for up to 5 seconds. Can be reactivated to end the effect early.
chromie.16_1: Hitting an enemy Hero with Chromie's primary Sand Blast grants 5% Spell Power for 8 seconds, up to a maximum of 50%. The duration is refreshed whenever an enemy is damaged by the primary Sand Blast.
chromie.16_2: If Chromie's primary Sand Blast travels at least 50% of its base distance and hits a Hero, its cooldown is reduced to 0.5 seconds and it refunds 10 Mana.
chromie.16_3: Activate to increase Spell Power by 30% for 8 seconds. Hitting an enemy Hero with Sand Blast reduces this cooldown by 3 seconds.
chromie.20_1: Every 0.25 seconds, enemy Heroes Slowed by Slowing Sands have their Spell Armor reduced by 10 up to 50. Slowing Sands persists for 5 seconds after it is cancelled.
chromie.20_2: Temporal Loop teleports the target a second time after the first, and Basic Abilities continue recharging for an additional 3 seconds. Increase the cooldown recharge rate from 500% to 700%.
chromie.20_3: Sand Blasts cast from Chromie and her Echoes now pierce all enemies hit.
chromie.20_4: Activate to cause Chromie and all allied Heroes to gain 20% Movement Speed and their Basic Abilities recharge 35% faster for 8 seconds.  Hitting an enemy Hero with Sand Blast from Chromie or her Echoes reduces the cooldown of Blessing of the Bronze by 1 second.

deathwing.1_1: Destroyer: Incinerate heals Deathwing for 75% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes.  World Breaker: Lava Burst's explosion damage heals Deathwing for 150% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes.
deathwing.1_2: While Deathwing has 3 or more Armor Plates, he heals for 0.6% of his maximum Health per second.
deathwing.1_3: Deathwing's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes heal him for 25% of the damage dealt. Upon losing an Armor Plate, Deathwing becomes Protected for 0.75 seconds.
deathwing.4_1: Increase the damage of Molten Flame against enemy Heroes by 25%.  Increase this damage bonus to 75% when Molten Flame is cast at 75 Energy or higher.
deathwing.4_2: Destroyer: After hitting an enemy Hero with Incinerate, Deathwing deals 12 (+4% per level) damage per second to all nearby enemies for the next 8 seconds. Stacks up to 4 times.  World Breaker: Increase the explosion damage of Lava Burst by 125%.
deathwing.4_3: While Deathwing has 3 or fewer Armor Plates, his damage is increased by 25%.
deathwing.7_1: Reduce the cooldown of Deathwing's landing Abilities by 2 seconds.  When Deathwing lands, he drops 7 meteors near the landing area, dealing 70 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit. Heroes hit by the meteors reduce Dragonflight's cooldown by 25 seconds.  Meteors prioritize landing on Heroes, otherwise they fall randomly in the area.
deathwing.7_2: Hitting an enemy Hero with Destroyer or World Breaker's landing damage reduces their Spell Armor by 15 for 6 seconds and Deathwing's Basic Ability cooldowns by 2 seconds.
deathwing.7_3: After using Dragonflight, Deathwing can drop meteors anywhere within vision dealing 58 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in the area. Has 3 charges.  If a Hero is hit, Deathwing heals for 3% of his maximum Health.
deathwing.10_1: When an enemy Fort or Keep is destroyed the cooldown of Cataclysm is reset. Cataclysm's periodic damage is increased by 80%.
deathwing.10_2: After 1 second, Deathwing unleashes a mighty roar, dealing 25 (+4% per level) damage to nearby Heroes and causing them to run in Fear for 1.5 seconds.
deathwing.13_1: Molten Flame's Energy cost per second is reduced by 10.  After using Molten Flame, Deathwing gains 15 Energy over 3 seconds.
deathwing.13_2: Destroyer: The bite from Onslaught now Slows by 60% for 1.5 seconds.  World Breaker: Reduce Earth Shatter's cooldown by 6 seconds and its Energy cost by 10.
deathwing.13_3: Basic Attacks against Rooted, Slowed, or Stunned enemy Heroes deal 30% additional damage and reduce the cooldowns of Deathwing's Basic Abilities by 0.5 seconds.
deathwing.16_1: Dealing 320 (+4% per level) damage with Molten Flame to enemy Heroes within 4 seconds causes them to burn for an additional 100 (+4% per level) damage over 4 seconds. While burning, they explode every 1 second, dealing 80 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby enemies.
deathwing.16_2: Hitting Heroes with Destroyer or World Breaker's landing causes their damage to be reduced by 75% and Slows them by 40% for 5 seconds.
deathwing.16_3: Activate to gain a Shield equal to 30% of Deathwing's missing Health for 8 seconds. While the Shield holds, Deathwing regenerates 2% of his maximum Health per second.  When the Shield expires or is destroyed, Deathwing regains Armor Plates appropriate for his new Health.  The Shield and effect end immediately if Deathwing uses Dragonflight.
deathwing.20_1: Enemy Heroes are Slowed by 40% while standing in scorched ground, and its duration is increased by 50%.
deathwing.20_2: Destroyer or World Breaker's landing damage is increased by 400%.  Deathwing also gains the benefits of all of his level 7 talents.
deathwing.20_3: For the next 6 seconds after landing in Destroyer form, Deathwing's damage is increased by 40% and his Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 50% faster.  Damaging Heroes refreshes this effect and switching to World Breaker form removes the effect.

deckard.1_1: Quest: Hitting an enemy Hero with Scroll of Sealing permanently increases its damage by 2.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, Scroll of Sealing reveals and reduces the Armor of Heroes hit by 10 for 4 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, this talent's Armor reduction effect is increased to 15 and its duration to 6 seconds.
deckard.1_2: Each enemy Hero hit by Scroll of Sealing grants 20% Spell Power for 16 seconds, up to 40%.
deckard.1_3: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by 100% and its slow by 30%.  Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.
deckard.4_1: Whenever an ally is healed by a Healing Potion, they gain a 140 (+4% per level) Shield for 6 seconds.
deckard.4_2: Healing Potions restore 15 Mana and heal for an additional 114 (+4% per level) over 3 seconds.
deckard.4_3: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by 100%  and it spawns 3 Lesser Healing Potions from each enemy Hero hit, healing allied Heroes for 250 (+4% per level) when picked up. Lesser Healing Potions last for 10 seconds.  Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.
deckard.7_1: Reduce the Mana cost of Scroll of Sealing from 40 to 25.  Each enemy Hero hit by Horadric Cube reduces the cooldown of Scroll of Sealing by 4 seconds.
deckard.7_2: Horadric Cube reduces Hero damage dealt by 30% for 4 seconds.
deckard.7_3: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by 100% and have it reduce the healing received of enemy Heroes by 75% for 4 seconds.  Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.
deckard.10_1: After 1 second, Channel for 3 seconds, putting enemy Heroes in front of Deckard to Sleep while Channeling, and for 2 seconds after.  Enemies can only be put to Sleep once per cast, and Sleep's effects end instantly if they take damage.
deckard.10_2: Vector Targeting After 1 second, create a twirling tome tornado that travels towards the targeted direction, continually knocking away enemies that come into contact with it. Deals 20 (+4% per level) damage to Heroes hit.
deckard.13_1: If a Healing Potion isn't picked up for at least 2 seconds, it heals for 100% more.  Passive: Healing Potion heals for 25% more when the target is under 50% health.
deckard.13_2: When a Healing Potion is picked up, it also heals all nearby allied Heroes for 75% of the healing amount.
deckard.13_3: Activate Fortitude of the Faithful to empower nearby allied Hero Basic Attacks for 8 seconds, causing them to deal an additional 62 (+4% per level) damage in an area and heal for 90 (+4% per level) for each Hero hit. This effect can only occur once per second.
deckard.16_1: Scroll of Sealing deals 200% more damage when hitting at least 2 Heroes.
deckard.16_2: If at least 2 allied Heroes are nearby, Fortitude of the Faithful grants an additional 10 Armor, 50% Mana Regeneration per second, and causes Deckard's Basic Abilities to recharge an additional 50% faster.
deckard.16_3: Every 5 seconds, Deckard's next Basic Attack Stuns Heroes for 0.75 seconds.
deckard.20_1: Stay Awhile and Listen Silences and Blinds enemies for 3 seconds upon waking up from Sleep.
deckard.20_2: Lorenado gains an additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds every time an enemy Hero is knocked back. This effect can only occur once per 0.5 seconds.
deckard.20_3: After use, Healing Potions recharge after 8 seconds.
deckard.20_4: Reduce the cooldown of all Gems to 5 seconds and the cooldown of Horadric Cube by 6 seconds.

dehaka.1_1: Dark Swarm's duration is increased by 0.5 seconds and grants 50 Spell Armor while active.
dehaka.1_2: Regeneration Globes grant 10 Essence.  Repeatable Quest: Every 50 Essence collected permanently increases Health Regeneration by 4, up to 40, and maximum Essence by 1, up to 10.
dehaka.1_3: Brushstalker's Movement Speed bonus now lasts for 5 seconds after leaving a bush.  Repeatable Quest: Every 50 Essence collected permanently increases the Movement Speed bonus of Brushstalker by 2%, up to 20%.
dehaka.4_1: Emerging from Burrow grants Dehaka Stealth for 3 seconds and knocks nearby enemies back, dealing 125 (+4% per level) damage and Slowing them by 30% for 3 seconds.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Burrow by 3 seconds.
dehaka.4_2: Increases Essence collected from Minions by 50%. Dark Swarm deals 40% more damage to Mercenaries.
dehaka.4_3: Increases Essence gained from Takedowns by 100%, and gain 1 Essence each time an enemy Hero is hit by Dark Swarm.
dehaka.7_1: Basic Attacks reduce Drag's cooldown by 1.5 seconds.  Passive: Increase Drag's duration by 0.5 seconds.
dehaka.7_2: Drag Slows enemies by 40% for 2 seconds after it ends.  Gambit: When Drag ends, deal an additional 280 (+4% per level) damage to the target over 2 seconds. Every death reduces this damage by 40 (+4% per level), up to 5 times.
dehaka.7_3: Every time Dark Swarm damages an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by 0.4 seconds.
dehaka.10_1: Launch biomass that hits the first enemy Hero dealing 200 (+4% per level) damage, revealing, Silencing, and Slowing them 30% for 3 seconds. Additionally, their vision radius is greatly reduced for 6 seconds.
dehaka.10_2: After 4 seconds, heal for 100% of the damage Dehaka took over this period.
dehaka.13_1: Dark Swarm Slows enemy Heroes by 15% for 0.75 seconds and deals 60% more damage while Brushstalker's Movement Speed bonus is active.
dehaka.13_2: Dark Swarm causes enemies hit to lose 10 Armor for 0.75 seconds, causing them to take 10% extra damage.
dehaka.13_3: Gain 1.25% increased Attack Damage per Essence stored.
dehaka.16_2: Increase movement speed while Burrowing to 125%.
dehaka.16_3: Dehaka gains 20 Armor and 15% increased Attack Speed while in a bush and for 5 seconds after leaving.
dehaka.20_1: Isolation hits all Heroes near the first target.
dehaka.20_2: Increases Adaptation healing to 200% of the damage received and reduces the cooldown by 40 seconds.
dehaka.20_3: Dehaka's Basic Attacks slow the target by 20% for 1 second. If the target is a Hero, Dehaka gains 5 Essence.
dehaka.20_4: Reduces Brushstalker's cooldown by 50 seconds and the cast time by 0.5 seconds.

diablo.1_1: Stunning an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower heals Diablo for 10% of his maximum Health over 3 seconds.
diablo.1_2: Black Soulstone increases the effects of Regen Globes and Healing Fountains by 2.25% per Soul.
diablo.1_3: Activate to gain 25 plus 50% of Diablo's current Souls as Spell Armor for 4 seconds. Every time Diablo damages an enemy Hero, reduce this cooldown by 1 second.
diablo.4_1: Stunning a Hero with Shadow Charge grants 10 Souls and 20 Armor for 3 seconds. While at 100 Souls, increase this Armor to 40.
diablo.4_2: Fire Stomp grants 1 Soul every 3 times it damages an enemy Hero, and heals for an additional 1.3% of its damage dealt per Soul.
diablo.4_3: Diablo gains 1 Soul and heals for 1.75% of his maximum Health when Basic Attacking an enemy Hero. While at 100 Souls, increase this healing to 3.5% of his maximum Health.
diablo.7_1: Reduce the cooldown of Fire Stomp by 1 second. When Diablo Stuns an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower, reset the cooldown of Fire Stomp and restore 45 Mana.
diablo.7_2: Basic Abilities cause Diablo's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds to deal an additional 100 (+4% per level) Spell Damage. Stores up to 2 charges.
diablo.7_3: When Diablo's Basic Attacks damage enemies, reduce the cooldown of Shadow Charge and Overpower by 1.5 seconds.
diablo.10_1: Create a demonic rune under each enemy Hero on the battleground. After 1.75 seconds the rune explodes dealing 137 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 1.75 seconds.
diablo.10_2: After 0.5 seconds, become Unstoppable and Channel for up to 4 seconds, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds to enemies in front of Diablo. Enemies affected are Slowed by 4% for 2 seconds, up to 40%.  Lightning Breath's direction changes with your mouse cursor position.
diablo.13_1: Increase Shadow Charge's terrain collision damage by 50%.  Quest: Hit an enemy Hero against terrain 5 times.  Reward: Hitting enemy Heroes against terrain reduces their Armor by 20 for 4 seconds.
diablo.13_2: Each enemy Hero hit by Fire Stomp grants 3% Spell Power for 10 seconds, up to 30%.  While at maximum stacks, Diablo deals 33 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies.
diablo.13_3: Stunning an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower increases Diablo's Attack Speed by 50% for 7 seconds, up to 100%.
diablo.16_1: Casting Overpower resets the cooldown of Shadow Charge.
diablo.16_2: Enemy Heroes hit by Fire Stomp are Slowed by 6% for 4 seconds, up to 60%. Heroes Slowed by 24% or more by Debilitating Flames deal 50% less damage.
diablo.16_3: Gain 2 additional charges of Overpower, with a 2 second cooldown between uses.
diablo.20_1: Apocalypse's cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds for every enemy Hero hit (to a minimum of 5 seconds) and is cast for free when Diablo dies.
diablo.20_3: Activate to steal 10% of the maximum Health of nearby enemy Heroes and gain 5 Souls per Hero hit.
diablo.20_4: Teleport and place a demonic rune at target location. After 1.75 seconds the rune explodes dealing 137 (+4% per level) damage and stunning enemies for 1.75 seconds.

dva.1_1: D.Va's Mech gains 10% increased Health and its Fusion Cannons heal for 16% of the damage dealt to enemies in its bonus area.
dva.1_2: D.Va's Mech gains 2% Movement Speed and 2 Armor every time it takes damage, stacking up to 15 times. Stacks of this effect decay every 0.5 seconds.  Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes in Pilot Mode reduce the cooldown of Call Mech by 1 additional second.
dva.1_3: Activate to gain the effects of Healing Fountain. Requires Mech Mode.  Passive: While in Mech Mode, Healing Fountain's cooldown is reduced to 50 seconds and its effects last 35% longer.
dva.4_1: Boosters deals an additional 2% of maximum Health as damage to Heroes and heals D.Va's Mech for the damage dealt. Boosters deals 50% increased damage to non-Heroic enemies.
dva.4_2: Enemy Heroes within your Defense Matrix receive 35% less healing.  Passive: Basic Attacks against Heroes lower the cooldown of Defense Matrix by 0.1875 seconds.
dva.4_3: Hitting your self-destructing Mech with Big Shot causes it to self-destruct 40% faster.  Passive: When Fusion Cannons deal bonus damage to an enemy Hero, gain 0.25 Self-Destruct Charge.
dva.7_1: Casting Boosters grants nearby allies 20% Movement Speed for 2 seconds.  Passive: If D.Va has not taken damage in the last 3 seconds, Boosters' cooldown refreshes 100% faster.
dva.7_2: The initial speed bonus of Boosters is increased to 300%, then decays to normal boost speed over 0.5 seconds. During this time, Boosters Stuns for 0.5 seconds.
dva.7_3: Every time an enemy Hero deals damage while inside Defense Matrix, D.Va's Self-Destruct Charge increases by 1%. Max of 20% Charge gained per use.  Passive: While at full Self-Destruct charge, Fusion Cannons' bonus damage is increased to 100%.
dva.10_1: D.Va's Mech becomes Unstoppable and stomps every 0.5 seconds, dealing 70 (+4% per level) damage in a large area. Every 4th consecutive hit on a Hero deals 100% more damage and Stuns them for 0.5 seconds.  Lasts for 4 seconds.  Requires Mech Mode.
dva.10_2: After .375 seconds, Channel to launch a volley of 12 missiles in a target direction. Each missile impacts the first enemy in its path, dealing 40 (+4% per level) damage in a small area and Slowing by 30% for 2 seconds.  Stores 2 charges with a 5 second cooldown between each use.  Requires Mech Mode.
dva.13_1: Enemy Heroes that remain in your Defense Matrix for 1 seconds have their Armor reduced by 15 and their Movement Speed reduced by 25% for 3 seconds.
dva.13_2: Pilot Mode: Unlocks the Torpedo Dash and Concussive Pulse abilities.  Torpedo Dash: Dash a short distance. 10 second cooldown.  Concussive Pulse: Deal 120 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in a cone and knock them back. 10 second cooldown.
dva.13_3: Pilot Mode: Instead of a single shot, Big Shot fires 3 shots over 0.5 seconds. Each shot deals 75% damage.
dva.16_1: Casting Boosters grants a Shield equal to 10% of maximum life for 2.5 seconds. Each Enemy Hero hit by Boosters increases D.Va's Mech's Basic Attack damage by 10% for 5 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.
dva.16_2: Defense Matrix's area grows drastically in size and each time it reduces damage dealt to Heroes D.Va's Mech is healed for 35 (+4% per level) Health.
dva.16_3: When D.Va's Mech would be destroyed, it instead gains a Shield that absorbs 280 (+4% per level) damage over 4 seconds.  This effect has a 30 second cooldown.
dva.20_1: Increase Bunny Hop's duration by 4 seconds, and it does not decay while D.Va's Mech is stationary.
dva.20_2: Micro Missiles gains an additional charge. Each time Micro Missiles hits an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by 0.5 seconds and charge cooldown by 0.25 seconds.
dva.20_3: Pilot Mode: Increase Big Shot's damage by 75% and reduce its cooldown by 2 seconds.
dva.20_4: 45% of Spell damage dealt to D.Va's Mech is returned as healing over 4 seconds.

etc.1_1: While Guitar Solo is active, E.T.C. heals for 60% of his damage dealt by Basic Attacks.  Basic Attacks increase the duration of Guitar Solo by 0.5 seconds.
etc.1_2: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe permanently increases the healing per second of Guitar Solo by 5, to a maximum of 100  Reward: After gathering 20 Regeneration Globes, Guitar Solo also heals nearby allied Heroes for 50 (+4% per level) Health every second while it is active.
etc.1_3: Using a Basic or Heroic ability also gives nearby allied Heroes a stack of Block, granting 75 Physical Armor against the next Hero Basic Attack for 8 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%. Maximum 2 stacks of Block.
etc.4_1: Allows Powerslide to travel over walls and terrain. If no enemies are hit, reduce the cooldown by 7 seconds and refund the Mana cost.
etc.4_2: Increases Face Melt range and knockback by 50%.
etc.4_3: Using a Basic or Heroic ability also gives nearby allied Heroes 20% Movement Speed for 2.5 seconds.
etc.7_1: Face Melt does 300% more damage to enemies recently affected by Powerslide.
etc.7_2: While Guitar Solo is active your Basic Attacks deal 35% more damage.
etc.7_3: Using a Basic or Heroic Ability releases two pulses of 18 (+4% per level) damage.  This deals 200% bonus damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters. The first occurs instantly, the second occurs 2 seconds later.
etc.10_1: After 0.75 seconds, channel to stun nearby enemies for 4 seconds.
etc.10_2: Leap to target location, landing after 2.75 seconds, dealing 330 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in the area, and slowing them by 50% for 4 seconds.
etc.13_1: Hitting at least 2 targets with Face Melt reduces its cooldown by 6 seconds.
etc.13_2: Face Melt leaves an Amp behind, which will knock enemies away again 2 seconds later.  Passive: Each enemy Hero hit by Face Melt or the Amp reduces your Heroic Ability cooldown by 5%.
etc.13_3: Face Melt slows enemies by 50% fading over 2 seconds.
etc.16_1: After using Powerslide, gain 35 Armor for 4 seconds, reducing all damage taken by 35%.
etc.16_2: E.T.C.'s Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Guitar Solo by 0.75 seconds.
etc.16_3: Activate to reduce the Attack Speed by 50% and Movement Speed by 20% of nearby Heroes and Summons for 2.5 seconds.  Passive: Heroes and Summons that attack your Hero have their Attack Speed Slowed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
etc.20_1: Channeling Mosh Pit refreshes Powerslide's cooldown, and it can be cast to increase Mosh Pit's duration by 2 seconds.
etc.20_2: Stage Dive's impact area is 50% bigger, and its Slow is increased by 30%.
etc.20_3: Upon dying, a ghost uses Mosh Pit at E.T.C's location.
etc.20_4: Activate to give all nearby allied Heroes a Shield for 20% of their max Health for 3 seconds.
etc.20_5: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.

falstad.1_1: Quest: Every time Hammerang hits a Hero increase its damage by 0.5% and refund 6 Mana.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes with Hammerang, increase its damage by 15%.
falstad.1_2: Reduce Lightning Rod's cooldown by 2 seconds.  Quest: After 3 Lightning Rod strikes, subsequent strikes on enemy Heroes increases its damage by 1%, up to 75%.  Reward: After 30 subsequent strikes, further reduce Lightning Rod's cooldown by 2 seconds.  Reward: After 75 subsequent strikes, Takedowns reset Lightning Rod's cooldown.
falstad.1_3: Activate Frequent Flyer to gain 40% Attack Speed and Tailwind for 4 seconds.  Quest: Minion kills grant 0.2 Basic Attack Damage. Hero Takedowns grant 0.5 Basic Attack Damage.
falstad.4_1: Lightning Rod strikes grant a Shield equal to 4% of Falstad's maximum Health, up to 28%, for 4 seconds.
falstad.4_2: Increases Barrel Roll's range by 40% and Shield amount by 70%, and its Shield now lasts indefinitely.
falstad.4_3: Basic Attacks heal for 20% of the damage dealt to the primary target.
falstad.7_1: Increases Hammerang's range by 30% and Basic Attacks deal 75% bonus damage while Hammerang is in flight.
falstad.7_2: Hammerang's explosion deals 100% additional damage, and hitting enemy Heroes reduces their Spell Armor by 15 for 3 seconds.
falstad.7_3: Increases the number of Lightning Rod strikes by 2 and its range by 25%.
falstad.10_1: After 1 second, deal 475 (+4.75% per level) damage to enemies within a long line. The cooldown is reduced by 30 seconds for every enemy Hero hit.
falstad.10_2: Push enemies away, and slow their Movement Speed by 40% decaying over 4 seconds.
falstad.13_1: Lightning Rod deals 25% more damage each subsequent strike.
falstad.13_2: While Tailwind is active, Falstad's Basic Abilities recharge 100% faster.
falstad.13_3: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 1.5% of the Hero's maximum Health, increased to 2% while Tailwind is active.
falstad.16_1: Increase Hammerang's Slow from 25% to 50%, and Hammerang's explosion also Slows.
falstad.16_2: Reduces the activation time for Tailwind from 5 to 3 seconds, and increases the Movement Speed bonus from 15% to 25%.
falstad.16_3: Barrel Roll increases Movement Speed by 60%, decaying over 3 seconds.
falstad.20_1: Hinterland Blast has double the range and deals 25% more damage.
falstad.20_2: Mighty Gust creates a wind tunnel for 4 seconds. Enemies caught in the tunnel will periodically be pushed back.
falstad.20_3: Increases Attack Speed by 20% and Attack Range by 1.1.
falstad.20_4: Reduce the cooldown of Flight by 50 seconds, reduce the cast time before flying to 0.5 seconds, and increase the speed by 50%.

fenix.1_1: Quest: Hitting enemy Heroes with Plasma Cutter permanently increases Fenix's Basic Attack damage by 0.5, up to 60.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, Plasma Cutter circles an additional time.
fenix.1_2: After hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Attacks 3 times while Repeater Cannon is active, the next Basic Attack with Phase Bomb deals 150% more damage and splashes in a 50% larger area.
fenix.1_3: After moving, Fenix's next Basic Attack deals 35% more damage to Heroes.
fenix.4_1: Basic Attacks against Slowed Heroes with Repeater Cannon active grant 10% Movement Speed for 4 seconds, up to 40%.
fenix.4_2: Every 10 seconds, Fenix's next Basic Attack with Phase Bomb active Slows all enemies hit by 60%, decaying in strength over 1.5 seconds.
fenix.4_3: While Fenix has shields from Shield Capacitor, he gains 10% Movement Speed.  This bonus is increased to 15% when Fenix loses shields from Shield Capacitor.
fenix.7_1: Plasma Cutter deals 35% more damage to Slowed targets.
fenix.7_2: After arriving with Warp, gain 175% Attack Speed for 4 seconds while in Repeater Cannon mode. Hero Takedowns reset Warp's cooldown.
fenix.7_3: Activate to gain 40% Basic Attack damage for 5 seconds. Basic Attacking a Hero refreshes this duration. Once Divert Power: Weapons ends, drain all of Shield Capacitor's Shields.
fenix.10_1: Channel for 1.5 seconds, sweeping a laser in front of Fenix that locks onto enemy Heroes. Once Channeling finishes, fire 5 missiles at each locked Hero, dealing 79 (+4% per level) damage each. Deals 50% increased damage to Slowed targets.
fenix.10_2: After 0.5 seconds, Channel a powerful beam that spans across the battleground for 4 seconds, dealing 112 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds to non-Structure enemies hit.
fenix.13_1: After arriving with Warp, gain 50 Armor for 4 seconds.
fenix.13_2: Fenix gains 30 Spell Armor while he has a Shield from Shield Capacitor.
fenix.13_3: The time before Shield Capacitor begins regenerating after taking damage is reduced by 2 seconds. Whenever Fenix is healed, Shield Capacitor's Shield recharges for 60% of the healing received.
fenix.13_4: Permanently reduce Fenix's maximum Health by 30% but increase Shield Capacitor's Shield by 40%. Basic Attacks regenerate Shields equal to 10% of the damage dealt.
fenix.16_1: Every 3rd Basic Attack against Heroes while Repeater Cannon is active deals an additional 6% of the target's maximum Health as damage.
fenix.16_2: Fenix deals 20% more damage while he has a Shield from Shield Capacitor.
fenix.16_3: Basic Attacks with Repeater Cannon reduce Ability cooldowns by 0.5 seconds. Basic Attacks with Phase Bomb active reduce Ability cooldowns by 0.5 seconds per Hero hit.
fenix.20_1: Planet Cracker's width increases by 100% over 1.5 seconds.  Passive: Reduce Planet Cracker's cooldown by 40 seconds.
fenix.20_2: Hitting an enemy Hero with Plasma Cutter fires a Purification Salvo missile at them after 0.5 seconds, dealing 79 (+4% per level) damage. Deals 50% increased damage to Slowed targets.
fenix.20_3: Repeater Cannon grants 100% more Attack Speed, and Phase Bomb grants 1.25 more range.
fenix.20_4: Upon taking fatal damage, Shield Capacitor regains 800 (+4% per level) Shields. This effect has a 120 second cooldown.

gall.1_1: Increases the Movement Speed bonus of Shove by 10% and its duration by 2 seconds.
gall.1_2: Every time Cho is hit by a Hero Basic Attack, reduce the cooldown of Shove by 1 second.
gall.1_3: Eye of Kilrogg's cooldown is decreased by 25 seconds, its range is increased by 33%, and the number of Basic Attacks required to kill it is increased by 1.
gall.4_1: Each bounce of Dread Orb increases its radius by 25% and damage by 15%. Activate Dread Orb before the second bounce ends to reverse the direction of the third bounce.
gall.4_2: Runic Blast deals an additional 180 (+4% per level) damage over 3 seconds in an area around the detonation point.
gall.4_3: Quest: Damaging a Hero with Runic Blast increases its damage by 5, up to 200.  Reward: After damaging 20 Heroes, the range and speed of Cho's Rune Bomb is increased by 20%.
gall.7_1: Every subsequent hit of Shadowflame against the same enemy Hero deals an additional 12% damage, to a maximum of 60%. These bonuses are lost if the Hero has not been hit for 7 seconds.
gall.7_2: Quest: If Shadowflame hits an enemy Hero that is afflicted by Cho's Consuming Blaze, its cooldown is reduced by 0.5 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes, Shadowflame's cooldown is instead permanently reduced by 0.5 seconds.
gall.7_3: Increase the damage bonus of Ogre Rage by 5%. Each time Gall damages an enemy Hero this bonus increases by 1% for 4 seconds, up to an additional 10% bonus damage.
gall.10_1: After 1 second, unleash 20 Shadow Bolts over 4 seconds, each dealing 87 (+4% per level) damage to the first target hit. The bolts fire towards your mouse.
gall.10_2: After 1 second, nearby enemies are slowed by 50% while Gall channels, up to 5 seconds. Activate to deal 353 (+5% per level) damage.
gall.13_1: Enemy Heroes hit by Shadowflame take an additional 2% of their maximum Health as damage.
gall.13_2: Increase Gall's damage to enemy Heroes by 10%. Upon dying, Gall gains Ogre Rage and can use Abilities for 10 seconds.
gall.13_3: After the first bounce of Dread Orb, 2 extra bombs bounce to the sides once.
gall.16_1: Dread Orb Stuns enemy Heroes for 0.75 seconds.
gall.16_2: Runic Blast Silences enemy Heroes for 1.25 seconds.
gall.16_3: Enemy Heroes hit by your Basic Abilities are Slowed by 15% for 4 seconds. This effect can stack up to 2 times.
gall.20_1: Shadow Bolt Volley hits all enemies in its path.
gall.20_2: Twisting Nether now teleports Cho to a targeted location before it begins Channeling.
gall.20_3: Takedowns permanently increase the bonus of Ogre Rage by 2%.
gall.20_4: Activate to reduce the cooldowns of Shadowflame and Dread Orb to 2 seconds for the next 6 seconds.

garrosh.1_1: Quest: Stun Heroes with Groundbreaker.  Reward: After Stunning 5 Heroes, Groundbreaker's Stun deals an additional 165 (+4% per level) damage over 3 seconds to Heroes.  Reward: After Stunning 15 Heroes, permanently reduce Groundbreaker's cooldown by 2 seconds.
