garrosh.1_2: Increase Wrecking Ball's throw range by 25% and its damage by 125%.
garrosh.1_3: Activate to deal 111 (+4% per level) damage to a target enemy and Slow them by 35% for 3 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit receive 30% reduced healing for 3 seconds.
garrosh.4_1: Increase Bloodthirst's damage against non-Heroes by 70%. Killing enemies with Bloodthirst resets its cooldown and refunds its Mana cost.
garrosh.4_2: Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Bloodthirst by 2 seconds.
garrosh.4_3: Activate to become Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds.
garrosh.7_1: Groundbreaker reduces the Attack Speed of Heroes hit by 30% for 4 seconds.
garrosh.7_2: Basic Attacks and Bloodthirst against Heroes reduce the target's Spell Power by 30% for 2.5 seconds.
garrosh.7_3: Increase Into the Fray's Armor by 20. Hitting enemy Heroes with Into the Fray reduces its cooldown by 12 seconds.
garrosh.10_1: Silence nearby Heroes and force them to attack Garrosh for 2 seconds.
garrosh.10_2: Deal 50 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies and Slow them by 40% for 1.5 seconds. Deals 100% more damage to Heroes, and each Hero hit reduces the cooldown by 1 second.  Stores up to 3 charges.
garrosh.13_1: If Groundbreaker Stuns a Hero, Garrosh gains a 350 (+4% per level) Shield for 6 seconds.
garrosh.13_2: When hitting a Hero, Bloodthirst heals for an additional 15% of Garrosh's maximum Health over 3 seconds.
garrosh.13_3: Armor Up can be activated to increase its Armor bonus by 100% for 3 seconds.
garrosh.16_1: Hitting a Hero with Groundbreaker's Stun and throwing them with Wrecking Ball within 3 seconds reduces Wrecking Ball's cooldown by 10 seconds, regardless of order.
garrosh.16_2: Wrecking Ball Stuns enemies near the impact area for 0.5 seconds.
garrosh.16_3: Gain 5% maximum Health, increase Groundbreaker's Slow duration by 1 second, and Bloodthirst gains an additional charge.
garrosh.20_1: Increase the duration of Warlord's Challenge by 0.5 seconds.  If an enemy Hero is killed while Taunted by Warlord's Challenge, its cooldown is reduced by 45 seconds.
garrosh.20_2: Heroes hit by Decimate deal 40% less damage for 3 seconds.
garrosh.20_3: Wrecking Ball now throws the 2 closest enemies.
garrosh.20_4: Body Check gains an additional charge and its healing reduction is increased by an additional 45%.

gazlowe.1_1: Increase the cast range of Xplodium Charge by 30% and its damage by 35%. Hitting an enemy Hero increases Movement Speed by 20% for 3 seconds.
gazlowe.1_2: Increase maximum Scrap by 2. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes, Mercenaries, or Monsters accelerates Reduce, Reuse, Recycle Scrap regeneration by 1.5 seconds.
gazlowe.1_3: Casting Basic Abilities cause Gazlowe's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds to deal 60% more damage.  Stores up to 2 charges.
gazlowe.4_1: Casting Rock-It! Turret grants Gazlowe a Shield that absorbs up to 200 (+4% per level) damage for 2.5 seconds.
gazlowe.4_2: Heroes hit by Deth Lazor or Xplodium Charge take an additional 2% of their maximum Health in damage. Gazlowe is healed for 150% of the damage dealt.
gazlowe.4_3: Activate to gain 40 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 40%, and reduce damage dealt by all nearby enemy Heroes and Summons by 50% for 3 seconds
gazlowe.7_1: Generate 3 Scrap for each Hero hit by Deth Lazor.
gazlowe.7_2: Deth Lazor can now store up to 2 charges. Each enemy Hero hit by Deth Lazor reduces its cooldown by 0.75 seconds.
gazlowe.7_3: Deth Lazor and Xplodium Charge Slow enemies hit by 35% for 3 seconds. Rock-It! Turret Basic Attacks against enemies Slowed in this way extend the Slow duration by 0.5 seconds.
gazlowe.10_1: Activate to become Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds.  Passive: Basic Attacks deal 90 (+4% per level) bonus damage over 5 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.
gazlowe.10_2: After a 1.5 second delay, pull enemies toward the center of an area and deal 220 (+4% per level) damage. Basic Abilities deal 30% more damage for 5 seconds after casting Grav-O-Bomb 3000.
gazlowe.13_1: Primary Rock-It! Turret attacks against Heroes increase Gazlowe's Attack Speed by 40% for 3 seconds.
gazlowe.13_2: Rock-It! Turrets attack up to 2 additional enemies for 60% damage and have 30% increased Basic Attack range.
gazlowe.13_3: Gazlowe gains 5% Spell Power for each active Rock-It! Turret, up to a maximum of 15%. Dealing Basic Attack damage extends the duration of Rock-It! Turrets by 1.25 seconds.
gazlowe.16_1: Firing Deth Lazor causes all of Gazlowe's Rock-It! Turrets to fire a Deth Lazor of their own that deals 125 (+4% per level) damage.
gazlowe.16_2: Reduce the cooldown of Xplodium Charge by 2 seconds. Casting Xplodium Charge creates 3 miniature Rock-It! Turrets that last for 3 seconds.  These Turrets do not drop Scrap or benefit from other Talents.
gazlowe.16_3: Basic Attacks grant Gazlowe 15% Movement Speed for 2 seconds.  Dealing Basic Attack damage to Heroes causes them to take an additional 2.5% of their maximum Health as damage.
gazlowe.20_1: Basic Attacks increase Gazlowe's Armor by 10 for 10 seconds, up to a maximum of 30, and deal 50% bonus damage to Stunned or Slowed enemies.
gazlowe.20_2: Increase Grav-O-Bomb 3000's radius by 25% and its damage by 50%. Each enemy Hero pulled reduces its cooldown by 12 seconds.
gazlowe.20_3: Reduce the Scrap cost of Rock-It! Turrets by 1. Regain 2 Scrap for each Scrap pickup.
gazlowe.20_4: Xplodium Charge gains a 2nd charge with a 3 second cooldown between uses and launches 2 more bombs when it detonates.

genji.1_1: Hitting an enemy Hero with Swift Strike increases Genji's Movement Speed by 30% for 3 seconds.
genji.1_2: While mounted the range of Cyber Agility is increased by 70%, its cooldown is reduced by 14 seconds, and it Slows enemy Heroes in its landing area by 30% for 2 seconds.
genji.1_3: Jumping over terrain with Cyber Agility increases Movement Speed by 25%, and grants Stealth, for 4 seconds.
genji.4_1: Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Shuriken.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, Shuriken damage is increased by 25.  Reward: After hitting 60 Heroes, Cyber Agility now refunds 3 charges of Shuriken.
genji.4_2: Enemies hit by the end of Swift Strike take an additional 134 (+4% per level) damage after 1 second.
genji.4_3: After Genji blocks 330 (+4% per level) damage with Deflect, activate to release a Dragon Claw, dealing 190 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby enemies.
genji.7_1: When Deflect ends, Genji gains a Shield equal to 100% of the damage blocked for 4 seconds.
genji.7_2: Deflected damage reduces the cooldown of Deflect by 2 seconds, up to a maximum of 10 seconds.
genji.7_3: Using Cyber Agility grants 50 Spell Armor for 4 seconds.  Passive: Genji dodges 1 Heroic Basic Attack every 5 seconds.
genji.10_1: Unleash the Dragonblade for 8 seconds. While active, Dragonblade can be reactivated to lunge forward and slash in a huge arc, dealing 240 (+4% per level) damage.
genji.10_2: Perform two slashes dealing 145 (+4% per level) damage. The slashes detonate after 1.25 seconds causing an additional 290 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in their area.
genji.13_1: Hitting an enemy with all 3 Shuriken deals 115 (+4% per level) bonus damage.
genji.13_2: Each enemy Hero hit with Swift Strike reduces its cooldown by 3 seconds.
genji.13_3: Increase Genji's Basic Attack range by 1.  Each time Genji hits an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack, increase his Basic Attack damage by 1% for 3 seconds, stacking up to 15%.
genji.16_1: Deflect also deals an additional 33% of the damage blocked.
genji.16_2: After 1 second, Swift Strike deals an additional 125 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies in the area.
genji.16_3: Each enemy Hero hit by Swift Strike increases the damage of the next Swift Strike by 30%. This bonus stacks up to 3 times.
genji.20_1: Each time Dragonblade hits an enemy Hero, the duration of Dragonblade is increased by 0.5 seconds. If a Hero is killed within 1.5 seconds of being hit by Dragonblade, Swift Strike's cooldown is reset.
genji.20_2: Each enemy Hero hit by X-Strike reduces its cooldown by 10 seconds.
genji.20_3: Shuriken now pierce all enemies hit. Swift Strike's refund grants 1 charge of Shuriken.
genji.20_4: Quest: Block 6500 damage with Deflect, including damage blocked so far.  Reward: Deflect hits all nearby enemy Heroes.

greymane.1_1: Increase the cooldown reduction from Basic Attacks during Inner Beast from 0.5 to 1.2 seconds.
greymane.1_2: Increases Gilnean Cocktail's range by 30% and refunds 45 Mana if it hits an enemy Hero.
greymane.1_3: Increases Inner Beast's duration to 4 seconds, and causes Ability damage to also refresh its duration.
greymane.4_1: Using Darkflight grants 50 Physical Armor against the next 2 Hero Basic Attacks while in Worgen Form, reducing the damage taken by 50%.
greymane.4_3: Inner Beast causes Basic Attacks to restore 10 Mana, and reduce the cooldown of Healing Fountain by 0.5 seconds.
greymane.7_1: Increases Greymane's Human Basic Attack range by 1.1.
greymane.7_2: Quest: Reduce the cooldown of Gilnean Cocktail by 2 seconds. Every time Greymane hits an enemy Hero with the explosion damage from Gilnean Cocktail, increase its explosion damage by 25, up to 375.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, the cooldown is reduced by an additional 3 seconds.
greymane.7_3: Quest: Every 6 Human Basic Attacks against Heroes increase Basic Attack damage by 1%, up to 30%. Worgen Basic Attacks grant credit for 3 Basic Attacks. Half of this bonus is lost upon death.
greymane.10_1: Leap at an enemy Hero and shapeshift into a Worgen, slashing for 355 (+4% per level) damage. If this kills them, the Ability can be used a second time within 10 seconds for free.
greymane.10_2: Greymane shapeshifts into a Human and fires a bullet that hits the first enemy Hero in its path, dealing 35% of their current Health in damage.  Does not affect Vehicles.
greymane.13_1: Increases Darkflight and Disengage's range by 35%, and reduce their cooldowns by 1 second.
greymane.13_2: Increases Razor Swipe's lunge distance by 60%, and Worgen Basic Attacks reduce Razor Swipe's cooldown by 1.5 seconds.
greymane.13_3: Inner Beast increases Movement Speed by 30% once it has been active for 3 seconds.
greymane.16_1: Increases the Attack Speed bonus of Inner Beast by an additional 40% after it has been active for 4 seconds.
greymane.16_2: Attacking a Hero that is slowed, rooted, or stunned increases your Basic Attack damage by 30% for 3 seconds.
greymane.16_3: Worgen Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 3% of the Hero's maximum Health.
greymane.20_1: Passive: Go For The Throat's damage is increased by 25%.  If Go for the Throat kills its target, refund its Mana cost and reset the cooldowns of Greymane's Abilities.
greymane.20_2: Cursed Bullet's damage is reduced to 30% of current health but its cooldown is reduced by 24 seconds.
greymane.20_3: Human Basic Attacks splash for 100% damage behind the target.
greymane.20_4: Worgen Basic Attacks cleave for 100% damage. Increase Razor Swipe's damage by 100%.

guldan.1_1: Quest: Hit 30 enemy Heroes with Fel Flame.  Reward: Fel Flame's radius is increased by 10%.
guldan.1_2: Increases the cast range of Drain Life by 25% and the healing provided by Regen Globes by 50%.  Quest: Gather 15 Regen Globes.  Reward: Basic Ability Mana costs are permanently reduced by 20.
guldan.1_3: Quest: Hit 40 enemy Heroes with Corruption.  Reward: After the third strike, Corruption strikes 3 times in the opposite direction.
guldan.4_1: Drain Life's cooldown recharges 100% faster while it is channeling. If an enemy dies while under the effect of Drain Life, the cooldown is instantly refreshed.
guldan.4_2: Increase the Mana restored by Life Tap to 40%.
guldan.4_3: Instantly kill an enemy Minion and heal for 365 (+4% per level) Health.  Stores up to 3 charges.
guldan.7_1: Each enemy Hero hit with Fel Flame reduces the cooldown of Corruption by 1.75 seconds.
guldan.7_2: Drain Life deals 50% more damage and Slows the target's Movement Speed by 40%.
guldan.7_3: Increases Spell Power by 15% but reduces healing received from allies by 25%.
guldan.10_1: After 0.5 seconds, deal 120 (+4% per level) damage to enemy Heroes in an area and Fear them for 2 seconds. While Feared, Heroes are Silenced and are forced to run away from Horrify's center.
guldan.10_2: After 1.5 seconds, summon a rain of meteors in an area for 7 seconds. Each meteor deals 165 (+4% per level) damage in a small area.
guldan.13_1: Hitting an enemy Hero with Fel Flame grants 50 Spell Armor for 2.5 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 50%.
guldan.13_2: Drain Life heals for 75% more Health when used on Heroes.
guldan.13_3: Gul'dan's maximum Health is permanently increased by 40% but his respawn time is increased by 10 seconds.
guldan.13_4: Activate to heal for 25% of Gul'dan's maximum Health.
guldan.16_1: Fel Flame's damage is increased by 12% for 5 seconds when hitting an enemy Hero. This can stack up to 5 times.
guldan.16_2: Corruption deals an additional 78 (+4% per level) damage on impact. If the enemy is hit by all three strikes, the third strike deals 268 (+4% per level) damage.
guldan.16_3: Dealing 600 (+4% per level) damage to enemy Heroes causes the next cast of Life Tap to cost no Health and grant Gul'dan 25% Spell Power for 5 seconds.
guldan.20_1: Increases the duration of Horrify by 1 second, and while Feared, enemies lose 20 Armor, causing them to take 20% increased damage.
guldan.20_2: Rain of Destruction slows enemies Movement Speed by 90% for 0.5 seconds.
guldan.20_3: Summon a Demonic Circle at Gul'dan's location. Activate to teleport Gul'dan to the Demonic Circle.

hanzo.1_1: Quest: Hit every enemy Hero with Storm Bow.  Reward: After hitting every enemy Hero once with Storm Bow, its range is increased by 30%.  Reward: After hitting every enemy Hero 3 times with Storm Bow, its damage is increased by 100.
hanzo.1_2: Quest: Hit a Hero with multiple arrows from the same Scatter Arrow cast 20 times. Each arrow hit after the second grants additional progress.  Reward: Upon hitting terrain for the first time, Scatter Arrow creates 2 additional arrows.
hanzo.1_3: Quest: Every 2 Basic Attacks against the same Hero within 10 seconds grants 1 Redemption, stacking up to 12. Dying decreases Redemption by 3, and Redemption can be lost even at maximum stacks.  Reward: At 12 Redemption, gain 50% Attack Speed.
hanzo.4_1: Upon hitting a Minion or Monster, Storm Bow deals 60% of its damage to enemies around its target.
hanzo.4_2: Scatter Arrow deals 100% more damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
hanzo.4_3: Basic Attacks instantly kill Minions and increase Hanzo's Basic Attack range by 2 for 3 seconds.
hanzo.7_1: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow grants 5% Spell Power for 12 seconds, stacking up to 20%.
hanzo.7_2: Reduce Scatter Arrow's Mana cost from 50 to 30. Basic Attacks against Heroes lower the cooldown of Scatter Arrow by 3 seconds.
hanzo.7_3: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow or Basic Attacks reduces their Armor by 3 for 3 seconds, up to a maximum reduction of 20 Armor.
hanzo.10_1: After 1.5 seconds, summon a pair of Spirit Dragons which travel forward, dealing 84 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds to enemy Heroes in its area.  Enemies in the center take 75% increased damage.
hanzo.10_2: Fire a missile that travels across the battleground. Explodes upon hitting an enemy Hero, dealing 130 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby enemies and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.  After traveling a medium distance, the damage is increased to 260 (+4% per level) and the Stun duration to 1.25 seconds.  After traveling a long distance, the damage is increased to 390 (+4% per level) and the Stun duration to 2 seconds.
hanzo.13_1: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow grants 10% Movement Speed for 6 seconds, up to 30%.
hanzo.13_2: Hitting Heroes with Storm Bow lowers Natural Agility's cooldown by 10 seconds. Additionally, Hero Takedowns reset Natural Agility's cooldown.
hanzo.13_3: Reduce the cooldown of Summon Mount by 2 seconds.  Upon mounting, gain 25% additional Movement Speed for 5 seconds. Using Natural Agility instantly mounts.
hanzo.16_1: Hitting Heroes with Storm Bow increases the damage of Hanzo's next Basic Attack within 5 seconds by 40%. Basic Attacks against Heroes increase the damage of Hanzo's next Storm Bow within 5 seconds by 40%.
hanzo.16_2: Storm Bow and Scatter Arrow pierce, hitting an additional enemy. Additionally, Scatter Arrow can pierce through 1 enemy each time it ricochets.
hanzo.16_3: Enemy Heroes hit by Scatter Arrow and Basic Attacks take a bonus 2% of their maximum Health as damage.
hanzo.20_1: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow, Scatter Arrow, or Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Dragonstrike by 4 seconds.
hanzo.20_2: While in flight or for up to 2 seconds after impacting a target, Dragon's Arrow can be reactivated to teleport to its location and jump backwards. If used after impact, Hanzo shoots arrows that deal 132 (+4% per level) damage to each target hit by the impact.  Hanzo is Unstoppable during Play of the Game.
hanzo.20_3: Increase Sonic Arrow's speed and center radius by 100%. Additionally, Heroes hit by Sonic Arrow's center are Stunned for 1 second.
hanzo.20_4: Natural Agility gains a 2nd charge and its cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds.

hogger.1_1: Each Hero hit by Ez-Thro Dynamite heals you for 8% of maximum Health.  Quest: Hitting Heroes with Ez-Thro Dynamite permanently increases your maximum Health by 10, to a maximum of 750 bonus Health.
hogger.1_2: Loot Hoard creates a chunk of Meat when it lands. While under the effects of Meat, gain 10 Armor.
hogger.1_3: Activate to gain 30 Rage over 8 seconds.  Passive: You heal for 8 (+4% per level) Health every second, increased by 2% per point of Rage.
hogger.4_1: Increase the range of Loot Hoard by 20% and its damage by 50%.  Quest: Hitting Heroes with Staggering Blow permanently increases Basic Attack damage by 2, to a maximum of 150 bonus damage. Enemy Heroes that hit terrain grant an additional 8 damage.
hogger.4_2: Increase Hogg Wild's radius by 20% and each enemy hit generates 0.5 Rage, increased to 2 against Heroes.
hogger.4_3: While above 30 Rage, gain 10% increased Movement Speed and healing received.  When at or above 50 Rage, increase these bonuses to 15%.
hogger.7_1: Instant detonations of Ez-Thro Dynamite creates an additional dynamite behind the Hero hit.  Hitting the bundle of Ez-Thro Dynamite with Staggering Blow breaks it into three sticks and launches them forward in an arc.
hogger.7_2: Reduce the cooldown of Loot Hoard by 2 seconds.  Every 0.5 seconds, enemies in a large area around Loot Hoard take 23 (+4% per level) damage and are Slowed by 20%.
hogger.7_3: While above 50 Rage, gain 35% Attack Speed and the cooldowns of Staggering Blow and Hogg Wild refresh 30% faster.
hogger.10_1: Launch an empowered Loot Hoard with Hogger attached, dealing 100 (+4% per level) damage and Slowing enemies by 50% for 2 seconds.  Hoardapult's Loot Hoard lasts for up to 20 seconds, decaying rapidly while not nearby. Every 10 seconds Hogger can take a chunk of Meat from the Loot Hoard.
hogger.10_2: After 0.5 seconds, slam the ground, sending out a shockwave that travels in a long line. Enemies hit by the initial slam take 335 (+4% per level) damage and are Stunned for 1.5 seconds. Enemies only hit by the shockwave take 230 (+4% per level) damage and are Stunned for 0.75 seconds.
hogger.13_1: Gain 20 Armor while Hogg Wild is active and for 3 seconds after. When at or above 50 Rage, increase this Armor to 40.
hogger.13_2: Enemies hit by Hogg Wild are Slowed by 10% for 2 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.  Heroes hit have their Spell Power reduced by 50% for 2 seconds.
hogger.13_3: Damaging Heroes with Basic Attacks, Staggering Blow, or Hogg Wild heals you for 33% of the damage dealt.
hogger.16_1: Enemy Heroes Stunned by Staggering Blow take an additional 8% of their maximum Health as damage and are Stunned for an additional 0.5 seconds.
hogger.16_2: Instant Ez-Thro Dynamite detonations deal 50% more damage, reduce its cooldown by 1.5 seconds, and increase its Slow amount to 50%.  Passive: Increase Ez-Thro Dynamite's range by 25%.
hogger.16_3: Hitting Heroes with Staggering Blow or Ez-Thro Dynamite increases the damage of the next Basic Attack within 8 seconds by 50%, stacking up to 2 times.  When Hogg Wild ends, gain 30% Movement Speed for 2 seconds.
hogger.20_1: Every 2 seconds, Hoardapults' Loot Hoard randomly launches Ez-Thro Dynamite, prioritizing nearby enemy Heroes.  Every 5 seconds, it also launches a chunk of Meat towards Hogger.
hogger.20_2: Hitting Heroes with Shockwave reduces their Armor by 15 for 4 seconds and grants 20 Rage.  Passive: Rage's cooldown reduction affects Shockwave's cooldown.
hogger.20_3: Activate to cast an untalented Hogg Wild and begin chasing an enemy Hero. After reaching the Hero, bounce to a random nearby enemy Hero. Lasts up to 5 seconds, rapidly decaying if there are no other enemy Heroes nearby.  Cannot be cancelled.
hogger.20_4: Increase maximum Rage by 50, raising the maximum bonuses for its cooldown refresh rate to 75% and Hogg Wild's Hero damage to 75%.  Passive: Basic Attacks grant 5 additional Rage.

illidan.1_1: After using Sweeping Strike, burn nearby enemies for 22 (+4% per level) damage a second for 4 seconds.
illidan.1_2: Increase Sweeping Strike's Basic Attack damage bonus duration from 3 to 5 seconds. If Sweeping Strike hits 2 Heroes its damage bonus is increased from 35% to 125%.
illidan.1_3: Quest: Minion kills grant 0.2 Basic Attack Damage. Hero Takedowns grant 1 Basic Attack Damage.  Reward: After gaining 20 increased Basic Attack Damage, receive an additional 20 Basic Attack Damage.
illidan.4_1: Using Dive grants 75 Physical Armor against the next 3 Hero Basic Attacks for 4 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%.
illidan.4_2: Betrayer's Thirst's healing from Basic Attacks is increased from 30% to 50% while Sweeping Strike's damage bonus is active.
illidan.4_3: Basic Abilities heal for 35% of the damage they deal. This bonus is doubled versus Heroes.
illidan.7_1: Dive grants 20% Movement Speed for 3 seconds. If the target is an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by 1 second.
illidan.7_2: Increases the range of Dive by 20% and allows it to be used to dive to allied Heroes.
illidan.7_3: Sweeping Strike can go over walls and terrain.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes with Sweeping Strike, gain a second charge.
illidan.10_1: Transform into Demon Form at the target location, dealing 46 (+4% per level) damage in the area. Temporarily increases maximum Health by 220 (+4% per level) for each Hero hit by the initial impact. Lasts for 18 seconds.
illidan.10_2: Charge to target unit, dealing 251 (+4% per level) damage on impact and stunning for 1 second.
illidan.13_1: If Sweeping Strike hits an enemy Hero, gain 25 Armor for 2 seconds, reducing damage taken by 25%.
illidan.13_2: Sweeping Strike reduces the cooldown of Evasion by 3 seconds every time it damages an enemy Hero.
illidan.13_3: While active, Evasion grants Illidan 75 Spell Armor against the next 2 sources of Spell Damage, reducing their damage by 75%.
illidan.16_1: Dive deals an extra 180 (+4% per level) damage if used consecutively on a target within 10 seconds.
illidan.16_2: Every 3rd attack against the same Hero deals an additional 7% of their maximum Health as damage.
illidan.16_3: Hitting 5 Heroes with Sweeping Strike allows Blades of Azzinoth to be activated, increasing Basic Attack damage by 75% for 8 seconds.
illidan.20_1: Permanently remain in Demonic Form. Metamorphosis also increases Attack Speed by 20% and reduces the duration of Stuns, Roots, and Slows by 50%. Illidan can now mount in Demonic Form.
illidan.20_2: The Hunt gains unlimited range. Illidan passively reveals enemy Heroes below 25% Health anywhere on the Battleground.
illidan.20_3: Basic Attacks deal 20% more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by 20% for 1 second.
illidan.20_4: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.

imperius.1_1: Celestial Charge's final damage is increased by 75% and its cooldown is reduced by 1.25 seconds for each Valorous Brand on the target when the Stun completes.
imperius.1_2: Increase the center damage of Solarion's Fire by an additional 125% and its Slow amount by 15%. The first enemy Hero hit with Solarion's Fire restores 30 Mana.
imperius.1_3: Consuming a Valorous Brand mark deals bonus damage equal to 2.5% of the Hero's maximum Health.
imperius.4_1: Molten Armor grants 20 Armor for 1.5 seconds. Damaging an enemy Hero with Molten Armor increases the duration of the Armor by 0.5 seconds.
imperius.4_2: Increase the healing of Valorous Brand by 80%.
imperius.4_3: Gain 10 Armor while being healed by a Regeneration Globe.  Damaging an enemy Hero sets the duration of an active Regeneration Globe on Imperius to 8 seconds (unless it is already higher).
imperius.7_1: Consuming a mark from Celestial Charge deals 150 (+4% per level) damage to the target and nearby enemies and grants Imperius a 250 (+4% per level) point Shield for 4 seconds.
imperius.7_2: Solarion's Fire leaves a line of scorched earth along its center that explodes after 2 seconds for 205 (+4% per level) damage, dealing bonus damage with Valorous Brand marks.
imperius.7_3: Activate to cause the next 4 Basic Attacks within 10 seconds to cleave for 30% additional damage.  Passive: Casting Molten Armor grants Holy Fervor for 2 Basic Attacks.
imperius.10_1: Summon a ring of blazing swords that grants 850 (+4% per level) Shield for 3 seconds.  If the Shield lasts the full duration, this ability can be reactivated within 5 seconds to launch 6 swords toward an area, each dealing 140 (+4% per level) damage to the first enemy hit.
imperius.10_2: After 0.75 seconds, charge in the target direction, lifting the first enemy Hero hit into the Heavens. While in the air, Imperius can steer the landing location by moving.  After 2 seconds, slam the target into the ground, dealing 375 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 1 second.
imperius.13_1: Stunning enemy Heroes with Celestial Charge reduces their Movement Speed by 25% and their damage by 50% for 4 seconds.
imperius.13_2: Consuming a Valorous Brand mark reduces the cooldown of Molten Armor by 1 second.
imperius.13_3: Increase Molten Armor's healing against Heroes by 2% for every 1% Health Imperius is missing.
imperius.16_1: Gain 20% Movement Speed for 5 seconds after casting Celestial Charge. Gain 40% Attack Speed for 5 seconds for each Hero stunned with Celestial Charge.
imperius.16_2: Consuming a Molten Armor mark reduces the target's Armor by 25 for 4 seconds.
imperius.16_3: Activate to teleport to an enemy that has been marked by Valorous Brand and gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds.
imperius.20_1: Nearby allied Heroes gain 600 (+4% per level) Shield for 3 seconds.  If the Shield lasts the full duration, fire a sword at the nearest enemy Hero, dealing 140 (+4% per level) damage.
imperius.20_2: Descending from the Heavens restores 30% of Imperius' maximum Health and Mana. Consuming a Valorous Brand reduces the cooldown of Wrath of the Angiris by 10 seconds.
imperius.20_3: Reduce the duration of Valorous Brand to 5 seconds, but it is no longer consumed when triggered.
imperius.20_4: Activate to become Unstoppable and gain 75 Spell Armor for 3 seconds. Hitting Heroes with the center of Solarion's Fire reduces this cooldown by 5 seconds.

jaina.1_1: Increase the range and travel speed of Frostbolt by 30%.
jaina.1_2: Increase the duration of Chill from 4 seconds to 6 seconds.
jaina.1_3: Quest: Gather Regeneration Globes to increase Jaina's Mana regeneration by 0.1 per second, up to 2 per second.  Reward: After gathering 20 Globes, the damage bonus from Frostbite is increased by 10%.
jaina.4_1: Frostbolt will now pierce the first two targets.
jaina.4_2: Dealing damage to a Chilled target returns Mana to Jaina. Basic Attacks return 5 Mana and Abilities return 20.  Passive: While above 75% Mana, Jaina gains 10% Spell Power.
jaina.4_3: Enemies that attack Jaina are Chilled. Additionally, every 10 seconds, Jaina gains 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%.
jaina.7_1: Hitting a Chilled target with Frostbolt reduces its cooldown by 1.5 seconds and restores 10 Mana.
jaina.7_2: Increase the width of Cone of Cold by 100% and cause each Hero hit to reduce its cooldown by 2 seconds, doubled against chilled Heroes, up to a maximum of 8 seconds per use.
jaina.7_3: Basic Attacks against Chilled enemies deal 50% more damage and lower the cooldown of Blizzard by 1.25 seconds.  Doubled against enemy Heroes.
jaina.10_1: After a 1.5 second delay, create a Ring of Frost in an area that deals 310 (+4% per level) damage and Roots enemies for 3 seconds. The ring persists for 3 seconds afterward, Chilling any enemies who touch it.
jaina.10_2: Summon a Water Elemental at target location. The Water Elemental's Basic Attacks deal 62 (+4% per level) damage, splash for 25% damage and Chill. The Ability can be reactivated to retarget the Water Elemental.  Lasts 20 seconds.
jaina.13_1: Increase the cast range of Blizzard by 75% and its radius by 30%.
jaina.13_2: Gain a Shield for 25% of Ability damage dealt to Chilled targets. The shield lasts 4 seconds.
jaina.13_3: Activate to make Jaina's Basic Abilities' cooldowns recharge 200% faster and reduce their Mana cost by 50% for 5 seconds.
jaina.16_1: The damage of the second wave of Blizzard is increased by 50%. The damage of the third wave is increased by 100%.
jaina.16_2: Enemies damaged by Cone of Cold have their Armor lowered by 25 for 2 seconds, increasing their damage taken by 25%.
jaina.16_3: Cone of Cold Roots Chilled targets for 1 second.
jaina.20_1: The center area of Ring of Frost deals 310 (+4% per level) damage and Roots enemies after the outer ring expires. Each enemy Hero hit reduces its cooldown by 15 seconds.
jaina.20_2: Increases the cast range of Water Elemental by 50%, and the Water Elemental will now mimic Jaina's Basic Abilities for 50% damage.
jaina.20_3: Activate to teleport a short distance and Chill all nearby enemies.
jaina.20_4: Frostbite's Chill can now stack a second time, slowing targets up to 40%.

johanna.1_1: Shield Glare gains 1 additional charge, and deals 75% more damage.
johanna.1_2: Basic Attacks grant 10 Physical Armor for 4 seconds, stacking up to 40.  Gambit: Gain 20% bonus maximum Health. Every death reduces this bonus by 5%.
johanna.1_3: Activate to heal 20% of Johanna's max Health over 5 seconds.  Quest: Every 10 Regeneration Globes gathered increases this heal amount by 5% of Johanna's max Health.
johanna.4_1: Hitting 2 or more Heroes at the same time with Punish increases the Slow to 80% and the Slow amount does not decay.  Quest: Hit 4 or more Heroes at the same time with Punish.  Reward: Punish always Slows by 80%.
johanna.4_2: Mark enemies hit by Condemn for 10 seconds. Johanna's next Basic Attack against them removes the mark, lowering the cooldown of Condemn by 1 second, refunding 10 Mana, and killing Minions.
johanna.4_3: Increases Iron Skin's Shield by 40% and its cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.
johanna.7_1: Punish reduces healing received by 35% for 3 seconds. Basic Attacks against them refresh this duration.
johanna.7_2: Gain 10% Movement Speed, increased to 20% while Condemn is charging up.
johanna.7_3: Activate to instantly Mount for 3 seconds, unhindered by damage.  Passive: Increase the duration of Iron Skin by 2 second.
johanna.10_1: Johanna leaps into the air for 2 seconds and she can steer the landing location by moving. While in the air, allies below Johanna are Unstoppable. Upon landing enemies hit take 225 (+4% per level) damage and are Stunned for 0.25 seconds.
johanna.10_2: Deal 114 (+4% per level) damage and Stun the first enemy hit for 1.5 seconds. Blessed Shield then bounces to 2 nearby enemies, dealing 57 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.
johanna.13_1: Increase Punish's damage by 50%. This bonus is increased to 150% whenever Punish hits 2 or more Heroes.
johanna.13_2: Deal 15 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Each Hero hit by Condemn increases this damage by 40% for 5 seconds.
johanna.13_3: Activate to create 2 hammers that spiral outward from Johanna, dealing 74 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit. Damaging enemies with Basic Abilities reduce the cooldown of this Ability by 2 seconds.  Passive: Every 3rd Basic Attack against enemy Heroes releases a hammer.
johanna.16_1: Condemn reduces enemy Heroes damage by 25% and Slows by 25% for 2 seconds.
johanna.16_2: Hitting enemy Heroes with Shield Glare reduce its cooldown by 1.5 seconds and heals for 5% of Johanna's maximum Health.
johanna.16_3: Basic Attacks grant 10% increased Attack Speed for 4 seconds, stacking up to 40%. They also reduce Johanna's Basic Ability cooldowns by 0.5 seconds.
johanna.20_1: Falling Sword rains down holy bolts, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage to enemies, healing allied Heroes for 68 (+4% per level), and reducing its cooldown by 1 second for each Hero hit.
johanna.20_2: Increase the number of enemies hit by Blessed Shield by 2. Its Stun duration is increased to 1.75 seconds and all targets hit are Stunned for the maximum duration.
johanna.20_3: Upon taking fatal damage, Johanna gains a Shield equal to her maximum Health for 4 seconds. This effect has a 120 second cooldown.
johanna.20_4: Activate to grant nearby allied Heroes a Shield equal to 25% of their maximum Health for 3 seconds.  Hitting Heroes with Shield Glare reduces the cooldown of this Ability by 8 seconds.

junkrat.1_1: While Frag Launcher has no charges left, Junkrat gains 10% Movement Speed and his Basic Attacks deal 15% bonus damage.
junkrat.1_2: The final grenade launched from Frag Launcher deals 120% bonus damage, and Frag Launcher grenades last an additional 2 seconds before automatically detonating.
junkrat.1_3: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine or Steel Trap causes Junkrat to deal 25% more damage with Basic Attacks and Basic Abilities for 6 seconds.
junkrat.4_1: Quest: Hitting a Hero with Frag Launcher increases its damage by 0.2%, up to 40%.
junkrat.4_2: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine reduces its cooldown by 10 seconds.
junkrat.4_3: Steel Traps will slowly chase nearby enemy Heroes.
junkrat.7_1: Enemies launched by Concussion Mine are Slowed by 40% for 2.5 seconds upon landing.
junkrat.7_2: Enemy Heroes who are hit by Steel Trap are Silenced for 2 seconds.
junkrat.7_3: Increase the explosion radius of Total Mayhem by 20%.  When Junkrat is Stunned, Rooted, or damaged by an enemy Hero while below 50% Health, he uses Total Mayhem, dropping 5 grenades at his feet that explode.   This effect has a 12 second cooldown.
junkrat.10_1: Create a motorized bomb with 530 (+4% per level) Health that lasts 15 seconds. While active, Junkrat is immobile but gains control of RIP-Tire's movement.  RIP-Tire can be reactivated to detonate immediately, knocking nearby enemies back and dealing 720 (+4% per level) damage to enemies near the center gradually reduced to 445 (+4% per level) to enemies on the edge.
junkrat.10_2: After 1.25 seconds, Junkrat launches into the air. While in the air, he can steer the landing location by moving.  After 3.75 seconds, Junkrat lands, dealing 935 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies and activating Total Mayhem. 5 seconds after landing, Junkrat reappears at the Hall of Storms and gains 150% additional Movement Speed until dismounted.
junkrat.13_1: Increase Junkrat's Basic Attack range by 1.  Frag Launcher grenades fired within 0.5 seconds of using a Basic Attack deal 30% bonus damage.
junkrat.13_2: Junkrat is knocked back 50% farther by Concussion Mine. Additionally, Concussion Mine's cooldown is reduced by 12 seconds if only Junkrat is hit.
junkrat.13_3: Reduce Steel Trap's cooldown by 5 seconds and increase the maximum number of active traps to 2.
junkrat.13_4: Steel Trap now only hits Heroes, and Heroes hit have their Armor reduced by 15 for 3 seconds. Increases Steel Trap's radius and damage by 50%.
junkrat.16_1: Frag Launcher fires all of its charges in a continuous burst, its cooldown is reduced by 6 seconds, but it loses 1 maximum charge.
junkrat.16_2: Hitting an enemy Hero with Frag Launcher reduces its cooldown by 1.5 seconds.
junkrat.16_3: Activate to make Frag Launcher fire 2 additional grenades in a spread. Works for up to 4 total charges, or until Frag Launcher runs out of charges.
junkrat.20_1: Increase RIP-Tire's knockback distance by 50%, and its cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds for each enemy Hero hit.
junkrat.20_2: Junkrat also gains the Ability RIP-Tire. Each time he uses his Heroic, it swaps to the alternate ability.  Passive: Reduce both Heroic cooldowns by 20 seconds.
junkrat.20_3: Increase the radius and explosion radius of grenades from Basic Attacks and Frag Launcher by 50%.
junkrat.20_4: Junkrat always rides his Rocket Ride Mount, which grants 150% increased Movement Speed, but his Mount cooldown is increased to 8 seconds.

kaelthas.1_1: Quest: Damaging an enemy Hero with Flamestrike increase its damage by 5, up to 100. This bonus is lost on death.  Reward: After hitting 20 enemy Heroes, increase Flamestrike damage by an additional 100 and no longer lose any bonuses on death.
kaelthas.1_2: Increases Kael'thas's Spell Power by 4%. Kael'thas heals for 94 (+4% per level) Health when activating Verdant Spheres.
kaelthas.1_3: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Kael'thas's maximum Mana by 15.  Reward: After gathering 20 Globes, Kael'thas can activate Arcane Barrier to gain a Shield equal to 100% of his maximum Mana for 4 seconds. 45 second cooldown.
kaelthas.4_1: Increases Gravity Lapse's range by 30%. When Gravity Lapse hits an enemy Hero, refund 80 Mana.
kaelthas.4_2: Reduce the Mana cost of Gravity Lapse by 70.  If Gravity Lapse hits a Hero, reduce its cooldown by 8 seconds.
kaelthas.4_3: Activating Verdant Spheres restores 5% of Kael'thas's maximum Mana.
kaelthas.7_1: When Flamestrike damages 2 or more Heroes, they take additional damage equal to 8% of their maximum Health.
kaelthas.7_2: Living Bombs that spread to enemy Heroes deal 35% more damage.
kaelthas.7_3: Activating Verdant Spheres causes Kael'thas's next 2 Basic Attacks to instead deal 115 (+4% per level) Spell Damage.  If both of these Attacks hit enemy Heroes, gain 15% Spell Power for 10 seconds.
kaelthas.10_1: Launch a Phoenix to an area, dealing 84 (+4% per level) damage to enemies along the way. The Phoenix persists for 7 seconds, attacking enemies for 84 (+4% per level) damage and splashing for 42 (+4% per level) damage.
kaelthas.10_2: After 1.5 seconds, cast a slow-moving fireball that deals 810 (+5% per level) damage to an enemy Hero and 405 (+5% per level) damage to enemies nearby.
kaelthas.13_1: Each time Living Bomb deals periodic damage, Kael'thas's Basic Ability cooldowns are reduced by 0.5 seconds.
kaelthas.13_2: Living Bomb's explosion slows enemy Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds.
kaelthas.13_3: Increases Living Bomb's explosion radius by 20%.
kaelthas.16_1: Flamestrike will explode a second time 1.5 seconds later.
kaelthas.16_2: Flamestrikes apply Living Bomb to the enemy Hero closest to its center who is not currently affected by Living Bomb.
kaelthas.16_3: Verdant Spheres gains a second charge.  Passive: Kael'thas benefits from all of his level 7 talents.
kaelthas.20_1: Increases Phoenix duration by 100%. While alive, the Phoenix may be ordered to move to a different location.
kaelthas.20_2: Increases Pyroblast's explosion radius by 50%. Heroes that are hit by Flamestrike or have Living Bomb spread to them reduce the cooldown of Pyroblast by 10 seconds.
kaelthas.20_3: Living Bomb's spread from explosions can now also spread Living Bomb.
kaelthas.20_4: Increases the cast range of Flamestrike by 40%. If Flamestrike hits 2 or more Heroes, its cooldown is reduced by 4 seconds.

kelthuzad.1_1: Increase Death and Decay's duration by 1 second. After gaining 30 Blight, increase the radius of Death and Decay's pool by 30%.
kelthuzad.1_2: Frost Nova deals 75% more damage to enemies in the center. After gaining 30 Blight, increase Frost Nova's Root duration by 0.5 seconds.
kelthuzad.1_3: Increase Chains of Kel'Thuzad damage by 125%. After gaining 30 Blight, Chains of Kel'Thuzad reduces the Armor of pulled Heroes by 10 for 4 seconds.
kelthuzad.4_1: Pulling a Hero with Chains of Kel'Thuzad grants Kel'Thuzad a permanent 128 (+4% per level) Shield, stacking up to 2 times.  Additionally, Chains of Kel'Thuzad deals up to 270 (+2.5% per level) bonus damage to Heroes' Shields.
kelthuzad.4_2: Quest: Collect 12 Regeneration Globes to charge Kel'Thuzad's Phylactery.  Reward: Kel'Thuzad's Phylactery can be activated while dead to immediately respawn at the Hall of Storms, but must be charged again.  Passive: Kel'Thuzad heals for 10% of all Spell Damage dealt while the Phylactery is charged.
kelthuzad.4_3: Activate to gain 50 Physical Armor for 4 seconds. Upon activation, nearby enemies take 45 (+4% per level) damage and are Slowed by 35% for 4 seconds.
kelthuzad.7_1: Each time a Hero is hit by Death and Decay's pool, they take 25% more periodic damage from Death and Decay for the next 4 seconds, stacking up to 4 times.
kelthuzad.7_2: Every 8 seconds, Kel'Thuzad's next Basic Attack hits all enemies in the area for 80%  additional damage, deals Spell damage instead of Physical, and Slows by 30% for 2 seconds.
kelthuzad.7_3: Reduce the cooldown of Glacial Spike by 10 seconds and increase its damage by 400%.
kelthuzad.10_1: Launch a meteor of ice at an enemy Hero. Upon impact, the meteor deals 115 (+2.5% per level) damage to its target and 275 (+2.5% per level) damage to enemies in the area. All enemies hit by Frost Blast are Rooted for 2 seconds.
kelthuzad.10_2: Create a fissure anywhere on the Battleground that explodes after 1.5 seconds, dealing 320 (+2.5% per level) damage to enemy Heroes in its area. If an enemy Hero is hit, set its cooldown to 1.5 seconds.
kelthuzad.13_1: Increase Frost Nova's Slow by 20%. Each time Kel'Thuzad damages enemies Slowed by Frost Nova, reduce the cooldown of Frost Nova by 0.75 seconds.
kelthuzad.13_2: After Chains of Kel'Thuzad's Stun expires, the enemy is also Slowed by 60% for 1 second.
kelthuzad.13_3: Pulling a Hero with Chains of Kel'Thuzad reduces its cooldown by 5 seconds and refunds its Mana cost.
kelthuzad.16_1: Whenever Kel'Thuzad hits an enemy Hero with Death and Decay's explosion, its cooldown is reduced by 1.5 seconds.
kelthuzad.16_2: Enemies that are Rooted take an additional 55 (+2.5% per level) damage each time they are damaged by Kel'Thuzad.
kelthuzad.16_3: Stunning, Rooting, or Slowing a Hero grants 6% Spell Power for 10 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.
kelthuzad.20_1: When Frost Blast's Root expires, enemies are Slowed by 40% for 3 seconds. Heroes killed while under the effects of Frost Blast instantly release another Frost Blast explosion.
kelthuzad.20_2: If a Hero is hit with Shadow Fissure, a second one is cast below them 1 second later.  This second cast will not duplicate itself.
kelthuzad.20_3: Activate to dash forward, dealing 150 (+2.5% per level) damage to enemies in the path. Takedowns reset the cooldown of Shifting Malice.
kelthuzad.20_4: Activate to create a Shade of Naxxramas that lasts 15 seconds and mimics Kel'Thuzad's casts of Death and Decay.

kerrigan.1_1: Hitting an enemy Hero with Ravage grants 100 (+4% per level) points of Assimilation Shields.
kerrigan.1_2: Regeneration Globe healing grants 50 (+4% per level) points of Assimilation Shields per second while active. While Assimilation is active, Kerrigan's Health and Mana regeneration is increased by 150%.
kerrigan.1_3: Gain 10% more Assimilation Shields from Basic Attacks. After casting Ravage, Kerrigan's next Basic Attack within 3 seconds splashes for 100% damage around the target.
kerrigan.4_1: Quest: Minions and Heroes that die within 1.5 seconds of being hit by Ravage increase its damage up to a maximum of 75.  Minions grant 1 increased damage and Heroes grant 5 increased damage.  Reward: After reaching a 75 damage increase, Ravage gains 50 additional damage.
kerrigan.4_2: Damaging an enemy increases the damage of Kerrigan's next Impaling Blades within 10 seconds by 10%, up to 100%.
kerrigan.4_3: Primal Grasp explodes a second time 2 seconds after its first explosion.
kerrigan.7_1: Reduce the cooldown of Ravage by 3 seconds and increase its damage to Minions and Mercenaries by 100%.
kerrigan.7_2: Hitting an enemy Hero with Ravage grants a charge of Ravage. Can only occur once every 10 seconds per Hero.
kerrigan.7_3: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Kerrigan's Basic Abilities by 0.6 seconds.
kerrigan.10_1: Deals 74 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Lasts for 7 seconds.
kerrigan.10_2: After 0.5 seconds, summon an Ultralisk that rushes forward upon spawning, dealing 250 (+4% per level) damage to the first enemy Hero hit and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.  The Ultralisk's Basic Attacks deal 50% of their damage in an area around their target. Reactivate to retarget the Ultralisk.
kerrigan.13_1: Each enemy Hero hit by Primal Grasp grants 20 Spell Armor and 4% Movement Speed for 4 seconds, stacking up to 20% Movement Speed.
kerrigan.13_2: Increase the amount of Assimilation Shields granted from damage dealt by 10%, but reduce duration of Assimilation by 3 seconds.
kerrigan.13_3: Activate to place Kerrigan in a Chrysalis with 750 (+4% per level) Health for 5 seconds. While inside, Kerrigan regenerates 5% of her maximum Health per second.  Enemies can destroy the Chrysalis to end its effects early.
kerrigan.16_1: Ravage grants 5% Spell Power for 5 seconds, up to 40%.
kerrigan.16_2: Enemies hit by Impaling Blades take an additional 70 (+4% per level) damage the next 6 times Kerrigan damages them within 5 seconds.
kerrigan.16_3: Damaging a Hero with a Heroic Ability grants 35% Spell Power for 4 seconds.
kerrigan.20_1: Maelstrom's duration is increased by 0.25 seconds every time it damages a Hero.
kerrigan.20_2: Increase the Health and Basic Attack damage of the Ultralisk by 20%.  The Ultralisk morphs into an egg when it dies. If the egg isn't killed within 4 seconds, a new Ultralisk is born.
kerrigan.20_3: Damaging an enemy increases Basic Attack damage by 2% for 5 seconds, up to 40%.
kerrigan.20_4: Activate to teleport to a nearby location, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. Generates 300% increased Assimilation Shields from the damage dealt.

kharazim.1_1: Every 3rd Basic Attack heals the lowest nearby allied Hero for 104 (+4% per level) and gives 25% increased Move Speed for 2.5 seconds.
kharazim.1_2: Every 3rd Basic Attack deals 110% bonus damage and gives 25% increased Move Speed for 2.5 seconds.
kharazim.1_3: Quest: Every 3rd Basic Attack restores 14 (+4% per level) Mana, grants a stack of Insight, and gives 25% increased Movement Speed for 2.5 seconds.  Reward: Upon getting 100 stacks of Insight, every 3rd attack also reduces Basic Ability cooldowns by 1.75 seconds.
kharazim.4_1: Place a Spirit Ally that heals allied Heroes in a large area around it for 2% of their maximum Health every second. Has 150 (+4% per level) Health and lasts 10 seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Spirit Allies.
kharazim.4_2: Place an Earth Ally that grants nearby allied Heroes 50 Physical Armor against Heroic Basic Attacks, reducing damage taken by 50%. Has 400 (+4% per level) Health and lasts 10 seconds.  Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Earth Allies.
kharazim.4_3: Place an Air Ally that gives allied Heroes 15% Spell Power, grants vision, and reveals a large area around it. Has 200 (+4% per level) Health and lasts 10 seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Air Allies.
kharazim.7_1: Decreases Radiant Dash's cooldown by 2 seconds and increases the maximum number of charges by 1.
kharazim.7_2: Increases Breath of Heaven's Movement Speed bonus to 30%.  Radiant Dashing to an ally increases the healing they receive from Breath of Heaven by 50% for 3.5 seconds.
kharazim.7_3: Increase the duration of Deadly Reach by 100%.  Every 3rd Basic Attack reduces the cooldown of Deadly Reach by 0.75 seconds.
kharazim.10_1: Protect an allied Hero from death, causing them to be healed for 1200 (+4% per level) if they take fatal damage in the next 3 seconds.
kharazim.10_2: Become Invulnerable and strike 7 times over 2 seconds. Each strike hits the highest Health nearby Hero for 7% of their maximum Health.
kharazim.13_1: Radiant Dashing to an ally gives Kharazim and the target 30% bonus Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
kharazim.13_2: Every 30 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 50%.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
kharazim.13_3: While Stunned or Rooted, gain 75 Physical Armor against Hero Basic Attacks for 4 seconds, reducing their damage by 75%.
kharazim.16_1: Radiant Dashing to an ally makes them Unstoppable for 1 second.
kharazim.16_2: Radiant Dashing to an enemy launches a rapid volley of 6 Basic Attacks dealing 45% damage each.
kharazim.16_3: Breath of Heaven heals 75% of its normal amount, but heals a second time 3 seconds later.
kharazim.20_1: Divine Palm's healing amount is increased by 75% and its cooldown is set to 5 seconds if the Hero does not die.
kharazim.20_3: Gain 50% of the benefit from both level 1  talents that were not chosen.
kharazim.20_4: Activate to give all nearby allied Heroes a Shield for 20% of their max Health for 3 seconds.
kharazim.20_5: Activate to restore 33% of Kharazim's maximum Mana and refill 2 charges of Radiant Dash.

leoric.1_1: Skeletal Swing's cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit heal Leoric for 4% of his maximum Health.
leoric.1_2: When a nearby friendly or enemy Minion dies, Leoric restores 1.25% of his maximum Health and 6 Mana.
leoric.1_3: Activate to heal Leoric for 30% of his maximum Health over 5 seconds. Regeneration Globes lower the cooldown of this Ability by 20 seconds.
leoric.4_1: Increase the range of Skeletal Swing by 25%.
leoric.4_2: Increase the Slow of Skeletal Swing by 20%.
leoric.4_3: Skeletal Swing deals 75% additional damage to Mercenaries and Monsters, and hitting them activates Skeletal Swing's cost and cooldown refund.
leoric.7_1: Increase the healing from Drain Hope to 25% of Leoric's maximum Health. If Drain Hope lasts its full duration, Leoric instantly heals for an additional 5% of his maximum Health.
leoric.7_2: Drain Hope no longer reduces Leoric's Movement Speed. If Drain Hope lasts its full duration, gain 30% Movement Speed for 4 seconds.
leoric.7_3: Increase the range of Drain Hope by 25%.
leoric.10_1: Create an unpassable tomb for 4 seconds.
leoric.10_2: Leoric becomes Unstoppable and walks forward, swinging his mace 3 times. Enemies hit take 250 (+4% per level) damage, and Heroes hit heal Leoric for 12% of his maximum Health.
leoric.13_1: Drain Hope's cooldown is reduced by 0.75 seconds for every 1 second it is active. If Drain Hope lasts its full duration, its cooldown is reduced by an additional 2 seconds.
leoric.13_2: Increase Wraith Walk's duration by 100%. Enemy Heroes that come in contact with the wraith deal 50% less damage for 4 seconds.
leoric.13_3: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 2.5% of the Hero's maximum Health and heal Leoric for twice that amount.
leoric.16_1: If Drain Hope lasts its full duration, it instantly deals an additional 15% of the target's maximum Health as damage. This damage does not heal Leoric.
leoric.16_2: Wraith Walk increases the damage of the next Skeletal Swing within 5 seconds by 50%. Each enemy Hero hit by this Skeletal Swing reduces the cooldown of Wraith Walk by 7 seconds.
leoric.16_3: Increase Leoric's Attack Speed by 20%.  Repeatable Quest: Nearby enemy Minion deaths grant 0.3% permanent Attack Speed, and Takedowns grant 3% permanent Attack Speed, up to 30%.
leoric.20_1: The duration of Entomb is lowered by 1 second, but enemies trapped inside are Silenced and take 50 (+4% per level) damage every 1 second.
leoric.20_2: The final swing of March of the Black King also applies Drain Hope to nearby enemy Heroes.
leoric.20_3: Deal 40 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies.  While Drain Hope is active, gain 40 Armor and the damage and area is increased by 100%.
leoric.20_4: Activate to become Protected for 3 seconds, preventing all damage.

li-li.1_1: Healing Brew's cooldown is reduced by 1 second and its Mana cost is refunded if it heals a Hero under 50% Health.
li-li.1_2: Cloud Serpent no longer costs Mana and while Fast Feet is active its cooldown refreshes an additional 75% faster.
li-li.1_3: Increase Fast Feet's duration by 150% and increase Mana regeneration by 150% while Fast Feet is active.
li-li.4_1: Cloud Serpent grants its bearer 10% increased Movement Speed. Casting Blinding Wind increases this bonus to 20% for 3 seconds.  Passive: Cloud Serpent attacks 25% faster.
li-li.4_2: If Blinding Wind hits 2 Heroes, its cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds and Li Li gains 10% Spell Power for 10 seconds.
li-li.4_3: Activate to gain Fast Feet, 30 Armor, and 30% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.  Passive: While Fast Feet is active, Li Li gains 10 Armor.
li-li.7_1: Healing Brew heals for an additional 42 (+4% per level) over 3 seconds. While Fast Feet is active, this heal amount is increased by 100%.
li-li.7_2: Increase the number of enemies hit by Blinding Wind from 2 to 3. Blinding Wind deals 75% additional damage if all 3 enemies hit are Heroes.
li-li.7_3: Activate to heal an allied Hero for 160 (+4% per level) and make them Unstoppable for 1 second. Let's Go's cooldown is affected by Fast Feet.  Cannot be used on Li Li.
li-li.10_1: Channel for up to 6 seconds. Every 0.25 seconds, increase the cooldown of Jug of 1,000 Cups by 2 seconds, up to 50 additional seconds, and heal the lowest Health nearby allied Hero for 66 (+4% per level) Health.
li-li.10_2: Li Li channels for 2 seconds, summoning a Water Dragon that hits the nearest enemy Hero within 12 range and all enemies near them, dealing 300 (+4% per level) damage and slowing their Movement Speed by 70% for 4 seconds.
li-li.13_1: Cloud Serpent attacks bounce to hit 2 additional targets for 13 (+4% per level) damage and 10 (+4% per level) healing.
li-li.13_2: Increase Blinding Wind's Blind duration by 0.75 seconds. Li Li's Basic Attacks against Blinded Heroes deal 100% increased damage.
li-li.13_3: Increase Blinding Wind's Slow amount to 30% and its duration to 2 seconds.
li-li.16_1: Increases the number of allies healed by Healing Brew to 2, but increases the cooldown by 1 second.
li-li.16_2: Healing Brew's healing for Heroes is increased by 33% if they are under 50% Health.
li-li.16_3: Cloud Serpent grants its bearer 10% increased healing received and heals them for an additional 0.5% of their maximum Health each time it attacks.
li-li.20_1: Jug of 1,000 Cups heals two allies at a time.
li-li.20_2: After hitting a target with Water Dragon, another Water Dragon is summoned at the point of impact.
li-li.20_3: Activate to heal nearby allied Heroes for 149 (+4% per level). Basic Attacks and Cloud Serpent attacks reduce the cooldown of Mistweaver by 1 second.
li-li.20_4: Gain 35 Armor while Stunned, Silenced, or Rooted.  Passive: Increase Fast Feet's cooldown refresh rate to 75%

li-ming.1_1: When Magic Missiles damages an enemy Hero, gain 50 Spell Armor, reducing the damage taken by the next Ability by 50%. Gain 1 charge per cast and store up to 4 charges.  Passive: Li-Ming's Mana regeneration is increased by 100% while below 35% Mana.
li-ming.1_2: Teleport costs no Mana.  If Li-Ming hasn't taken damage in the last 3 seconds, Teleport's cooldown is decreased by 2 seconds.  Casting Teleport causes Li-Ming's next cast of Magic Missiles to deal 10% bonus damage.
li-ming.1_3: Regeneration Globes restore 100% more Mana and grant 10% Spell Power for 20 seconds.
li-ming.4_1: Basic Attacking a target recently hit by a Magic Missile does an extra 87 (+4% per level) damage.
li-ming.4_2: If Arcane Orb hits an enemy Hero after traveling at least 50% of its base range, the cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds and 40 Mana is refunded.
li-ming.4_3: Takedowns restore 30% of Li-Ming's missing Health.
li-ming.7_1: If three Magic Missiles hit the same target, the third one deals an additional 140 (+4% per level) damage.
li-ming.7_2: Increase Arcane Orb's damage increase for distance traveled by 30%. Additionally, reduce its cooldown by 1 second.
li-ming.7_3: Teleport does 300 (+3% per level) damage to enemy Heroes near the destination.
li-ming.10_1: Channel a powerful beam, dealing 480 (+5% per level) damage over 2.6 seconds to enemies while they are in it. The direction of the beam changes with your mouse cursor position.
li-ming.10_2: Knock away all enemies from an area and deal 160 (+5% per level) damage.
li-ming.13_1: If Li-Ming loses more than 20% of her Health at once, its cooldown is instantly refreshed.  This effect has a 4 second cooldown.  Passive: Increases Teleport range by 50%
li-ming.13_2: When Li-Ming uses an Ability, her next Basic Attack's damage is increased by 75% and deals Spell damage instead of Physical.  Stacks up to 3 times.
li-ming.13_3: Increase Li-Ming's Spell Power by 20%, but decrease her maximum Health by 15%.
li-ming.16_1: Drastically increases Magic Missiles speed. Its cooldown is reduced by 1 second, and its Mana cost is reduced by 5.
li-ming.16_2: Magic Missiles fires an additional 2 missiles, but its Mana cost is increased by 5.
li-ming.16_3: Arcane Orb travels 25% farther, increasing its maximum distance damage bonus from 270 (+3% per level) to 371 (+3% per level).
li-ming.16_4: Teleport grants a Shield equal to 25% of Li-Ming's maximum Health for 4 seconds.
li-ming.20_1: Disintegrate gradually slows enemies caught in its beam, to a maximum of 60%.
li-ming.20_2: Increases Wave of Force knockback distance by 150% and increases its cast range by 100%.
li-ming.20_3: Casting Abilities increases the damage of the next Ability by 5%, up to 20%.  This bonus is reset when the same Ability is used within a chain.
li-ming.20_4: Activate to enter Archon form, allowing Li-Ming to repeatedly use Disintegrate, but be unable to cast other Abilities.

lt-morales.1_1: Increases Attack Range by 1.1 and Basic Attacks against Heroes generate 4 Energy.
lt-morales.1_2: During the first 2 seconds of Energy regeneration, Healing Beam regenerates 100% more Energy.  Passive: Increase your maximum Energy by 10.
lt-morales.1_3: Quest: Each enemy Hero hit with Displacement Grenade restores 3 Energy.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, reduce the cooldown of Displacement Grenade from 12 seconds to 9 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, increase the detonation area of Displacement Grenade by 25%.
lt-morales.4_1: Consume 30 Energy to heal Lt. Morales for 30% of her maximum Health over 3 seconds. Caduceus Reactor is disabled while this is active.  Passive: Generate 2 Energy each time Safeguard reduces damage, up to a maximum of 10 Energy per use.
lt-morales.4_2: Taking damage while below 40% Health grants 40 Armor for 3 seconds. This effect has a 30 second cooldown.  Passive: Increase the healing provided by Caduceus Reactor from 2% to 4% of Lt. Morales's maximum Health per second.
lt-morales.4_3: Enemy Heroes hit by Displacement Grenade are Slowed by 50% for 1 second after being knocked away and grant Lt. Morales a Shield equal to 6% of her maximum Health. This shield stacks up to 5 times.
lt-morales.7_1: Safeguard removes all Slows from its target and its cooldown is reduced by 3 seconds.
lt-morales.7_2: While an ally affected by Safeguard is Stunned or Rooted, Safeguard grants an additional 20 Armor.  Passive: Increase the duration of Safeguard by 1 second.
lt-morales.7_3: Allies with Safeguard receive 75% of the healing done by Healing Beam on another ally.
lt-morales.10_1: Grant an allied Hero 75% Attack Speed and 25% Movement Speed for 10 seconds.
lt-morales.10_2: Unlock the Medivac Dropship and Reinforcements abilities. These abilities share a cooldown.  Medivac Dropship Target a location for a Medivac transport. For up to 10 seconds before takeoff, allies can right-click to enter the Medivac.  Reinforcements Call down a Medivac Dropship at your Hall of Storms for your allies. After 10 seconds, or when the Ability is activated again, the Medivac will travel to the original cast location to unload its passengers.
lt-morales.13_1: Displacement Grenade deals an additional 96 (+4% per level) damage over 2 seconds, and up to 400 (+4% per level) bonus damage to Shields.
lt-morales.13_2: Heroes hit by Displacement Grenade deal 30% less damage for 3 seconds.
lt-morales.13_3: Heroes hit by Displacement Grenade will take an additional 6% of maximum Health as damage from Lt. Morales's next Basic Attack against them.  Passive: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal an additional 1% of maximum Health as damage.
lt-morales.16_1: Channeling Healing Beam on a Hero for at least 3 seconds causes them to be healed for 258 (+4% per level) over 3 seconds when Healing Beam ends.  Passive: Increase the range of Healing Beam by 30%.
lt-morales.16_2: While above 60 Energy, Healing Beam's healing is increased by 20% and both Lt. Morales and her Healing Beam target gain 15% Movement Speed.
lt-morales.16_3: Safeguard gains a second charge and its range is increased by 60%.
lt-morales.20_1: Reduce the cooldown of Stim Drone from 70 seconds to 35 seconds, and increase the Movement Speed bonus from 25% to 50%.
lt-morales.20_2: After exiting the Medivac, allies are Protected from all damage for 3 seconds.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Medivac Dropship abilities by 15 seconds.
lt-morales.20_3: Safeguard grants its target Unkillable for 1 second. If the target is under 50% maximum Health when the Unkillable effect ends, they are healed for 8% of their maximum Health.
lt-morales.20_4: Hitting 2 or more Heroes with Displacement Grenade reduces its cooldown to 2 seconds.

lunara.1_1: After remaining in a bush for 5 seconds, Wisp's vision radius is increased by 200% and reveals the surrounding area.
lunara.1_2: Nature's Toxin reveals enemies for its duration.
lunara.1_3: After not Basic Attacking or taking damage for 2 seconds, increase the Move Speed bonus of Dryad's Swiftness by 10%.
lunara.4_1: Increases Noxious Blossom's range by 25% and its radius by 20%.  Blossom Swell applies 2 stacks of Nature's Toxin to enemies hit.
lunara.4_2: Increases Nature's Toxin's damage by 125% to non-Heroes.
lunara.4_3: While at least one enemy is afflicted by Nature's Toxin, heal for 9 (+4% per level) per second.  When an enemy Hero has 3 stacks of Nature's Toxin, increase this healing by 19 (+4% per level) per second.
lunara.7_1: Using Noxious Blossom causes Lunara's next Basic Attack to hit up to 4 enemies. These extra attacks can apply Nature's Toxin.
lunara.7_2: Noxious Blossom deals 100% more damage to enemies afflicted by Nature's Toxin, increased to 175% against enemies with 3 stacks.
lunara.7_3: Using Crippling Spores increases the damage of Lunara's next 4 Basic Attacks by 70%.
lunara.10_1: Send forth vines that deal 184 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies in a line.  Stores up to 3 charges.
lunara.10_2: Leap over an enemy, Slowing them by 80% for 0.35 seconds and dealing 271 (+4% per level) damage.  Stores up to 2 charges.
lunara.13_1: Casting Crippling Spores while at least 2 Heroes are afflicted by Nature's Toxin reduces the cooldown by 4 seconds.
lunara.13_2: Increases Crippling Spores' Slow duration by 1 second and causes it to no longer decay.
lunara.13_3: Every 30 seconds, gain 75 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
lunara.13_4: Target an ally to remove all damage over time and disabling effects from them and Lunara. For 2 seconds after, the duration of disabling effects is reduced by 50%.
lunara.16_1: Reduce the Mana cost of Noxious Blossom from 60 to 40.  While at least 1 enemy Hero is afflicted with Nature's Toxin, Noxious Blossom's cooldown recharges 75% faster.
lunara.16_2: Increase Lunara's Basic Attack range by 0.5.  Using Crippling Spores increases Lunara's Basic Attack range by an additional 2.25 for 6 seconds.
lunara.16_3: Crippling Spores grants 30% Attack Speed for 6 seconds.  Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes with 3 stacks of Nature's Toxin deal damage equal to 1.5% of their maximum Health.
lunara.16_4: Nature's Toxin deals 60% more damage to Heroes that are Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned.
lunara.20_1: Thornwood Vine now applies 2 stacks of Nature's Toxin.  Increase Thornwood Vine's range by 30% and Lunara's vision radius by 35%.
lunara.20_2: All Leaping Strike charges are returned every 15 seconds. Leaping Strike can be used on allies.
lunara.20_3: At 3 stacks, Nature's Toxin deals 40% more damage.
lunara.20_4: Activate to increase the Movement Speed bonus of Dryad's Swiftness to 80% for 6 seconds.

lúcio.1_1: Quest: Play Lúcio's Crossfade tracks to nearby allies. Multiple allies provide additional time.  Reward: For every 1 Minute played, permanently increase Lucio's maximum Mana by 10.  Reward: Once you have played for 8 minutes or more, permanently increase Crossfade's range by 20%.
lúcio.1_2: Wall Ride's Movement Speed bonus gradually increases to 40% over 4 seconds while Lúcio maintains its effect.
lúcio.1_3: While Wall Ride is active, Basic Attacks heal for 30% of the damage dealt and restore 0.5 Mana.  Passive: Increase Wall Ride duration by 1 second.
lúcio.4_1: Enemies within the first half of Soundwave's range are knocked back 75% further.  Quest: Hit 3 enemy Heroes with a single Soundwave.  Reward: Increase Soundwave's arc by 50% and its range by 20%.
lúcio.4_2: Hitting an enemy with Soundwave while Wall Ride is active reduces its cooldown by 3 seconds.
lúcio.4_3: While Wall Ride is active, Push Off's cooldown recharges 100% faster.
lúcio.7_1: Hitting an enemy with Soundwave grants Lúcio a 38 (+4% per level) Shield for 7 seconds. Hitting enemy Heroes grants 3 times this amount.
lúcio.7_2: Blast Lúcio's active Crossfade track at enemy Heroes. While Amp It Up is active, Healing Boost deals 50 (+4% per level) damage per second and Speed Boost Slows by 20%.  This ability is unaffected by Crossfade talents.
lúcio.7_3: Place a boombox that plays Lúcio's active Crossfade track. Its volume adjusts with Amp It Up. Allied Heroes near the boombox gain 5 Armor.  Crossfade tracks do not stack.
lúcio.10_1: After 1 second, Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes gain a 1296 (+4% per level) point Shield that rapidly decays over 6 seconds.
lúcio.10_2: Quickly skate to an allied Hero. Upon arrival the ally is healed for 230 (+4% per level), Lúcio is healed for 80 (+4% per level), and both gain Unstoppable for 1 second.
lúcio.13_1: For each ally affected by Crossfade, Lúcio gains 5% Movement Speed that stacks with other bonuses.
lúcio.13_2: Push Off no longer Slows enemies, and instead Stuns them for 0.5 seconds.
lúcio.13_3: While Wall Ride is active, passing near an enemy Hero increases its Movement Speed bonus to 40%, and grants 15 Armor, for 1 second.
lúcio.16_1: While Amp It Up is active, Crossfade's Healing Boost heals for an additional 2.5% of the target's maximum Health each second.
lúcio.16_2: Hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Amp It Up by 0.4 seconds.  Passive: Wall Ride increases Basic Attack range by 2.2.
lúcio.16_3: Increase the duration of Amp It Up by 1 second. While Amp It Up is active, enemy Heroes hit by Soundwave or Push-Off further increase its duration by 0.3 seconds.
lúcio.20_1: Reduce the cooldown of Sound Barrier to 30 seconds, but the Shield now decays over 4 seconds.
lúcio.20_2: High Five can now be cast on enemy Heroes, dealing 160 (+4% per level) damage and reducing all healing received by 50% for 3 seconds.  Passive: Reduce the cost and cooldown of High Five by 30%.
lúcio.20_3: For each ally affected by Crossfade, Lúcio gains 8% increased healing.
lúcio.20_4: Activate for allies affected by Crossfade to become Unkillable for 1.5 seconds.

maiev.1_1: Quest: Each tether applied to a secondary target of Umbral Bind permanently increases Umbral Bind's pull damage by 15.  Reward: After applying 5 tethers to secondary targets, increase Umbral Bind's pull damage by 75.  Reward: After applying 10 tethers to secondary targets, increase Umbral Bind's cleave damage by 30%.
maiev.1_2: Each Hero tethered by Umbral Bind reduces the cooldown of Spirit of Vengeance by 2.5 seconds and each Hero hit by Spirit of Vengeance reduces the cooldown of Umbral Bind by 1 second.
maiev.1_3: Activate to make primary Basic Attacks bounce between nearby enemies up to 2 times. Lasts 8 seconds.  Recharge Naisha's Memento by hitting at least 2 Heroes with a single Fan of Knives.
maiev.4_1: Quest: Hit 3 enemy Heroes with a single Fan of Knives.  Reward: Increase Fan of Knives damage by 35%.  Reward: Each additional time 3 enemy Heroes are hit by a single Fan of Knives, gain an additional 5% damage, up to 50%.  Reward: Hit 4 enemy Heroes with a single Fan of Knives to instantly gain all Rewards.
maiev.4_2: Using Fan of Knives deals 50 (+4% per level) Physical Damage to enemies around Maiev.
maiev.4_3: After blinking with Spirit of Vengeance, the shadow explodes, damaging all nearby enemy Heroes for 6% of their maximum Health.
maiev.7_1: Hitting at least 2 Heroes with a single Fan of Knives causes the next Fan of Knives to drop a star on targets that deals 77 (+4% per level) damage when it impacts.
maiev.7_2: Enemy Heroes pulled by Umbral Bind have their Armor reduced by 15 and are Slowed by 25% for 3 seconds
maiev.7_3: Each enemy Hero hit by Spirit of Vengeance increases all damage Maiev deals by 15% for 4 seconds, stacking up to 30%.
maiev.10_1: Throw a glaive in the target direction. If an enemy Hero is hit, Containment Disc can be reactivated to remove their vision and Time Stop them for 4 seconds. Leaving Containment Silences the enemy Hero for 1.5 seconds.  Containment Disc automatically activates 6 seconds after hitting a Hero.
maiev.10_2: Summon 8 Warden Avatars as a cage around Maiev. After 1.5 seconds, enemy Heroes that come in contact with an Avatar consume it and are knocked to the center of the cage. Warden Avatars last 5 seconds.
maiev.13_1: Each enemy Hero hit by Fan of Knives grants 5 Armor for 5 seconds, up to 20 Armor.
maiev.13_2: Tethering at least 2 enemy Heroes with Umbral Bind grants 35 Armor for 4 seconds.
maiev.13_3: Blink grants 20 Armor for 3.5 seconds. Maiev's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes refresh this duration.
maiev.16_1: Dealing damage to enemy Heroes causes the next cast of Fan of Knives that hits enemy Heroes to deal 1% maximum Health as bonus damage, up to 5%.
maiev.16_2: Umbral Bind grants 25% Movement Speed for 2.5 seconds. In addition, each time Maiev deals damage to tethered targets, Umbral Bind's pull damage to all targets is increased by 30%, up to 150%.
maiev.16_3: While Maiev has positive Armor of any kind, all Physical Damage dealt is increased by 25%.
maiev.20_1: Activate to reset the cooldown of Spirit of Vengeance.  Recharge Shadow Orb by damaging enemy Heroes with Spirit of Vengeance 5 times.
maiev.20_2: Activate to increase Movement Speed and Attack Speed by 40% for 5 seconds.  Recharge Shadow Orb by dealing Physical Damage to enemy Heroes 10 times.
maiev.20_3: Activate to deal 75 (+4% per level) damage to an enemy Hero, Slowing them by 30% and reducing their Armor by 20 for 4 seconds.  Recharge Shadow Orb by dealing Spell Damage to enemy Heroes 10 times.

malfurion.1_1: Entangling Roots grows 25% larger, and persist on the ground 40% longer.  Repeatable Quest: Every time an enemy Hero becomes Rooted, gain 14 Mana permanently.
malfurion.1_2: Entangling Roots spawns a Treant that deals 58 damage per second and lasts 10 seconds.  Repeatable Quest: Hitting enemy Heroes with Entangling Roots permanently increases the Treant's Basic Attack damage by 7.
malfurion.1_3: Entangling Roots Sleeps enemy Heroes for 2 seconds after its Root expires.
malfurion.4_1: Casting Regrowth on an ally also grants Malfurion its effect for 50% normal duration.
malfurion.4_2: Increase Moonfire's reveal duration by 3 seconds. Malfurion's Basic Attacks against Heroes revealed by Moonfire deal 85% more damage.
malfurion.4_3: Gain a second charge of Innervate. Its cooldown recharges 25% faster per ally affected by Regrowth.
malfurion.7_1: Each Hero hit by Moonfire extends the duration of currently active Regrowths by 1 second.
malfurion.7_2: Increase the Root duration of Entangling Roots by 25%. When Malfurion is Stunned, the cooldown of Entangling Roots is instantly reset. This can only occur every 10 seconds.
malfurion.7_3: Activate to remove all Stuns, Roots, and Slows from allies affected by Regrowth.
malfurion.10_1: Heal nearby allied Heroes for 80 (+4% per level) Health per second for 8 seconds. Allies affected by Regrowth within Tranquility's area gain 10 Armor.
malfurion.10_2: After 0.5 seconds, deal 310 (+4% per level) damage in a large area around Malfurion, Silencing enemies making them unable to use Abilities for 3 seconds.
malfurion.13_1: Malfurion gains 6% Movement Speed for every active Regrowth.
malfurion.13_2: Moonfire Slows Heroes hit by 25% for 3 seconds.
malfurion.13_3: Using Innervate also grants Malfurion 15% of his max Mana and causes his Basic Ability cooldowns to refresh 50% faster for 5 seconds.
malfurion.16_1: While Malfurion is above 75% Health, Regrowth's healing-over-time is increased by 75%.
malfurion.16_2: Increase Moonfire's area by 25% and Regrowth's duration by 5 seconds.
malfurion.16_3: Increase Moonfire's heal by 20%, and 15% per ally affected by Regrowth.
malfurion.20_1: Each enemy Hero hit by Moonfire reduces the cooldown of Tranquility by 3 seconds. Increase Tranquility's healing by 25% and 10% per ally affected by Regrowth.
malfurion.20_2: Activate to Channel for 1 second, and then instantly teleport and cast Twilight Dream at the targeted location.  Cooldown is shared with Twilight Dream.  Passive: Increase Twilight Dream's Silence duration to 5 seconds.
malfurion.20_3: Casting Regrowth instantly heals its target for 10% of their missing Health.
malfurion.20_4: If Moonfire hits a Hero, its cooldown is reduced by 1 second and the next Moonfire within 6 seconds deals 20% more damage. This damage bonus stacks up to 60%.

malganis.1_1: Each time Necrotic Embrace hits an enemy Hero, gain 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack.  If Winged Guard has no charges, Mal'Ganis will gain 1 charge after 6 seconds.
malganis.1_2: Mal'Ganis heals for 30% of Physical Damage dealt, and nearby allied Heroes heal for 15% of Physical Damage dealt.
malganis.1_3: Mal'Ganis heals for 70 (+4% per level) when damaging a nearby enemy Hero. This can occur once every 6 seconds against each enemy Hero, but is also refreshed when they are Slept by Night Rush.
malganis.4_1: While Necrotic Embrace is active, Mal'Ganis heals for 12 (+4% per level) when damage is taken and Vampiric Touch converts 20% more Hero damage into healing.
malganis.4_2: Necrotic Embrace's Armor is increased to 50.
malganis.4_3: When Necrotic Embrace expires, it explodes again for 68 (+4% per level) damage.  For each enemy Hero hit, gain 5 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Necrotic Embrace by 0.75 seconds.  Does not wake Sleeping targets.
malganis.7_1: After Mal'Ganis hits an enemy Hero with Fel Claws, his next Basic Attack deals 60% more damage and reduces the Armor of enemy Heroes by 15 for 2 seconds.
malganis.7_2: Each enemy Hero hit by the first 2 slashes of Fel Claws causes the final slash to steal 1% of maximum Health from enemy Heroes, up to 4%.  If at least 4 enemy Heroes are hit with the first 2 slashes of Fel Claws, then the final slash Stuns enemies for an additional 0.5 seconds.
malganis.7_3: After casting Night Rush, deal 33 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies.  This effect lasts for 5 seconds and Basic Attacks against Heroes refresh its duration.  Does not wake Sleeping targets.
malganis.10_1: After 1 second, disperse into an Invulnerable swarm of bats for 3 seconds, dealing 120 (+4% per level) damage per second to enemies.  Vampiric Touch heals for 75% of Carrion Swarm's damage to Heroes.
malganis.10_2: Channel on an enemy Hero for 0.75 seconds, then swap Health percentages with the target over 3 seconds.
malganis.13_1: Increase Night Rush's Sleep duration by 0.75 seconds and its Movement Speed bonus by 10%.
malganis.13_2: Basic Attacks deal 200% bonus damage to Sleeping enemies.  After Night Rush's Sleep ends, targets are Slowed by 30% for 3 seconds.
malganis.13_3: When Mal'Ganis is healed by a Hero, he gains 1% Movement Speed for 6 seconds, up to 15%.
malganis.16_1: Necrotic Embrace unleashes a wave of bats in front of Mal'Ganis, dealing 81 (+4% per level) damage.
malganis.16_2: Basic Attacks against Heroes with a higher Health percentage heal for an additional 50% of damage dealt.  Basic Attacks against Heroes with a lower Health percentage grant 35% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
malganis.16_3: Activate to erupt with blind rage, removing the cooldown and Mana cost of Fel Claws, but losing all vision. Lasts 6 seconds.   Enemy Heroes hit by the final slash of Fel Claws reduces the cooldown of this Ability by 4 seconds.
malganis.20_1: Upon expiring, Carrion Swarm's bats seek nearby enemy Heroes, dealing 132 (+4% per level) damage and Sleeping them for 2.5 seconds.
malganis.20_2: Enemy Heroes near the target suffer 75% of the transferred Health as damage over 3 seconds.  Does not benefit from Vampiric Touch.
malganis.20_3: Damage from Fel Claws and Basic Attacks Slows enemies by 25% for 1.5 seconds, and Vampiric Touch converts 10% more damage into healing versus Slowed Heroes.
malganis.20_4: Reduce the cooldown of Night Rush by 4 seconds.  Enemy Heroes put to Sleep by Night Rush have their vision greatly reduced during the Sleep and for 2 seconds after.

malthael.1_2: Gain an additional 20% Movement Speed while mounted.
malthael.1_3: Activate to increase Movement Speed by 25% and pass through other units for 4 seconds.
malthael.4_1: Soul Rip deals 50% more damage to Heroes if it hits only one Hero.
malthael.4_2: Increase Death Shroud's range by 33%, reduce its cooldown by 3 seconds, and reduce its Mana cost from 50 to 30.  Death Shroud's initial impact deals 2% maximum Health as damage to non-Structure enemies.
malthael.4_3: Quest: Apply Reaper's Mark to Heroes for a total of 180 seconds.  Reward: Permanently increase Reaper's Mark's duration by 2 seconds.
malthael.7_1: Soul Rip Slows enemies by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
malthael.7_2: Wraith Strike now damages and applies Reaper's Mark to enemies around its target.
malthael.7_3: Activate to reduce healing received by Heroes afflicted by Reaper's Mark by 50% for 4 seconds.
malthael.10_1: Unleash a torrent of souls, continually applying Reaper's Mark to nearby enemies for 4 seconds.  When Tormented Souls is cast and when it expires, reset the cooldown of Wraith Strike.
malthael.10_2: Apply a death sentence to an enemy Hero that, after 2 seconds, deals damage equal to 50% of their missing Health.  Quest: Enemies killed between the application of Last Rites and within 1.5 seconds of it dealing damage permanently reduce its cooldown by 5 seconds, to a minimum of 20 seconds.
malthael.13_1: Increase Soul Rip's bonus healing from Heroes to 4.75% of the Hero's maximum Health.
malthael.13_2: Gain 10 Physical Armor per enemy Hero afflicted by Reaper's Mark, up to a maximum of 30.
