malthael.13_3: Activate to become Unstoppable for 2 seconds, but remove all active Reaper's Marks.
malthael.13_4: After 2 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor for 4 seconds.
malthael.16_1: Reduce Soul Rip's cooldown by 0.5 seconds and increase its range by 25%.
malthael.16_2: When damaging a Hero, Wraith Strike deals bonus damage equal to 8% of the Hero's maximum Health.
malthael.16_3: Reaper's Mark deals 60% increased damage after afflicting an enemy for more than 4 seconds.
malthael.20_1: Increase Tormented Souls' duration by 2 seconds.  While Tormented Souls is active, Hero Takedowns refresh the duration.
malthael.20_2: Last Rites heals for 100% of the damage dealt, and its current and future cooldown reduction bonuses are doubled.
malthael.20_3: Death Shroud leaves a trail in its wake for 4 seconds, applying Reaper's Mark to enemies in its area.
malthael.20_4: Activate while dead to immediately respawn at the Hall of Storms but increase Malthael's next respawn time by 25%.

medivh.1_1: Increases Raven Form's Movement Speed bonus by 50%.
medivh.1_2: Raven Form increases Medivh's Mana and Health Regeneration by 75%.
medivh.1_3: Medivh can manually place both Portal locations and it no longer breaks Raven Form.  Activate Medivh's Trait to cancel an unlinked Portal.
medivh.4_1: The first time an ally uses a Portal, they gain 30 Armor for 4 seconds, reducing their damage taken by 30%.
medivh.4_2: A Raven Familiar joins allies each time they use a Portal. The Raven will dive at the ally's next Basic Attack against a Hero within 5 seconds, dealing 114 (+4% per level) damage and Slowing them by 30% for 2.5 seconds.
medivh.4_3: Activate to greatly increase sight range for 5 seconds and reveal enemy Heroes in the area for 8 seconds. Does not cancel Raven Form.  Passive: Increase Medivh's sight range while in Raven Form by 25%.
medivh.7_1: If Arcane Rift hits an enemy Hero, Medivh's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds deals 50% more damage and heals for 50% of the damage dealt.
medivh.7_2: When Force of Will expires, it deals 80 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies, plus 50% of the damage it prevented, up to 315 (+4% per level) additional damage.
medivh.7_3: Preventing at least 268 (+4% per level) damage with a single cast of Force of Will grants 30% Spell Power for 15 seconds. Stacks up to 2 times.
medivh.10_1: Polymorph an enemy Hero for 2 seconds, Silencing them and making them unable to attack. On expiration, Poly Bomb spreads to other nearby enemy Heroes.
medivh.10_2: After 0.5 seconds, unleash a wave of energy that places enemy Heroes in Time Stop for 3 seconds.
medivh.13_1: Force of Will also applies to allies near the target, but its cooldown is increased by 2 seconds.
medivh.13_2: Preventing at least 268 (+4% per level) damage with Force of Will reduces its cooldown to 4 seconds.
medivh.13_3: Increase the amount of healing from Force of Will to 70% of the damage it absorbed.
medivh.16_1: When Arcane Rift damages an enemy Hero, the next Arcane Rift deals 15% more damage.
medivh.16_2: Basic Attacks reduce Medivh's Heroic Ability cooldown by 3%. Each enemy Hero hit by Arcane Rift reduces Medivh's Heroic Ability cooldown by 9%.
medivh.16_3: Decrease Portal cooldown by 25% and increase Portal duration by 50%.
medivh.20_1: Poly Bomb explodes 1 second sooner and the spread radius is increased by 25%.
medivh.20_2: Increase the duration of the Time Stop by 33% and gain the ability to redirect the wave once while it's active.
medivh.20_3: Minions and Catapults hit by Arcane Rift are instantly killed.
medivh.20_4: Activate to instantly restore 200 mana to all nearby allied Heroes and grant them 15% Spell Power for 10 seconds.
medivh.20_5: Stealth an allied Hero for 40 seconds, they are Unrevealable for the first 0.5 seconds. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.  Stores up to 2 charges.

mei.1_1: Increases the duration of Snow Blind's Slow by 1.5 seconds. Each time Blizzard damages an enemy Hero, reduce the cooldown of Snow Blind by 0.5 seconds and gain 3 Mana.
mei.1_2: Every 3rd hit of Blizzard against enemy Heroes deals an additional 42 (+4% per level) damage. Blizzard's final Stun damage is increased by 150% against all enemies.
mei.1_3: Basic Attacks against Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed Heroes deal 33% more damage. Each time Mei Stuns or Slows an enemy Hero she heals for 16 (+4% per level) Health.
mei.4_1: Snow Blind deals 75% increased damage and Structures hit are disabled for 3 seconds.
mei.4_2: Reduce the cooldown of Icing by 3 seconds.  If Mei enters her own Blizzard while Icing is active, the cooldown of Icing is reduced by 5 seconds and she gains 80 Mana.
mei.4_3: Reduce the cooldown of Cryo-Freeze by 10 seconds. Mei gains 40 Spell Armor while Cryo-Freeze is active and for 1 second after.
mei.7_1: Blizzard reduces the damage dealt by enemy Heroes inside of its area by 40%.  When Blizzard ends, enemy Heroes still within its area gain this effect for an additional 4 seconds.
mei.7_2: When Icing ends, Mei and all nearby allied Heroes gain 20% Movement Speed and 50 Physical Armor for 3 seconds.
mei.7_3: Activate to remove all Roots and Slows and regenerate 20% of maximum Health over 2 seconds. The cooldown of this ability is reduced by 10 seconds each time Mei picks up a Regeneration Globe.
mei.10_1: After 0.5 seconds, roll a massive snowball that consumes enemy Heroes in its path. At the end of its path, the snowball crumbles, releasing the consumed Heroes, dealing 220 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds per Hero consumed.
mei.10_2: Vector Targeting After a 0.75 second delay, create an impassable wall that traps enemy Heroes hit for 2.5 seconds. When the wall expires, trapped Heroes are Slowed by 75%, decaying over 3 seconds.
mei.13_1: While in her own Blizzard, Mei gains 50% increased Attack Speed and Blizzard's cooldown refreshes 125% faster. If Mei is in her own Blizzard when it ends, gain these bonuses for 3 additional seconds.
mei.13_2: While Cryo-Freeze is active, Mei's Basic Ability cooldowns recover 200% faster.  Passive: Basic Attacks Slow by 20% for 1.5 seconds.
mei.13_3: Using an ability causes Mei to deal 24 (+4% per level) damage a second to nearby enemies for 4 seconds. Enemy Heroes damaged by this effect also have their Movement Speed and Attack Speed Slowed by 20%.
mei.16_1: Snow Blind gains an additional charge and its range is increased by 33%.
mei.16_2: Icing's Slow effect no longer decays over its duration. Icing deals 300% more damage to enemies very close to Mei.
mei.16_3: Each time Mei Stuns or Slows an enemy Hero, the damage she deals and healing she receives is increased by 1%, stacking up to 20 times. While at maximum stacks, Mei also gains 10 Armor. Lasts 8 seconds.
mei.20_1: While traveling, Avalanche constantly launches a volley of untalented Snow Blind snowballs ahead of itself.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Avalanche by 30 seconds.
mei.20_2: When Ice Wall expires, trapped enemy Heroes hit take 210 (+4% per level) damage and have their Armor reduced by 25 for 5 seconds.
mei.20_3: Every 15 seconds, the next Snow Blind you cast has 67% increased area and 200% increased damage.
mei.20_4: When Mei takes fatal damage she instantly gains Cryo-Freeze. This effect has a 180 second cooldown.

mephisto.1_1: Quest: Hit Heroes with Skull Missile.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes, increase Skull Missile's damage by 100.  Reward: After hitting 40 Heroes, Skull Missile gains an additional charge.
mephisto.1_2: Every 3rd hit from Lightning Nova against the same target deals 65 (+4% per level) bonus damage and grants Mephisto 2 Mana.
mephisto.1_3: Shade of Mephisto grants 25% Spell Power while active and for 2.5 seconds after ending.  If Mephisto hits enemy Heroes at least 18 times with his Basic Abilities while Shade of Mephisto is active, then increase the duration of the Spell Power bonus to 10 seconds after it ends.
mephisto.4_1: Skull Missile grants 10 Mana and heals Mephisto for 70% of the damage it deals to Heroes.
mephisto.4_2: At the end of its duration, Lightning Nova grants Mephisto a Shield equal to 40% of the damage it dealt to Heroes. Lasts 5 seconds.
mephisto.4_3: Increase Regeneration Globe healing duration by 150%. Every tick of Regeneration Globe healing activates Lord of Hatred, reducing Basic Ability cooldowns by 1 second.
mephisto.7_1: Shade of Mephisto grants 25 Armor while active and for 2.5 seconds after it ends.
mephisto.7_2: While Shade of Mephisto is active, enemies who are hit by Lightning Nova are Slowed by 15% for 1 second and the Slow from Skull Missile is increased to 50%.
mephisto.7_3: Shade of Mephisto grants 20% Movement Speed while active and for 2.5 seconds after it ends.  If Mephisto hits enemy Heroes at least 18 times with his Basic Abilities while Shade of Mephisto is active, then reset the cooldown of Shade of Mephisto.
mephisto.10_1: Channel for 2.5 seconds, revealing all enemy Heroes. After the Channel completes, all enemy Heroes take 357 (+4% per level) damage and are Slowed by 25% for 2.5 seconds.
mephisto.10_2: After 1 second, unleash a wave of evil spirits that Root the first enemy Hero hit for 2.5 seconds and deal 250 (+4% per level) damage to them over the same duration.  Durance of Hate spreads outwards from its initial target, Rooting and damaging additional nearby enemy Heroes.
mephisto.13_1: Hitting a Hero with Skull Missile grants 25% Spell Power for 6 seconds. Skull Missile deals 40% more damage to Heroes under 50% Health.
mephisto.13_2: Lord of Hatred also reduces the cooldown of Mephisto's Heroic Ability.  Mephisto is healed for 15% of his maximum Health and Mana when he casts his Heroic Ability.
mephisto.13_3: Basic Attacks hit enemies near the primary target and activate Lord of Hatred against enemy Heroes, reducing Basic Ability cooldowns by 1 second per Hero hit.
mephisto.16_1: Skull Missile explodes on contact with Lightning Nova, dealing 138 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.
mephisto.16_2: When Lightning Nova's damage bonus reaches 30%, enemy Heroes within its radius take damage equal to 10% of their maximum Health.
mephisto.16_3: Increase the duration of Lightning Nova by 1 second and the maximum amount of bonus damage it can deal from 30% to 42%.
mephisto.20_1: Consume Souls deals bonus damage equal to 10% of the target's missing Health. If Consume Souls initial cast kills a Hero it will cast 1 additional time.
mephisto.20_2: Durance of Hate Silences enemies while they are Rooted and for 3 seconds after its Root expires.
mephisto.20_3: While both Shade of Mephisto and Lightning Nova are active, Lightning Nova also casts from the Shade's location.
mephisto.20_4: Activate to swap locations with Shade of Mephisto and refresh its duration.  Passive: Shade of Mephisto benefits from all of Mephisto's level 7 Talents.

muradin.1_1: Quest: Every time Muradin hits an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack, increase Storm Bolt's damage by 0.75. If an enemy Hero is killed within 3 seconds of being hit by a Storm Bolt increase its damage by an additional 10.
muradin.1_2: Casting Dwarf Toss grants 4 charges of Block. Each Block charge grants 75 Physical Armor against a single enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%.
muradin.1_3: Increases Health Restoration rate to 90 (+4% per level) per second, and raises Health threshold to 60% Health for improved 180 (+4% per level) per second Restoration.
muradin.4_1: Stormbolt deals 350% damage to non-Heroic enemies. Increase Storm Bolt's cooldown reduction from 1 second to 1.25 seconds per Basic Attack.
muradin.4_2: Increases the Attack Speed Slow of Thunder Clap from 30% to 50% and the duration from 2.5 seconds to 3.5 seconds. Each enemy Hero hit reduces your Heroic Ability cooldown by 5%.
muradin.4_3: Hitting an enemy Hero with Thunder Clap triggers a second explosion 2 seconds later in the same location that deals 75% damage.
muradin.7_1: Enemies hit by Dwarf Toss are Slowed by 80% for 1.5 seconds.
muradin.7_2: Attacking a Hero that is Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed increases Muradin's Basic Attack damage by 50% for 3 seconds.
muradin.7_3: Every 3rd Basic Attack against the same enemy deals 90% bonus damage and Stuns them for 0.25 seconds.
muradin.10_1: Transform for 20 seconds, gaining 1000 (+4% per level) Health.
muradin.10_2: Stun target enemy Hero, and wind up a punch dealing 319 (+4% per level) damage and knocking the target back, hitting enemies in the way for 319 (+4% per level) damage and knocking them aside.
muradin.13_1: Deal 15 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies and heal for 75% of the damage dealt. Hitting an enemy Hero with Storm Bolt increase this damage by 200% for 3 seconds.
muradin.13_2: Muradin heals for 5% of his maximum Health for each Hero hit by Thunder Clap.
muradin.13_3: Thunder Clap deals 300% damage if only one target is hit.  Passive: Increase the duration of Dwarf Toss's Armor by 2 seconds.
muradin.16_1: Increase the range of Dwarf Toss by 40%. Hitting an enemy Hero with Dwarf Toss reduces its cooldown by 2 seconds.
muradin.16_2: Activate to reduce the Attack Speed by 50% and Movement Speed by 20% of nearby Heroes and Summons for 2.5 seconds.  Passive: Heroes and Summons that attack your Hero have their Attack Speed Slowed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
muradin.16_3: Activate to heal Muradin for 30% of his maximum Health over 10 seconds. Second Wind is disabled during this time.
muradin.20_1: While active, Avatar grants 20 Armor and causes Muradin's Basic Attacks to reduce the cooldowns of Thunder Clap and Dwarf Toss by 0.75 seconds.
muradin.20_2: Haymaker gains a 2nd charge and its damage is increased by 25%. If a Hero dies within 3 seconds of being hit by Haymaker, instantly gain 1 charge.
muradin.20_3: Activate to gain 75 Armor for 4 seconds, taking 75% less damage.
muradin.20_4: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.

murky.1_1: Egg's Health is increased by 100%, its sight radius is increased by 300% and it can see Stealthed enemies.  Passive: Spawning from his Egg increases Murky's mount speed to 45% for 5 seconds.
murky.1_2: Activate to place a fake Egg. If the fake Egg dies, it casts an untalented Slime. Maximum 3 fake Eggs.  Passive: Spawning from his Egg grants Murky Stealth for 5 seconds.
murky.1_3: Killing a Minion with Pufferfish grants a stack of Bribe. Use 8 stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries.  Maximum of 32 stacks of Bribe.
murky.4_1: Quest: Slime enemy Heroes that are already Slimed.  Reward: After Sliming 10 Heroes, increase Slime's bonus damage by 125.  Reward: After Sliming 20 Heroes, increase Slime's slow amount to 30%.
murky.4_2: Pufferfish gains 50 Spell Armor and deals 50% more damage to Slimed targets.
murky.4_3: Quest: Every 15 seconds Murky is alive, he gains 5% Spell Power, up to 25%. This bonus is reset upon his death.
murky.7_2: Gain 50% Movement Speed and move through units while in Safety Bubble. Additionally, Safety Bubble's cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.
murky.7_3: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal an additional 7 (+4% per level) damage a second and slow the target by 7% for 4 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times.
murky.10_1: After 0.75 seconds, Murky commands a legion of Murlocs to march in a target direction, each one leaping onto the first enemy Hero or Structure they find. Each Murloc deals 125 (+4% per level) damage and slows its target by 15% for 5 seconds. Murlocs deal 50% damage to Structures.
murky.10_2: Murky becomes Unstoppable and Stuns target enemy Hero for 3 seconds while he hits them for 1 damage a second.
murky.13_1: Safety Bubble restores 40% of Murky's maximum Health.
murky.13_2: Spawning from his Egg grants Murky a Shield equal to 100% of his maximum Health. The shield lasts indefinitely.
murky.13_3: Murky is healed for 25% of the damage he deals with Basic Attacks and Basic Abilities.
murky.16_1: Every 3rd consecutive Basic Attack against an enemy Hero causes a free Slime to be cast upon them.
murky.16_2: The Pufferfish casts Slime at its location upon landing.
murky.16_3: Heroes hit by Pufferfish take additional damage equal to 15% of their maximum Health over 5 seconds.
murky.20_1: March of the Murlocs can be channeled, sending little Murlocs indefinitely.
murky.20_2: Increase the damage of Octo-Grab by 13700% (+4% per level).
murky.20_3: Murky's maximum Health and Egg respawn time are doubled.
murky.20_4: Reduces the cooldown of Slime from 4 seconds to 2 seconds.

nazeebo.1_1: Enemies hit by Corpse Spiders' jar are Slowed by 25% for 1 second.  Reward: After Corpse Spiders attack Heroes 100 times, their attack damage is increased by 25% and their duration is increased by 1 second.
nazeebo.1_2: Quest: Hit Heroes with Plague of Toads.  Reward: After hitting 35 Heroes with Plague of Toads, it spawns 2 additional toads.  Reward: After hitting 70 Heroes with Plague of Toads, it reduces the damage Heroes deal by 5%, stacking up to 25%.
nazeebo.1_3: Increase the range of Nazeebo's Basic Abilities by 20%.  Reward: After gaining 50 stacks of Voodoo Ritual, gain 5% Spell Power.  Reward: After gaining 100 stacks of Voodoo Ritual, gain an additional 5% Spell Power.
nazeebo.4_1: Corpse Spiders restore 1% of Nazeebo's maximum Health and Mana when they attack an enemy Hero.
nazeebo.4_2: Increases the Health and Mana bonuses from Voodoo Ritual by 100%.
nazeebo.4_3: If an enemy dies while poisoned by Voodoo Ritual, restore 2% of Nazeebo's maximum Health and Mana.  Passive: Takedowns grant 3 stacks of Voodoo Ritual.
nazeebo.7_1: The number of Corpse Spiders spawned is increased from 3 to 4. If Corpse Spiders' jar hits only one enemy, it creates an additional spider.
nazeebo.7_2: Zombie Wall deals 100% more damage. When it expires up to 5 remaining Zombies uproot and attack nearby enemies for 3 seconds.
nazeebo.7_3: Increase the damage and explosion radius of Plague of Toads by 25% after each hop, up to a maximum of 100%.
nazeebo.10_1: Summon a Gargantuan to guard an area for 20 seconds. Deals 100 (+4% per level) damage when summoned, attacks for 140 (+4% per level) damage, and can be ordered to stomp nearby enemies. The Gargantuan's Stomp deals 140 (+4% per level) damage and Slows by 30% for 2 seconds.
nazeebo.10_2: Channel a Ravenous Spirit that deals 230 (+4% per level) damage per second. Cannot move while channeling. Lasts for 8 seconds.
nazeebo.13_1: Hitting an enemy Hero with Plague of Toads grants 30 Armor for 3 seconds, stacking up to 6 seconds.
nazeebo.13_2: Gain 40 Spell Armor. Heroic Basic Attacks against Nazeebo remove this bonus for 3 seconds and spawn a Corpse Spider to attack the Hero.
nazeebo.13_3: Activate to place yourself in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for 3 seconds.
nazeebo.16_1: Corpse Spider Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Nazeebo's Basic Abilities by 0.125 seconds.
nazeebo.16_2: Zombie Wall lasts 1 second longer, and the center is filled with poison that deals a total of 319 (+4% per level) damage over 4 seconds. This damage starts small and increases over the duration.
nazeebo.16_3: Activate to increase Nazeebo's Health and Spell Power by 7% for each nearby enemy, up to a maximum of 35%. Lasts 15 seconds.
nazeebo.20_1: Gargantuan Stomp's area is increased by 25% and its Slow amount is increased to 50%.  Passive: Reduce Gargantuan's cooldown by 40 seconds and its Mana cost by 50%.
nazeebo.20_2: When Ravenous Spirit damages an enemy Hero, reduce their healing received by 50% for 1 second and increase Ravenous Spirit's damage by 5% for the rest of its duration.  Passive: Increases the range of Ravenous Spirit by 50%.
nazeebo.20_3: Quest: Reach 175 stacks of Voodoo Ritual.  Reward: After reaching 175 stacks of Voodoo Ritual, it can also be applied to Heroes and its damage is increased from 67 (+4% per level) to 167 (+4% per level) over 6 seconds.
nazeebo.20_4: Consume 5 stacks of Voodoo Ritual to become Unstoppable, gain 20% increased Movement Speed, and 50 Armor for 2 seconds.

nova.1_1: Increases the cast range of Pinning Shot by 30%. Pinning Shot also increases the range of Nova's next Basic Attack by 2.
nova.1_2: After being Stealthed for 2 seconds, Pinning Shot's Slow is increased to 60% and costs no Mana. Bonus is lost after losing Stealth for 1 second.
nova.1_3: After being Stealthed for 1 second, gain an additional 10% Movement Speed. While Stealthed, regenerate 3 Mana per second.
nova.4_1: Reduces Holo Decoy's cooldown and Mana cost by 60%.
nova.4_2: Increase the cast range of Holo Decoy by 100% and its duration by 120%.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Ghost Protocol by 15 seconds.
nova.4_3: Enemy Minions killed near Nova grant a stack of Bribe. Hero Takedowns grant 10 stacks of Bribe. Use 25 stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them.  Does not work on Elite Mercenaries.  Maximum of 100 stacks. If a camp is defeated entirely with Bribe, the camp respawns 50% faster.
nova.7_1: Hitting an enemy with Snipe reduces its cooldown by 2 seconds and refunds half its Mana cost, doubled against enemy Heroes.
nova.7_2: After using an Ability, Nova's next Basic Attack within 3 seconds deals 65% additional damage.
nova.7_3: Nova's Basic Attacks deal 250% damage and decrease the Physical Armor of Heroic targets by 15 for 3 seconds, but her Attack Speed is proportionally slower.
nova.10_1: Locks in on the target Hero, then fires 3 shots that hit the first Hero or Structure they come in contact with for 372 (+4% per level) damage each.
nova.10_2: After a 1.5 second delay, deals 435 (+4% per level) damage to enemies within an area. Unlimited range.
nova.13_1: Snipe's range is increased by 15% and hitting a Hero grants an additional stack of Precision Sniper.
nova.13_2: Pinning Shot now has 2 charges, but its cooldown is increased by 2 seconds.
nova.13_3: Gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds after losing Stealth.
nova.16_1: Snipe also deals 90% damage to enemies near the impact.
nova.16_2: Pinning Shot lowers a Hero's Armor by 20 for the duration of the Slow, causing them to take 20% increased damage.
nova.16_3: Increases the damage Holo Decoy deals to 30% of Nova's damage.
nova.20_1: Triple Tap's cooldown is reset if it kills an enemy Hero.
nova.20_2: Precision Strike gains a 2nd charge and its cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds.
nova.20_3: Reduce the cooldown of Permanent Cloak by 2 seconds.
nova.20_4: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.

orphea.1_1: Shadow Waltz deals an increased 90% damage to enemies hit by its end and grants 1 additional Chaos.
orphea.1_2: Increase Dread's damage by 50%.   Quest: Hit 3 enemy Heroes with a single cast of Dread's eruption.  Reward: Permanently increase Dread's eruption damage by 50% and increase the Slow amount of Dread's eruption by 15%.
orphea.1_3: Non-Heroic Abilities deal 15% more damage to Stunned, Rooted, Silenced or Slowed enemies. Enemy Heroes who are hit with Overflowing Chaos are Slowed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
orphea.4_1: Reduce the cooldown of Shadow Waltz by 1 second.  Hitting Heroes with the end of Shadow Waltz sets its cooldown to 0.75 seconds.
orphea.4_2: If Chomp hits a Hero, Orphea immediately dashes a short distance backwards.  Passive: Gain 15% maximum Health.
orphea.4_3: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes while having 3 stacks of Chaos deal an additional 75% bonus damage.
orphea.7_1: Hitting a Hero with Chomp sets its cooldown to 2 seconds.
orphea.7_2: Quest: Minions that die within 1.5 seconds of being hit by Chomp permanently increase its damage by 2 and heal Orphea for 60 (+4% per level).  Heroes that die increase its damage by 40 and heal Orphea for 25% of her maximum Health.
orphea.7_3: Quest: Hitting Heroes with Dread increases its damage by 5, up to 150.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, hitting an enemy Hero with Dread's eruption sets its cooldown to 6 seconds and refunds 50 Mana.
orphea.10_1: After 1.5 seconds, deal 210 (+4% per level) damage in an area. Eternal Feast repeats every 1 second as long as it hits an enemy Hero.
orphea.10_2: After 1.25 seconds, pull enemies in an area towards the center, dealing 250 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.
orphea.13_1: After dashing with Shadow Waltz, Orphea gains 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability, stacking up to 2 times. While Orphea has Determination, her Physical damage is increased by 15%.
orphea.13_2: Hitting a Hero with Chomp instantly grants Orphea maximum Chaos and a 170 (+4% per level) Shield for 3 seconds.
orphea.13_3: Activate to deal 150 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby enemies after 2 seconds. For each Hero hit, heal for 182 (+4% per level) and gain 1 Chaos.
orphea.16_1: Shadow Waltz deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 3% of their maximum Health, healing Orphea for 50% of damage dealt.
orphea.16_2: Basic Attacks that consume Chaos ignore Armor and deal 90 (+4% per level) Spell Damage to the target and all enemies around them.
orphea.16_3: After Dread erupts and for 2 seconds after, activate to cast Chomp from the eruption area. Enemy Heroes hit by this Chomp are Slowed by 70% for 1.5 seconds.
orphea.20_1: Eternal Feast grants 1 Chaos each time it hits a Hero. While Eternal Feast is active and for 5 seconds afterwards, Orphea's Basic Abilities recharge 150% faster.
orphea.20_2: Crushing Jaws reduces the Armor of Heroes hit by 50 for 3 seconds. Takedowns set its cooldown to 5 seconds.
orphea.20_3: Each Chaos consumed increases Orphea's Spell Power by 3%, up to 30%. After reaching the maximum bonus, the Spell Power is increased by an additional 30%. Lasts 10 seconds.
orphea.20_4: Activate to instantly reset the cooldown of Shadow Waltz. For the next 5 seconds, dashing with Shadow Waltz resets its cooldown and increases the duration of Final Toccata by 1 second.

probius.1_1: Disruption Pulse now returns to Probius 1.25 seconds after reaching its target, dealing 100% damage on the return trip.
probius.1_2: Quest: Hit Heroes with Warp Rift explosions.  Reward: After hitting 8 Heroes with Warp Rift explosions, increase the explosion damage by 120.  Reward: After hitting 16 Heroes with Warp Rift explosions, Warp Rift gains 1 additional charge.
probius.1_3: Quest: Gather Minerals to increase the Health of Photon Cannons by 8, up to 560.  Reward: After collecting 70 Minerals, Photon Cannons deal 35% more damage.
probius.4_1: While a Photon Cannon is alive and powered, Probius gains 40 Spell Armor.
probius.4_2: Worker Rush grants an additional 10% passive Movement Speed while in a Power Field, and its cooldown is reduced by 14 seconds.
probius.4_3: Probius gains permanent Shields equal to 10% of his max Health. Shields regenerate quickly as long as he hasn't taken damage recently.
probius.7_1: After hitting 3 Heroes with Disruption Pulse, the next Warp Rift detonated by a Disruption Pulse fires 4 additional pulses that deal 78 (+5% per level) damage from the impact location in different directions.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Disruption Pulse by 0.5 seconds.
probius.7_2: Hitting a Warp Rift with Disruption Pulse within 1 second of it arming deals 105 (+5% per level) damage over 3 seconds.
probius.7_3: Reduce Photon Cannon's cooldown by 3.5 seconds when Disruption Pulse or Warp Rift damages an enemy Hero.
probius.10_1: For 8 seconds, increase the size of Pylon power fields and allow them to attack enemy Heroes within it for 96 (+4% per level) damage per second. Pylons are Invulnerable for the duration.
probius.10_2: Vector Targeting Project a barrier of negative energy in the target direction that lasts 4 seconds. Enemies who touch the barrier take 76 (+4% per level) damage per second and are Slowed by 80% for as long as they remain in contact with it.
probius.13_1: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 35% increased Attack Damage.
probius.13_2: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 10% increased Spell Power and 2 Mana per second.
probius.13_3: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 28 (+4% per level) Shields per second, up to 112 (+4% per level). Shields persist for 2 seconds after exiting a Pylon Power Field.
probius.16_1: Enemies continue to be slowed for 3 seconds after their last contact with a Warp Rift.
probius.16_2: Enemies are slowed more the closer they are to the center of the Warp Rift, up to a maximum slow of 60%.
probius.16_3: Enemy Heroes hit by Warp Rift explosions have their Spell Power reduced by 35% for 5 seconds.  Additionally, enemies hit by Warp Rift explosions are knocked away from the center.
probius.20_1: Probius can now have up to 3 active Pylons, and increase the damage of Pylon Overcharge by 25%.
probius.20_2: Null Gate lasts indefinitely if either end is within a Power Field.
probius.20_3: Enemy Heroes hit by Disruption Pulse take a  bonus 2.5% of their maximum Health as damage.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Disruption Pulse by 0.5 seconds.
probius.20_4: Whenever a Rift explosion hits 1 or more enemy Heroes, create a new Warp Rift in the same location.

qhira.1_1: If Carnage damages the same enemy Hero 3 times it deals an additional 108 (+4% per level) damage and Slows by 25% for 2.5 seconds.
qhira.1_2: While at maximum stacks, Blood Rage's bleed deals 30% additional damage to enemy Heroes under 50% Health.  Quest: Damage enemy Heroes with Blood Rage's bleed damage.  Reward: After damaging Heroes with Blood Rage's bleed damage 150 times, Blood Rage's duration is increased by 2 seconds.
qhira.1_3: Gain 20% Basic Attack damage. When Qhira Basic Attacks an enemy Hero below 50% Health it deals 20% additional damage, and she gains 35% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
qhira.4_1: Damaging at least 2 Heroes with Blood Rage causes Qhira to Evade the next 4 Heroic Basic Attacks within 12 seconds.
qhira.4_2: The primary target of Revolving Sweep is Slowed by 60% while Qhira is attached to them. Secondary targets hit by Revolving Sweep's swing are Slowed by 40% for 3 seconds.
qhira.4_3: Basic Attacking an enemy Hero causes Qhira to gain 10 Armor for 3 seconds. Stacks 3 times.
qhira.7_1: Carnage heals for 50% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes. Anytime Carnage damages an enemy Hero, Qhira's next Basic Attack within 4 seconds against an enemy Hero deals 15% additional damage, stacking up to 10 times.
qhira.7_2: If Blood Rage damages an enemy Hero below 50% Health, it heals for an additional 190 (+4% per level) Health.
qhira.7_3: Damaging an enemy Hero with Revolving Sweep's initial impact or swing causes Qhira to regenerate 96 (+4% per level) Health over 4 seconds. Stacks up to 4 times.  Passive: Basic Attacks heal for 20% of the damage dealt.
qhira.10_1: Deal 44 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies every 0.5 seconds for 2.5 seconds as your sword grows outward. Upon expiring, deal 160 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemy Heroes and Stun them for 1.5 seconds.
qhira.10_2: After 1 second, deal 395 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in a line. This damage is increased by 25% against enemy Heroes who are below 50% Health.
qhira.13_1: Carnage's cooldown recharges 100% faster while an enemy Hero has maximum Blood Rage stacks.
qhira.13_2: Each additional enemy Hero hit by Revolving Sweep causes the primary target to take an additional 135 (+4% per level) damage.
qhira.13_3: Basic Attacking an enemy Hero increases your Basic Attack damage against that Hero by 25%. Stacks up to 4 times and lasts 4 seconds. Bonus is reset if a different Hero is attacked.
qhira.16_1: Increase the Stun duration of Revolving Sweep's re-activation by 0.25 seconds. Enemy Heroes around the primary target are also affected by Revolving Sweep's re-activation.
qhira.16_2: Enemy Heroes hit by Revolving Sweep or by Grappling Hook have their Armor reduced by 25 for 3 seconds.
qhira.16_3: Revolving Sweep's cooldown recharges 250% faster while Qhira is swinging around her target. She also gains 60 Spell Armor for 5 seconds after the re-activation impact.
qhira.20_1: Hitting enemy Heroes with Unrelenting Strikes Silences them for 0.5 seconds and reduces its cooldown by 3 seconds.
qhira.20_2: Increase the damage to enemy Heroes under 50% Health from 25% to 50%.  If an enemy Hero dies within 1.5 seconds of being hit by Final Strike, then reset the cooldowns of Final Strike and all of Qhira's Basic Abilities.
qhira.20_3: Grappling Hook's cooldown is reset when hitting an enemy Hero with the initial impact of Revolving Sweep and recharges 900% faster if Qhira hasn't taken damage within the last 2 seconds.
qhira.20_4: Nearby enemy Heroes below 50% Health are revealed and you gain 20% Movement Speed while an enemy Hero is revealed by you in this way.  Additionally, you deal 20% increased damage to these revealed enemies.

ragnaros.1_1: Quest: Every time Empower Sulfuras kills a Minion, its damage is increased by 1, up to 25.  Reward: After killing 25 Minions, increase its damage by an additional 100.
ragnaros.1_2: Each time an enemy is hit by the same Living Meteor, they take 6% increased damage from it.  Quest: Hit 75 Heroes with Living Meteor.  Reward: After hitting 75 Heroes with Living Meteor, its duration is increased to 2.25 seconds, and it can be reactivated to change its direction once per use.
ragnaros.1_3: Increase Blast Wave's damage by 75% and its radius by 15%.
ragnaros.4_1: When Living Meteor hits an enemy Hero, gain a charge of Spell Armor, reducing damage from the next enemy ability by 50%.  Stores up to 2 charges.
ragnaros.4_2: Blast Wave slows enemies hit by 40% for 2 seconds.
ragnaros.4_3: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Ragnaros' Health Regeneration by 1.25 per second, up to 18.75.  Reward: After gathering 15 Regeneration Globes, activate Catching Fire to gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 25%.
ragnaros.7_1: If Empower Sulfuras hits at least 2 enemy Heroes, refund 10 Mana and its cooldown recharges 100% faster for 4 seconds.
ragnaros.7_2: If Living Meteor hits enemy Heroes at least 5 times, reduce its cooldown by 7 seconds, and refund 30 Mana.
ragnaros.7_3: Every 10 seconds, Ragnaros's next Basic Attack against a Hero deals 60% bonus damage. Hitting enemies with Basic Abilities reduces this cooldown by 1 second.
ragnaros.10_1: Hurl Sulfuras at the target area, landing after 0.75 seconds, dealing 250 (+4% per level) damage. Enemies in the center take 594 (+4% per level) damage instead and are Stunned for 0.5 seconds.
ragnaros.10_2: Release a wave of lava from Ragnaros's Core that travels down the targeted lane, dealing 240 (+4% per level) damage per second to non-Structure enemies in its path and instantly killing enemy Minions. Damage increased by 100% versus Heroes.
ragnaros.13_1: Empower Sulfuras heals for an additional 45% of damage dealt to Heroes over 2 seconds.
ragnaros.13_2: When Blast Wave damages an enemy Hero, gain a Shield equal to 100% of the damage dealt for 3 seconds.
ragnaros.13_3: When Ragnaros is Stunned, he gains 40 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 40%.  This effect has a 15 second cooldown.
ragnaros.16_1: Empower Sulfuras burns enemy Heroes for 9% of their maximum Health over 3 seconds. This additional damage does not heal Ragnaros.
ragnaros.16_2: Living Meteor explodes at the end of its path, dealing 220 (+4% per level) damage. Enemies at its center take 30% increased damage.
ragnaros.16_3: After Blast Wave explodes, another Blast Wave is created on Ragnaros.
ragnaros.20_1: Sulfuras Smash Slows enemies by 50% for 2.5 seconds, and the Stun duration of enemies hit in the center is increased by 1 second.
ragnaros.20_2: Lava Wave gains an additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by 30 seconds.
ragnaros.20_3: Molten Core has 25% increased Health and Damage, and its cooldown is reduced by 50 seconds.
ragnaros.20_4: Ragnaros submerges below, entering Stasis and healing for 600 (+4% per level) Health over 3 seconds.

raynor.1_1: Basic Attacks deal 50% more damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters. This is increased to 125% while Inspire is active.  Passive: Inspire does not expire on friendly Minions and Mercenaries.
raynor.1_2: Quest: Every time the primary target of Give 'Em Some Pepper is a Hero, permanently increase its damage bonus by 0.75%.  Gambit: Gain 60% bonus Give 'Em Some Pepper damage. Every death reduces this bonus by 15%.
raynor.1_3: Deal 12% more damage to Stunned or Slowed Heroes.  Enemy Heroes hit by Give 'Em Some Pepper are Slowed by 10% for 2.5 seconds.
raynor.4_1: Reduce Adrenaline Rush's cooldown by 10 seconds. Casting Adrenaline Rush grants 25 Armor for 3 seconds.
raynor.4_2: Give 'Em Some Pepper heals Raynor for 3% of his maximum Health, increased to 6% if the primary target is a Hero.
raynor.4_3: Gain 200 bonus maximum Health.   Quest: Every time Give 'Em Some Pepper's primary target is a Hero, gain an additional 8 maximum Health.
raynor.7_1: Increase Penetrating Round's Slow by 15% and its duration by 2 seconds.
raynor.7_2: Reduce the Mana cost of Adrenaline Rush from 75 to 45. While Inspire is active, increase Adrenaline Rush's cooldown reduction from Basic Attacks by 300%.
raynor.7_3: Increase the area of Give 'Em Some Pepper by 15%. Each enemy Hero hit by Give 'Em Some Pepper grants Raynor 10 Mana and reduces the cooldown of Penetrating Round by 1.5 seconds.
raynor.10_1: Order the Hyperion to make a strafing run for 12 seconds, hitting up to 4 enemies for 66 (+4% per level) damage every second. Every 4 seconds, it can fire its Yamato Cannon at a Structure, dealing 794 (+4% per level) damage.
raynor.10_2: Summon a Banshee that assists Raynor. The Banshee deals 84 (+4% per level) damage per second and regenerates 75 (+4% per level) Health per second if it hasn't taken damage in the last 4 seconds. Can reactivate to retarget or move the Banshee.  The Banshee respawns automatically after 45 seconds.
raynor.13_1: Reduce the cooldown of Penetrating Round by 3 seconds. Penetrating Round hitting two or more enemy Heroes reduces its cooldown by an additional 3 seconds.
raynor.13_2: Gain 10% Movement Speed while mounted and unmounted. Inspire grants 10% more Movement Speed.
raynor.13_3: Increase Adrenaline Rush healing by 50%. While Inspire is active, gain 1 Basic Attack range.
raynor.16_1: Increase the damage of Penetrating Round by 50% and heal for 90% of the damage Penetrating Round deals to Heroes.
raynor.16_2: Increase the Attack Speed bonus of Inspire by 20%.  Passive: After every 12 Basic Attacks, cast Inspire for free.
raynor.16_3: If Give 'Em Some Pepper's target is a Hero, it deals an additional 3% of their maximum Health as damage and grants Raynor 10 Armor for 3 seconds.  Activate Give 'Em Some Pepper to apply it to Raynor's next Basic Attack.
raynor.20_1: Give 'Em Some Pepper lowers the cooldown of Hyperion by 5 seconds if the primary target is a Hero. These Heroes are targeted by the Hyperion for 100% increased damage for 6 seconds.
raynor.20_2: Increase the Health and leash range of Raynor's Raider by 100%. Its Basic Attack lowers enemy Hero Armor by 3 for 1 second, stacking up to 30.
raynor.20_3: Adrenaline Rush grants Unstoppable and continues healing for an additional 2 seconds. The additional duration ends upon reaching 70% Health.
raynor.20_4: Give 'Em Some Pepper now activates every 3 Basic Attacks.
raynor.20_5: Reduce Raynor's death timer by 35 seconds. Upon death, the Hyperion is cast towards the closest enemy Hero.

rehgar.1_1: Increase the radius of Lightning Shield by 25%.  Quest: Each time Lightning Shield damages an enemy Hero, permanently increase Rehgar's Health by 2 and Mana by 1, stacking up to 300 times.
rehgar.1_2: Reactivate Earthbind Totem to move an existing totem to a new location. This can be used once per cast.  Passive: Increase Earthbind Totem's area and duration by 50%, and Health by 25%.
rehgar.1_3: Ghost Wolf's Movement Speed bonus is increased to 40% for the first second, then falls to 30%. Entering or exiting Ghost Wolf form grants 15 Armor for 1 second.
rehgar.4_1: When Chain Heal heals a Hero below 50% Health, they are healed an additional 160 (+4% per level) Health over 4 seconds.
rehgar.4_2: The bearer of Lightning Shield Heals for 20% of the damage it deals to enemy Heroes, doubled if the bearer is Rehgar.  While Lightning Shield is damaging an enemy, its bearer gains 10% increased Movement Speed.
rehgar.4_3: Activate to place a Totem that heals allied Heroes in an area for 2% of their maximum Health every second. This Totem has 125 (+4% per level) Health and lasts for 10 seconds.
rehgar.7_1: Enemy Heroes in Earthbind Totem's area also have their Attack Speed Slowed by 25% and their Spell Power reduced by 15%.  Passive: Increase Earthbind Totem's range by 50%.
rehgar.7_2: If Purge removes a Slow, Stun, Root, or Silence effect from an ally, heal them for 220 (+4% per level).  Using Purge on an enemy Hero deals up to 330 (+4% per level) damage to Shields and reduces healing received by 40% for 2 seconds.  Passive: Reduce Purge's cooldown by 15 seconds.
rehgar.7_3: Ghost Wolf attacks reduce Basic Ability cooldowns by 1.5 seconds and restore 5% of Rehgar's maximum Mana.
rehgar.10_1: After 1 second, heal an allied Hero for 1180 (+4% per level) Health.
rehgar.10_2: Grant nearby allied Heroes 40% Attack Speed and 35% Movement Speed and causes them to heal for 30% of the Basic Attack damage to their primary target. Lasts for 6 seconds.
rehgar.13_1: Reduces Chain Heal's cooldown by 1 second for each Hero healed, and reduces its Mana cost from 60 to 40.
rehgar.13_2: Lightning Shield gives Heroes a Shield that absorbs damage equal to 14% of their maximum Health for 3 seconds.
rehgar.13_3: Every 2 seconds, Earthbind Totem will cast an untalented Chain Heal at the nearest allied Hero with the lowest Health. This Chain Heal heals for 35% of its normal amount.
rehgar.16_1: Every time a Lighting Shield damages an enemy Hero, increase its damage by 10%. Stacks up to 15 times.  Passive: Increase the duration of Lightning Shield by 3 seconds.
rehgar.16_2: When Earthbind Totem is first cast, it deals 115 (+4% per level) damage and Slows nearby enemies by 90% for 1 second.
rehgar.16_3: Ghost Wolf attacks against Heroes deal an additional 6% of the target's maximum Health and heal Rehgar for 6% of his maximum Health.
rehgar.20_1: After 1.5 seconds, Ancestral Healing is cast a second time on the same target. Allies near the target are healed for 590 (+4% per level).
rehgar.20_2: Increase the duration and range of Bloodlust by 100%.
rehgar.20_3: Activate to gain Lightning Shield and grant all nearby allied Heroes a Shield equal to 10% of their maximum Health for 5 seconds.  For up to 5 seconds after activating, hitting an enemy Hero with this effects' Lightning Shield gives nearby allies a Shield equal to 1.5% of their maximum Health for 5 seconds.
rehgar.20_4: Gain 10% increased Attack Damage and 3 Spell Power. Each nearby ally Hero grants an additional stack of this effect, up to 5 stacks.  While at 2 or more stacks, Purge's cooldown refreshes 50% faster.

rexxar.1_1: Increases Spirit Swoop's damage by 150% to Minions.
rexxar.1_2: Increases Misha's basic attack damage to Minions and Mercenaries by 150%, and Misha gains 50 Armor against Minions and Mercenaries, reducing damage taken by 50%.
rexxar.1_3: Fire a flare at an area, revealing it for 20 seconds.
rexxar.4_1: Misha's Basic Attacks heal her for 4.5% of her maximum Health.
rexxar.4_2: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Rexxar and Misha's Health Regeneration by 1 per second, up to 25 per second.  Reward: After gathering 25 Globes, Rexxar and Misha gain 15 Armor.
rexxar.4_3: Every 6 seconds, Rexxar and Misha gain 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%.  Stores up to 2 charges. Both Rexxar and Misha have their own charges.
rexxar.4_4: Rexxar and Misha gain 2 Maximum Health every second Rexxar remains alive. These bonuses are lost on Rexxar's death.
rexxar.7_1: Increases Spirit Swoop's slow amount to 50% and its duration to 3.5 seconds.
rexxar.7_2: Increases Spirit Swoop's range by 20%. If Spirit Swoop hits an enemy Hero, the Mana cost is refunded and its cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.
rexxar.7_3: Misha's Basic Attacks lower the cooldown of Misha, Charge! by 1 second.
rexxar.10_1: Increases Misha's Basic Attack damage by 200% for 12 seconds.
rexxar.10_2: Release a herd of boars that track down all enemy Heroes in a direction, dealing 110 (+4% per level) damage, revealing, and slowing enemies by 40% for 5 seconds.
rexxar.13_1: When Spirit Swoop hits an enemy Hero, Rexxar gains 125% Attack Speed for 4 seconds. Misha's Basic Attacks increase the duration of this buff by 0.75 seconds.
rexxar.13_2: Rexxar and Misha's Basic Attacks increase the damage of the next Misha, Charge! by 15%, stacking up to a 150% bonus.
rexxar.13_3: Misha deals 28 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies.
rexxar.16_1: Rexxar's Basic Attacks increase both his and Misha's Movement Speed by 25% for 2 seconds.
rexxar.16_2: Activate to slow the Attack Speed by 50% and Movement Speed by 20% of Heroes and Summons near Rexxar and Misha for 2.5 seconds.  Passive: Heroes and Summons that attack Rexxar or Misha have their Attack Speed slowed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
rexxar.16_3: Rexxar fakes his death, becoming Invulnerable and untargetable for 5 seconds. During this time you control Misha.
rexxar.20_1: Increases the duration of Bestial Wrath by 50% and Misha's Basic Attacks heal Rexxar for 50% of her damage dealt during Bestial Wrath.
rexxar.20_2: Unleash the Boars deals 50% more damage and roots for 1.5 seconds.
rexxar.20_3: Rexxar's Basic Attacks deal 10% more damage, and Misha's Basic Attacks slow the target by 20% for 1.25 seconds.
rexxar.20_4: Rexxar and Misha gain 75 Armor for 4 seconds, reducing damage taken by 75%.

samuro.1_1: Quest: Every time a Mirror Image Critically Strikes a Hero, Samuro gains 0.25 Attack Damage, up to 10.  Reward: After hitting 40 Heroes, Samuro gains an additional 30 Attack Damage.
samuro.1_2: Critical Strike now happens for Samuro and his Mirror Images every 3rd Basic Attack.   Samuro and his Mirror Images' Critical Strikes against enemy Heroes reduce their Physical Armor by 5 for 2.25 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.
samuro.1_3: Gain 40% Movement Speed for 3 seconds after entering or exiting Wind Walk.  Casting Wind Walk heals Samuro for 4% of his maximum Health.
samuro.4_1: Mirror Image grants Samuro and his Images 40 Spell Armor against the next 2 sources of Spell Damage, reducing their damage by 40%.
samuro.4_2: While Samuro has Wind Walk active and for 3 seconds after breaking it, both he and his Mirror Images gain 30 Armor, taking 30% reduced damage from all sources.
samuro.4_3: Advancing Strikes grants Samuro and his Mirror Images 35 Physical Armor.
samuro.7_1: Critical Strikes from Samuro and Mirror Images deal an additional 50% of their Basic Attack damage as Spell Damage to the target and nearby enemies.
samuro.7_2: Samuro's Critical Strikes against enemy Heroes deal an additional 35% of his Basic Attack damage for each Mirror Image that is active and reduce the cooldown of Image Transmission by 1 second.
samuro.7_3: Samuro's Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Critical Strike by 2 seconds.   Critical Strikes against enemy Heroes increase Samuro's Basic Attack damage by 10% for 4 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.
samuro.10_1: Cause a Bladestorm of destructive force around Samuro for 3 seconds, granting him 25 Armor and dealing 180 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies.
samuro.10_2: Mirror Images can be controlled individually or as a group and their damage is increased by 100%.  Passive: Image Transmission's cooldown is reduced to 8 seconds.
samuro.13_1: Samuro's Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Mirror Image by 0.75 seconds.
samuro.13_2: Wind Walk creates a Mirror Image at Samuro's location that will continue whatever he was doing.
samuro.13_3: Wind Walk teleports Samuro a short distance in the direction he's currently facing.
samuro.16_1: Samuro's Basic Attacks against Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed enemies are always Critical Strikes.
samuro.16_2: Attacking a Hero during Wind Walk causes them to take 30% increased damage from Samuro for 3 seconds.
samuro.16_3: While Advancing Strikes is active, Samuro and his Mirror Images gain 10% Attack Speed every time they Basic Attack, up to 40%.
samuro.20_1: Mirror Images use Bladestorm when Samuro does, but for 45% damage.  If Samuro hits at least 20 enemy Heroes with Bladestorm, then reset its cooldown.
samuro.20_2: Samuro's Mirror Images only deal half of the damage they take to themselves, effectively increasing their Health by 25% and their duration is increased to 16 seconds.
samuro.20_3: Wind Walk's cooldown is reduced by 6 seconds.
samuro.20_4: Advancing Strikes grants an additional 15% Movement Speed for Samuro and his Mirror Images, and its duration is increased by 2 seconds.

sgt-hammer.1_1: Gain Stealth when entering Siege Mode or after not taking or dealing damage for 3 seconds while in Siege Mode. Basic Attacks while Stealthed deal 125% more damage.  Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.
sgt-hammer.1_2: Increase Siege Mode's splash damage to 60% of Basic Attack damage, and increase its splash radius by 25%.
sgt-hammer.1_3: Activate to increase Basic Attack damage dealt by 30% for 5 seconds. Hitting enemy Heroes or Structures with Basic Attacks while in Siege Mode reduces the cooldown of Maelstrom Rounds by 5 seconds.  Stores up to 3 charges.
sgt-hammer.4_1: Reduce Concussive Blast's cooldown by 4 seconds, its Mana cost by 40, and when cast create an impassable wall in front of Sgt. Hammer for 4 seconds.
sgt-hammer.4_2: Using Neosteel Plating while in Siege Mode grants Unstoppable for 2 seconds, as long as she remains in Siege Mode.
sgt-hammer.4_3: Basic Attacks while in Siege Mode heal for 10% of the damage dealt.
sgt-hammer.7_1: Spider Mines detonate 3 times over 3 seconds.  Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant 5 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Spider Mines by 1.5 seconds.  Increase this bonus to 2.5 seconds while in Siege Mode.
sgt-hammer.7_2: Sgt. Hammer can move at 50% Movement Speed while in Siege Mode.
sgt-hammer.7_3: While in Siege Mode, Basic Attack range is increased by 1 every 1.5 seconds, up to 3.
sgt-hammer.10_1: Fire a missile across the battlefield, dealing 500 (+3% per level) damage to non-Structure enemies in its path.
sgt-hammer.10_2: Deals 164 (+4% per level) damage on impact, and leaves a napalm area that deals 50 (+4% per level) damage per second. Lasts for 4 seconds.
sgt-hammer.13_1: Moving while Thrusters is active leaves a trail of up to 5 Spider Mines. Additionally, increase the Slow of Spider Mines by 15%.
sgt-hammer.13_2: While in Siege Mode, Concussive Blasts's damage and knockback distance are increased by 75%.
sgt-hammer.13_3: While in Siege Mode, hitting Heroes with Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Thrusters by 5 seconds.
sgt-hammer.16_1: Neosteel Plating grants 20% maximum Health as a Shield for 2 seconds and increases Basic Attack damage by 30% for 5 seconds.
sgt-hammer.16_2: Attacking a Hero that is slowed, rooted, or stunned increases your Basic Attack damage by 30% for 3 seconds.
sgt-hammer.16_3: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 1.5% of the Hero's maximum Health.
sgt-hammer.20_1: Blunt Force Gun's missile orbits the planet every 5 seconds. Only the last missile fired orbits.
sgt-hammer.20_2: Napalm Strike's range is increased by 75% and its impact does 50% more damage.
sgt-hammer.20_3: Upon detonating, Spider Mines reduce the Armor of enemy Heroes hit by 10, up to 50, for 4 seconds.
sgt-hammer.20_4: Hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Attacks while in Siege Mode grants 10% Attack Speed for 5 seconds, up to 60%.

sonya.1_1: Every 4th cast of Seismic Slam deals 40% more damage to the primary target and costs no Fury.
sonya.1_2: Sonya's Basic Attacks heal for 30% of the damage dealt.
sonya.1_3: Every 16 seconds, gain 60 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 60%.  Stores up to 3 charges. Charges refresh 200% faster while Fury's Movement Speed bonus is active.
sonya.4_1: Increase Seismic Slam's splash damage by 250%. Targeting a Hero with Seismic Slam further increases its splash damage by 250%, while targeting other enemies increases the length of its splash by 66%.
sonya.4_2: Reduce the cooldown of Whirlwind by 2 seconds. Casting Whirlwind removes all Slows and Roots from Sonya.
sonya.4_3: Activate to gain 50 Fury. Usable while Whirlwinding.  Passive: After casting Seismic Slam, your next Basic Attack deals 40% more damage.
sonya.7_1: Ancient Spear deals an additional 100% damage over 6 seconds.
sonya.7_2: Increases the healing of Whirlwind to 35% of damage dealt.
sonya.7_3: Activate to instantly restore 10% of Sonya's maximum Health. Stores up to 2 charges. Usable while Whirlwinding.  Passive: Sonya deals 25% more damage to Mercenaries.
sonya.10_1: Leap into the air, dealing 135 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies, and stunning them for 1.25 seconds.
sonya.10_2: Increase damage dealt by 40%. Reduce the duration of Stuns, Roots, and Slows against Sonya by 50%. Lasts 15 seconds, and extends by 1 second for every 10 Fury gained.
sonya.13_1: Ancient Spear always pulls Sonya to the target location even if it doesn't hit an enemy. When used this way, Ancient Spear's cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds.
sonya.13_2: Whirlwind deals an additional 50 (+4% per level) damage per second to Heroes below 50% Health. Does not generate additional healing.
sonya.13_3: Increases the Movement Speed bonus from using Basic and Heroic Abilities to 20%.
sonya.16_1: Basic Attacks and Seismic Slam deal an additional 1.5% of Heroes' maximum Health as damage and heal Sonya for 60% of the damage dealt.
sonya.16_2: Increase Basic Attack damage by 25%. Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Ancient Spear by 1.5 seconds.
sonya.16_3: Activate to gain 25% of your maximum Health as a Shield for 3 seconds. Usable while Whirlwinding.
sonya.20_1: Leap leaves behind an impassable crater for 5 seconds.  Reduces Leap's cooldown by 20 seconds.
sonya.20_2: Wrath of the Berserker increases maximum Health by 10% and grants Striding Giant, which can be activated to become Unstoppable for 2 seconds. 30 second cooldown.
sonya.20_3: Increases Ancient Spear's range by 50%. Hitting an enemy Hero with Ancient Spear grants 25 Armor for 4 seconds.
sonya.20_4: Activate to gain 60 Armor for 4 seconds, taking 60% less damage. Usable while Whirlwinding.

stitches.1_1: Gain 3 Armor for every unit afflicted with Vile Gas, stacking up to 8 times. While Shambling Horror is active, this Armor amount is doubled.  Passive: Increase regeneration effects and all healing received by 15%.
stitches.1_2: Quest: Hitting an enemy Hero with Devour increases Stitches' Health Regeneration by 1.5 and the damage of Vile Gas by 2%, stacking up to 100 times.
stitches.1_3: Gain 5% Movement Speed.  Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Stitches's maximum Health by 25.  Reward: Every 20 Globes gathered permanently increases Stitches' Movement Speed by an additional 5%.
stitches.4_1: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Slam by 0.75 seconds and restores 5 Mana. Hitting Heroes with the inner area of Slam reduces its cooldown by 1.5 seconds.
stitches.4_2: Basic Attacks against enemies with Vile Gas deal 35% more damage and spreads Vile Gas to nearby enemies.  Passive: Slam applies Vile Gas to all targets hit.
stitches.4_3: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes Slow by 20% for 1.5 seconds and restore 1.75% of Stitches' maximum Health.
stitches.7_1: Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook deals bonus damage equal to 5% of their maximum Health, reduces Hook's cooldown by 4 seconds, and restores 35 Mana.
stitches.7_2: Devour gains 1 additional charge with a 6 second cooldown between uses.  Gambit: If Stitches is at max Health after using Devour, he gains a Shield equal to 15% of his maximum Health for 10 seconds. Every death, reduce this Shield by 3%.
stitches.7_3: While Shambling Horror is active, Vile Gas reduces healing received by 40%.  Passive: Vile Gas heals Stitches for 75% of the damage dealt.
stitches.10_1: Emit bile that deals 37 (+4% per level) damage per second to enemies within, Slowing them by 35% for 1.5 seconds. Gain 20% Movement Speed while emitting bile. Lasts 8 seconds.
stitches.10_2: Consume an enemy Hero, trapping them for 4 seconds. When Gorge ends, the enemy Hero takes 274 (+4% per level) damage. The trapped Hero cannot move or act and doesn't take damage from other sources.
stitches.13_1: Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook heals Stitches for 20% of his maximum Health over 5 seconds. While active, Basic Attacks against the Hero hit refresh the duration of this effect.
stitches.13_2: Increase Slam's damage by 25.  Quest: After damaging Heroes with Vile Gas 6 times, permanently increase the damage of Slam by 1, to a maximum of 75 additional damage.
stitches.13_3: Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook or activating Shambling Horror grants 40% increased Attack Speed for 4 seconds. Basic Attacks refresh the duration of this effect.
stitches.16_1: All enemies hit by Slam are Slowed by 70% for 0.75 seconds and Heroes have their Armor reduced by 10 for 3 seconds.
stitches.16_2: Devour deals an additional 140 (+4% per level) damage over 5 seconds. When used on a Hero, its cooldown is reduced by 4 seconds and causes the Hero hit to deal 50% reduced damage for 4 seconds.
stitches.16_3: Deals 15 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook or activating Shambling Horror increases this damage by 150% for 4 seconds.
stitches.20_1: Putrid Bile deals 100% more damage to Heroes.  Quest: Each time Putrid Bile damages an enemy Hero, the duration of Stitches' next death timer is reduced by 2%, to a maximum of 80% total reduction. All stacks of this effect are lost upon death.
stitches.20_2: For 4 seconds after using Gorge, Stitches can teleport a short distance to additional targets and Gorge them. Enemies are Slowed by 75% for 1 second after Gorge ends.
stitches.20_3: Reduce the cooldown of Hook by 4 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit by Hook have 75% reduced healing for 2 seconds. Allies hit by Helping Hand are Unkillable for 2 seconds.
stitches.20_4: Activating Shambling Horror grants Unstoppable for 3 seconds.  Passive: Shambling Horror's cooldown is reduced by 20 seconds.

stukov.1_1: Basic Attacks become ranged and Slow enemies by 20% for 1.5 seconds, but deal 35% less damage. This effect can be toggled.  Quest: Hit Heroes with Weighted Pustule.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, reduce the cooldown of Weighted Pustule by 5 seconds and remove its Mana cost.
stukov.1_2: Lurking Arm deals 100% more damage to enemy Heroes below 50% Health and persists for 1 second after it is canceled.
stukov.1_3: While below 50% Health, the cooldown of Bio-Kill Switch refreshes 100% faster.  Activate to instantly spread a Weighted Pustule to all nearby enemy Heroes and reset the cooldown of Bio-Kill Switch.  This effect has a 75 second cooldown.
stukov.4_1: After a Healing Pathogen infests 3 targets, restore 10 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Healing Pathogen by 2 seconds.
stukov.4_2: Healing Pathogen grants 10 Physical Armor to targets while active on them. Detonating Bio-Kill Switch increases this bonus to 50 for 2.5 seconds.
stukov.4_3: Bio-Kill Switch heals for 30% more when detonating 3 or more Healing Pathogens.
stukov.7_1: Increase the range of Weighted Pustule by 50%. Detonating 2 or more Weighted Pustules causes Stukov's Bio-Kill Switch and Basic Ability cooldowns to recharge 100% faster for 4 seconds.
stukov.7_2: Lurking Arm's area expands by 50% over 2.5 seconds, but it cannot be Channeled for longer than 3 seconds.
stukov.7_3: Detonating exactly 1 Weighted Pustule (but any number of Healing Pathogens) with Bio-Kill Switch reduces the cooldown of Bio-Kill Switch to 7 seconds and other Basic Abilities by 1.5 seconds.
stukov.10_1: Swipe 3 times in front of Stukov over 1.75 seconds, dealing 48 (+4% per level) damage to enemies hit and knocking them away. Each swipe is larger than the previous.
stukov.10_2: Extend Stukov's arm. If it hits an enemy Hero, they are rapidly shoved until they collide with terrain, dealing 190 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds. Stukov gains 50 Armor while shoving an enemy.
stukov.13_1: Increase the range of Lurking Arm by 30%. If Lurking Arm damages enemy Heroes 8 times, its cooldown is reset and its Mana cost is refunded.
stukov.13_2: Detonating a Weighted Pustule on an enemy who is inside of Lurking Arm Roots them for 1.5 seconds.
stukov.13_3: Detonating Weighted Pustule with Bio-Kill Switch within 1.5 seconds of its expiration increases its damage by 150% and applies its damage and Slow in an area. Enemy Heroes hit have a Weighted Pustule applied to them.
stukov.16_1: Whenever an ally with Healing Pathogen is Stunned or Rooted, they are instantly healed for 300 (+4% per level) Health.
stukov.16_2: Healing Pathogen can continually spread through Stukov, but its healing is reduced by 25%.
stukov.16_3: Bio-Kill Switch no longer removes Healing Pathogen but instead sets its duration to 3 seconds.
stukov.20_1: Flailing Swipe gains 2 additional charges, but each use only swings 1 time, at maximum range.  Additionally, its cooldown is decreased to 25 seconds, and its Mana cost is reduced from 60 to 25.
stukov.20_2: Massive Shove Slows its target by 50% for 4 seconds upon colliding with terrain. If Massive Shove pushes a target for more than 1.25 seconds, its cooldown is reduced by 15 seconds.
stukov.20_3: Healing Pathogen's heal over time is increased by 30% while its target is above 60% Health.
stukov.20_4: Bio-Kill Switch now also detonates Lurking Arm, dealing 230 (+4% per level) damage, applying a Weighted Pustule, and Silencing enemy Heroes inside for 2.5 seconds.

sylvanas.1_1: Hitting an enemy Hero with Withering Fire increases Sylvanas's Attack Speed and Spell Power by 5% for 6 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.
sylvanas.1_2: Quest: Each time an enemy Hero with 3 stacks of Banshee's Curse is hit by Shadow Dagger, its damage is permanently increased by 0.5%.
sylvanas.1_3: Enemy Heroes with 3 stacks of Banshee's Curse are Slowed by 15%. Sylvanas's Basic Attacks against Slowed enemy Heroes deal 1% of their maximum Health as damage.
sylvanas.4_1: Minions that die under the effects of Shadow Dagger or Sylvanas's Traits explode, dealing 130 (+4% per level) damage to nearby Minions, Mercenaries, and Summons.
sylvanas.4_2: Friendly non-Elite Mercenaries near Sylvanas deal 60% more damage. Sylvanas Stuns and deals 30% additional damage to Mercenaries with 3 stacks of Banshee's Curse.
sylvanas.4_3: Activate to force an enemy Minion to fight for Sylvanas's team. Catapults require 3 charges. Stores up to 3 charges.
sylvanas.7_1: Hitting the same enemy with 5 shots of Withering Fire causes the 5th shot to deal 350% bonus damage.
sylvanas.7_2: Increase Shadow Dagger's damage by 10%.  Basic Attacks against Heroes with 3 stacks of Banshee's Curse reduce the cooldown of Shadow Dagger by 1.75 seconds.
sylvanas.7_3: Increase Haunting Wave's damage by 15%. Haunting Wave applies 3 stacks of Banshee's Curse.
sylvanas.10_1: Shoot an arrow that can be reactivated to deal 228 (+4% per level) damage and Silence enemies in an area for 2.5 seconds. The arrow detonates automatically if it reaches maximum range.
sylvanas.10_2: After 0.25 seconds, fire a missile that Mind Controls the first enemy Hero hit. Heroes hit are Silenced, Slowed by 30%, have 3 stacks of Banshee's Curse applied to them, and are forced to walk towards Sylvanas for 1.75 seconds.
sylvanas.13_1: Shadow Dagger reduces the Armor of the initial target by 25 and any enemy it spreads to by 10 for 2.5 seconds.
sylvanas.13_2: Haunting Wave can be cast a second time for free within 5 seconds after teleporting. Teleporting with Haunting Wave resets the cooldown of Withering Fire.
sylvanas.13_3: Increase Sylvanas's Basic Attack range by 1. Sylvanas's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes with 3 stacks of Banshee's Curse shoot an untalented shot of Withering Fire. This shot of Withering Fire applies Banshee's Curse.
sylvanas.16_1: Hitting an enemy with Withering Fire grants 6% Movement Speed for 2 seconds, up to 30%. Basic Attacks refresh this duration.
sylvanas.16_2: Heal for 15% of damage dealt by Sylvanas to enemies with 3 stacks of Banshee's Curse. Healing is doubled against Heroes.
sylvanas.16_3: Activate to become Unstoppable and gain 40% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
sylvanas.20_1: Enemies at the center of Wailing Arrow's explosion take 50% more damage and are Silenced for twice as long.
sylvanas.20_2: Heroes hit by Mind Control have their vision radius greatly reduced for 5 seconds. Mind Control's cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds.
sylvanas.20_3: Withering Fire applies Banshee's Curse, and Heroes hit by Withering Fire reduce its cooldown by 0.75 seconds.
sylvanas.20_4: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.

tassadar.1_1: Quest: Heroes hit by Shock Ray permanently increases its damage by 5 and grants 33% Resonance Beam charge.  Maximum of 200 bonus damage.
tassadar.1_2: Increases the range of Psionic Storm by 33%. Each non-Structure enemy hit by Psionic Storm restores 0.5 Mana, increased to 5 against Heroes.
tassadar.1_3: Quest: Resonance Beam charges 50% faster.  Reward: After Resonance Beam has been fully charged for 80 seconds, it bounces to hit 1 additional target for 75% damage, prioritizing Heroes.  Reward: After Resonance Beam has been fully charged for 160 seconds, it bounces to hit 2 additional targets for 75% damage, prioritizing Heroes.
tassadar.4_1: Tassadar gains 10% increased Movement Speed. Casting Shock Ray increases this bonus to 30% for 3 seconds.
tassadar.4_2: Force Wall deals 92 (+4% per level) damage a second to nearby enemies and Slows them by 35%.
tassadar.4_3: While Resonance Beam is fully charged, gain a Shield equal to 3% of max Health every second, stacking up to 12%.
tassadar.7_1: While Resonance Beam is fully charged, Shock Ray's cooldown refreshes 100% faster and its Slow duration is increased to 4 seconds.  Passive: Reduce the Mana cost of Shock Ray from 55 to 40.
tassadar.7_2: Casting Psionic Storm causes your next Shock Ray within 3 seconds to only cost 30 Mana and create a Psionic Storm on the first enemy Hero hit.
tassadar.7_3: When Resonance Beam is fully charged, Tassadar's Basic Attack range is increased by 1 and its next instance of damage also creates a Psionic Storm on the target.  This effect has a 20 second cooldown that decays twice as fast while Resonance Beam is fully charged.
tassadar.10_1: Tassadar transforms into an Archon, gaining a Shield equal to 25% of his maximum Health and empowering Resonance Beam. Lasts for 12 seconds.  Resonance Beam: Deals 140 (+4% per level) damage to the target and splashes 70 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies. Heroes hit have their Spell Armor reduced by 20 for 2 seconds. Resonance Beam is fully charged while Archon is active.
tassadar.10_2: After a 0.5 second cast, create a Black Hole that travels in a long line. Enemy Heroes within the Black Hole's area are quickly pulled towards its center. Touching the center deals 310 (+4% per level) damage and Stuns the target for 1.25 seconds.
tassadar.13_1: When an enemy Hero is affected by Psionic Storm, Resonance Beam's Slow is increased to 50% and it reduces Physical Armor by 25.
tassadar.13_2: Tassadar becomes Stealthed and Unrevealable, but cannot attack or use Abilities for 1.5 seconds. While this effect is active, gain 40% increased Movement Speed and 35 Armor.  Can be cast while Channeling Shock Ray.
tassadar.13_3: Passive: While stationary, gain 30 Spell Armor for 0.75 seconds and restore 12 (+4% per level) Health a second.  Activate to Channel for up to 4 seconds, revealing a gradually increasing area anywhere on the map.
tassadar.16_1: Shock Ray deals an additional 8% of maximum Health as damage to the first Hero it hits.
tassadar.16_3: Activate to gain full Resonance Beam charge, 20% Spell Power, and cause Basic and Heroic Ability cooldowns to regenerate 25% faster. This effect lasts as long as Resonance Beam remains at full charge.
tassadar.20_1: Basic Attacks while in Archon form increase its duration by 2 seconds.
tassadar.20_2: Enemy Heroes hit by Black Hole's center have their Armor reduced by 20 for 3 seconds and have a Psionic Storm created at their location.
tassadar.20_3: Increase the duration of Force Wall by 0.5 seconds, its range by 50%, and reduce its cooldown by 10 seconds.
tassadar.20_4: Gain 4% Spell Power for yourself and each nearby ally Hero, up to 20% total Spell Power. Your total bonus is shared with all contributing allies.

the-butcher.1_1: If Hamstring hits a Hero, half of the Mana cost is refunded and the cooldown is reduced by 1 second.
the-butcher.1_2: Every 5 seconds, gain 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%.  Stores up to 2 charges.
the-butcher.1_3: Increases Hamstring damage by 100% to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
the-butcher.4_1: Increases the length of Hamstring by 40%.
the-butcher.4_2: Reduces the cooldown of Ruthless Onslaught by 33% upon impact.
the-butcher.4_3: Hamstring does 100% more damage to targets affected by a Slow, Root, or Stun.
the-butcher.7_1: While facing a branded enemy, The Butcher's Movement Speed is increased by 25%.
the-butcher.7_2: Every time a nearby enemy minion dies, The Butcher heals 5% of his maximum health.
the-butcher.7_3: When Ruthless Onslaught impacts an enemy Hero, The Butcher gains 50 Spell Armor for 2.5 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 50%.
the-butcher.10_1: After a 3 second delay, fire explodes around The Butcher dealing 500 (+4% per level) damage to enemies.  Can be cast while using Ruthless Onslaught.
the-butcher.10_2: Throw a hitching post that attaches to the nearest enemy Hero after a 1 second delay. This deals 171 (+4% per level) damage and causes the enemy to be chained to the post and Silenced for 3 seconds.
the-butcher.13_1: Basic Attacks deal 35% of The Butcher's Basic Attack Damage in an area around the target.
the-butcher.13_2: Ruthless Onslaught deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 10% of their maximum Health.
the-butcher.13_3: After using Hamstring, The Butcher's next 3 Basic Attacks within 5 seconds deal an additional 15% damage.
the-butcher.16_1: Hamstring's slow no longer fades out, and the duration is increased by 30%.
the-butcher.16_2: While below 50% of his maximum Health, taking damage causes The Butcher to become Enraged for 10 seconds, gaining 40% Attack Speed and 25 Armor, reducing damage taken by 25%.  This effect has a 25 second cooldown.
the-butcher.16_3: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant 5% increased Attack and Movement Speed for 3 seconds, up to 25%.
the-butcher.20_1: Furnace Blast explodes a second time 3 seconds after the initial explosion.
the-butcher.20_2: Lamb to the Slaughter now chains all enemy Heroes in range.
the-butcher.20_3: Basic Attacks deal 20% more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by 20% for 1 second.
the-butcher.20_4: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.

the-lost-vikings.1_1: Passive: Olaf gains 20% bonus maximum Health.  Every 5 seconds, Olaf gains 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%.  Stores up to 2 charges.
the-lost-vikings.1_2: After standing still for 3 seconds, Erik gains Stealth and his Sight Radius is increased by 75%. The Stealth persists for 3 seconds after moving and once removed, Erik gains 75% bonus Basic Attack damage for 6 seconds.
the-lost-vikings.1_3: Increases Baleog's splash damage against non-Heroes to 100%.
the-lost-vikings.1_4: Enemy Minions or captured Mercenaries killed near The Lost Vikings grant stacks of Bribe. Use 40 stacks to bribe target Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries. Maximum stacks available: 200.
the-lost-vikings.4_1: Baleog's Basic Attacks and splash damage heal for 20% of the damage dealt. Healing is doubled against Heroes.
the-lost-vikings.4_2: Permanently increases Erik's base Movement Speed by 10%, and as long as Erik is moving he heals 34 (+4% per level) Health per second.
the-lost-vikings.4_3: Erik's Basic Attacks against Structures light them on fire for 3 seconds, causing 225 (+4% per level) damage.
the-lost-vikings.4_4: Friendly non-Boss Mercenaries near your Hero deal 50% more damage. Gain 50 Armor against Minions and Mercenaries, reducing the damage taken by 50%.
the-lost-vikings.7_1: Increase Baleog's attack range by 2.5.  While near Olaf and Erik, he becomes inspired by the power of teamwork and his Attack Speed is increased by 50%.
the-lost-vikings.7_2: Activate to have each Viking deal 85 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.  Deals 100% bonus damage to enemy Heroes.
the-lost-vikings.7_3: All Vikings gain a 140 (+4% per level) to 308 (+4% per level) point Shield, increasing in strength for each Viking alive. Lasts 4 seconds.
the-lost-vikings.10_1: Hop into an Unstoppable Longboat that fires at nearby enemies for 128 (+4% per level) damage per second and can fire a mortar that deals 228 (+4% per level) damage in an area.  The boat has increased Health for each Viking inside. If the boat is destroyed by enemies, all Vikings are Stunned for 1 second. Lasts 15 seconds.  Requires all surviving Vikings to be nearby.
the-lost-vikings.10_2: Summon, fully heal, and revive all Lost Vikings at target location after a Viking channels for 2 seconds.  Only one Viking may attempt to summon at a time.
the-lost-vikings.13_1: Olaf deals 34 (+4% per level) damage every second to nearby enemies.
the-lost-vikings.13_2: Makes all Vikings Invulnerable and able to pass over enemies for 1.5 seconds.
the-lost-vikings.13_3: While Olaf, Baleog, and Erik are near each of the other two Vikings, their Basic Attacks deal bonus damage equal to 1.25% maximum Health to enemy Heroes.
the-lost-vikings.16_1: When Olaf charges enemies, they are stunned for 1 second.
the-lost-vikings.16_2: Enemies damaged by a Viking's Basic Attack reduce the cooldown of all Viking Abilities by 0.31 seconds.
the-lost-vikings.16_3: Activating Go Go Go! grants an additional 40% Movement Speed and breaks the Vikings out of Roots and Slows.
the-lost-vikings.16_4: Attacking a Hero that is slowed, rooted, or stunned increases your Basic Attack damage by 30% for 3 seconds.
the-lost-vikings.20_1: The Longboat can attack two targets at once and the range of its Mortar is increased by 100%. Reduce Longboat Raid!'s cooldown by 30 seconds.
the-lost-vikings.20_2: 10 seconds after using Play Again!, any dead Vikings are revived and summoned again, and all are healed to full.
the-lost-vikings.20_3: Reduces the Lost Vikings's death timer by 50%.
the-lost-vikings.20_4: Every 5 seconds, the next Basic Attack will deal an additional 41 (+4% per level) damage to the target, and 105 (+4% per level) damage to all nearby Minions, Mercenaries and Monsters.  Each Viking has their own cooldown.

thrall.1_1: Quest: Kill Minions or Heroes within 1.5 seconds of hitting them with Chain Lightning.  Reward: After killing 10 enemies, reduce the Mana cost of Chain Lightning from 40 to 20.  Reward: After killing 20 enemies, gain a second charge of Chain Lightning.
thrall.1_2: Repeatable Quest: Hitting at least 2 Heroes with a single use of Chain Lightning increases the damage of its bounces by 12, up to 360.  Reward: After hitting multiple Heroes 30 times, Chain Lightning prioritizes bouncing to Heroes.
thrall.1_3: For 8 seconds after hitting an enemy with Chain Lightning, Thrall's next Basic Attack against them grants a stack of Frostwolf Resilience. If the target is an enemy Hero, then he also deals damage to them equal to 3% of their maximum Health and healing for the same amount.  Passive: Increase the number of Chain Lightning bounces by 1.
thrall.4_1: Heroes damaged by Feral Spirit grant 4 stacks of Frostwolf Resilience and 2 stacks of Feral Resilience, granting 75 Physical Armor against the next incoming Hero Basic Attack.  Stacks are consumed on the next cast of Feral Spirit.
thrall.4_2: Quest: Hit 6 Heroes with Feral Spirit. Progress is lost on death and when Thrall fails to hit a Hero.  Reward: Reduce the cooldown and Mana cost of Feral Spirit by 50%.
thrall.4_3: Frostwolf Resilience restores 15 Mana and reduces Basic Ability cooldowns by 0.5 seconds.
thrall.7_1: Repeatable Quest: Basic Attacks against Heroes while Windfury's Movement Speed bonus is active increase Attack Damage by 1.  Reward: After gaining 20 Attack Damage, increase the Movement Speed bonus of Windfury to 40%.  Reward: After gaining 40 Attack Damage, Thrall permanently gains 15% increased Movement Speed.
thrall.7_2: Activate to consume 8 stacks of Ancestral Wrath, damaging a target enemy Hero for 15% of their maximum Health over 3 seconds, and healing Thrall for 150% of the damage dealt.  Gain 1 stack of Ancestral Wrath every time Frostwolf Resilience activates.
thrall.7_3: After using an Ability, your next Basic Attack within 6 seconds deals 40% additional damage.
thrall.10_1: After 0.5 seconds, sunder the earth in a long line, dealing 290 (+4% per level) damage and shoving enemies to the side, Stunning them for 1 second.
thrall.10_2: After 0.5 seconds, summon a massive Earthquake that pulses every 4 seconds. Each pulse lasts 2 seconds, Slowing all enemies in the area by 50%, and deals 50 (+4% per level) damage to enemy Heroes. Does 3 pulses.
thrall.13_1: Windfury attacks grant twice as many stacks of Frostwolf Resilience.
thrall.13_2: Frostwolf Resilience can be activated to instantly heal. This healing is increased by up to 100% based on Thrall's missing health.
thrall.13_3: Every 45 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 4 seconds. Frostwolf Resilience reduces this cooldown by 10 seconds.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
thrall.16_1: The final strike of Windfury hits 3 times for 75% normal damage.
thrall.16_2: Chain Lightning Slows targets by 8% for 2 seconds.  Quest: Targeting a Hero directly with Chain Lightning increases this Slow by 8%, up to an additional 40%.  Reward: While at a 40% bonus, Chain Lightning's damage is increased by 25%.  Bonuses are reset if Chain Lightning is used on the same Hero it was last used on, or if Thrall dies.
thrall.16_3: For 3 seconds after a Hero is hit by Feral Spirit, Thrall's Basic Attacks against them deal an additional 3% of the target's maximum Health as damage.  Passive: Increase the duration of Feral Spirit's Root to 1.5 seconds.
thrall.20_1: Lower the cooldown of Sundering by 40 seconds. After Sundering impacts, it leaves behind an impassable rift, blocking unit movement for 3 seconds.
thrall.20_2: Allies within the Earthquake area gain a Shield equal to 15% of their maximum Health each pulse. This shield lasts 4 seconds.
thrall.20_3: Basic Attacks reduce Thrall's Basic and Heroic Ability cooldowns by 0.25 seconds, tripled against Heroes.
thrall.20_4: Basic Attacks deal 20% more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by 20% for 1 second.
thrall.20_5: Activate to immediately teleport to a target location and gain Windfury.

tracer.1_1: Reduce the cooldown of Melee by 1 second and it gains an additional charge.
tracer.1_2: Recall leaves behind 6 bombs that deal 240 (+4% per level) damage each to different targets. Heroes hit with these bombs are slowed by 50% for 0.75 seconds and grant 7% Pulse Bomb charge.
tracer.1_3: Increase Basic Attack range by 10%. Basic Attacks against Heroes reveal a small area around them for 3 seconds.
tracer.4_1: Increase the healing from Basic Attacks by up to 200%, based on the amount of health Tracer is missing.
