tracer.4_2: Successfully sticking a Pulse Bomb to an enemy Hero heals Tracer for 18% of her maximum Health over 1.5 seconds and refunds a charge of Blink.
tracer.4_3: Collecting a Regeneration Globe instantly heals Tracer for 10% of her maximum Health and reduces the cooldown of Healing Fountain by 15 seconds.  Drinking from a Healing Fountain instantly heals for 20% of Tracer's maximum Health.
tracer.7_1: Reduces Reload time by 50%. This equals 20% more damage per second.
tracer.7_2: If an entire ammo magazine is unloaded on an enemy, the last bullet will deal 80 (+4% per level) bonus damage.  This is equal to 35% of the total magazine.
tracer.7_3: Reactivate Reload within the last 50% of its cast time to increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by 40% for that magazine.
tracer.10_1: Increases Pulse Bomb's radius by 50% and enemies hit are Slowed by 70% for 3 seconds.
tracer.10_2: Pulse Bomb deals an additional 6% of maximum Health as damage to Heroes.
tracer.10_3: Increases Pulse Bomb's range and charge rate from Basic Attacks against Heroes by 100%.
tracer.13_1: Passive: After Blinking, gain 20% Movement Speed for 1.25 seconds.  Quest: Takedowns increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by 5%, up to 25%. These bonuses are lost on death.
tracer.13_2: Passive: When Blink has no charges remaining, its cooldown refreshes 150% faster.  Casting Blink grants Tracer a Shield equal to 6.5% of her maximum Health for 3 seconds. This Shield stacks up to 3 times.
tracer.13_3: Passive: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Recall by 0.1875 seconds.  When Tracer arrives at her Recall location she becomes Unkillable for 1 second and nearby enemies take 175 (+4% per level) damage and are knocked back.
tracer.16_1: Increases the radius of Melee by 30%, and causes it to damage all enemies in range.
tracer.16_2: Heroes hit by Melee have their Armor reduced by 15 for 4 seconds.
tracer.16_3: Tracer's Basic Attacks have a 60% chance to hit another nearby enemy, prioritizing Heroes.
tracer.20_1: Casting Blink causes Basic Attacks to not consume ammo for 1 second.
tracer.20_2: Increases Melee's Pulse Bomb charge against Heroes from 10% to 20%. Hitting an enemy with Melee who is stuck with a Pulse Bomb causes the bomb to instantly explode and knock the target away.
tracer.20_3: Recall heals Tracer equal to the amount of Health she lost during that time.
tracer.20_4: Successfully sticking a Pulse Bomb to an enemy Hero also drops another one at their feet that deals 50% damage and explodes slightly earlier.

tychus.1_1: Increases Frag Grenade's damage by 10% and its range by 50%.
tychus.1_2: Increase the range of Run and Gun by 50%. When cast, increase Tychus's Movement Speed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
tychus.1_3: Increase Tychus's Basic Attack range by 1.
tychus.4_1: Quest: While Minigun is active, Basic Attacks against Heroes permanently increase future Minigun durations by 0.03 seconds.
tychus.4_2: Increase the damage bonus to 4% while enemy Heroes are above 30% Health, but Minigun no longer has any effect on targets below 30%.
tychus.4_3: Passive: Increase Tychus's Attack Speed by 10%.  Reward: After getting 15 Takedowns, Tychus's Attack Speed is increased by an additional 15%.
tychus.7_1: Enemies hit by Frag Grenade take an additional 75 (+4% per level) damage over 3 seconds. This damage is increased by 100% against Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
tychus.7_2: Reduce the cooldown of Minigun by 4 seconds. Reduce the cooldown of Minigun by an additional 4 seconds after using Run and Gun.
tychus.7_3: Being Stunned or Rooted grants 30 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 30%.
tychus.10_1: Call down an Odin to pilot. The Odin deals increased Damage, has 100% increased Basic Attack range, and uses different Abilities. The Odin has 25 Armor and lasts 23 seconds.
tychus.10_2: Call down a Laser Drill to attack nearby enemies, dealing 142 (+4% per level) damage every second. Reactivate to assign a new target. Lasts 22 seconds.
tychus.13_1: Overkill Slows enemy Movement Speed by 25% and its range is increased by 25%.
tychus.13_2: Minigun heals Tychus for 100% of the bonus damage dealt after it expires.
tychus.13_3: Activate to gain 75 Spell Armor for 4 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 75%.
tychus.16_1: Each time Overkill hits an enemy, its damage against them is increased by 15%, stacking up to 60% bonus damage.
tychus.16_2: Frag Grenade deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 5% of their maximum Health.  Each enemy Hero hit by Frag Grenade reduces its cooldown by 1 second.
tychus.16_3: Basic Attacks deal bonus damage to Heroes equal to 1% of their maximum Health. Stacks with Minigun.
tychus.20_1: Odin lasts 50% longer and Ragnarok Missiles also launches a Nuclear Missile which lands 2.5 seconds later, dealing 319 (+4% per level) damage in its area.
tychus.20_2: Increases the range of the Drakken Laser Drill by 50%.  Deals increasing damage the longer it remains on a single target, up to 100% extra damage.
tychus.20_3: Reduce Overkill's cooldown by 5 seconds.  While Channeling Overkill, Tychus gains 40 Armor.
tychus.20_4: Run and Gun and Odin's Thrusters gain 2 additional charges and reduces Run and Gun's Mana cost from 50 to 25.  After using Run and Gun, increase Tychus's Basic Attack range by 1.5 for 4 seconds.

tyrael.1_1: Increase the Shield amount Tyrael gains from Righteousness by 40% and heal Tyrael for 140 (+4% per level) Health if his Shield is destroyed. Does not increase the Shield amount gained by allies.
tyrael.1_2: Increase the Shield applied to allies by Righteousness to 80% of the Shield gained by Tyrael.
tyrael.1_3: Dealing damage to a Hero heals Tyrael for 20 (+4% per level) Health over 5 seconds. Dealing damage resets this timer, and the heal amount stacks up to 10 times.  Quest: Every Regeneration Globe gathered increases this heal amount by 1%.
tyrael.4_1: Gain 25 Armor while El'druin's Might is active, and for 3 seconds after teleporting.
tyrael.4_2: Heroes hit by El'druin's Might heal Tyrael for 3% of his maximum Health. Tyrael's Basic Attacks against enemies Slowed by El'druin's Might increase the Slow duration by 1 second, up to 4 seconds.
tyrael.4_3: If Smite hits an enemy, Tyrael's Basic Attacks within the next 4 seconds heal for 70% of the damage dealt.
tyrael.7_1: When Tyrael's Shield from Righteousness expires or is destroyed, it deals 190 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.
tyrael.7_2: Each enemy Hero hit by Smite increases Tyrael's Basic Attack damage by 60% for 4 seconds.
tyrael.7_3: Smite grants 20% more Movement Speed and also grants 25% Attack Speed for 2 seconds.
tyrael.10_1: After 0.75 seconds, charge an enemy Hero, dealing 150 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 1.5 seconds. Nearby enemies are knocked away and take 75 (+4% per level) damage.
tyrael.10_2: After 0.5 seconds create a field of holy energy that makes allied Heroes Invulnerable. Lasts 3 seconds.
tyrael.13_1: Upon teleporting using El'druin's Might, El'druin swaps places with Tyrael, and El'druin's Might can be reactivated to teleport an additional time.
tyrael.13_2: Create a ring for 3 seconds that blocks enemies from entering the area teleported to using El'druin's Might.
tyrael.13_3: Each enemy Hero hit by Smite reduces the cooldown of Righteousness by 1 second. Each allied Hero Shielded by Righteousness increases the damage of the next Smite by 35%.
tyrael.16_1: Tyrael's Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of El'druin's Might by 2 seconds.
tyrael.16_2: Both Tyrael and El'druin deal 18 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Teleporting increases this damage from Tyrael by 150% for 2 seconds.
tyrael.16_3: While El'druin's Might is active, and for 2 seconds after teleporting, Smite's cooldown recharges 125% faster.
tyrael.20_1: Increases the cast range of Judgment by 50%, and reduces the cooldown by 40 seconds.
tyrael.20_2: Increase the duration of Sanctification by 1 second and increase the damage of allies inside by 25%.
tyrael.20_3: Using a Basic Ability grants 50% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
tyrael.20_4: Activate to gain 50 Armor for 3 seconds.  Each time Tyrael damages an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack or Basic Ability, increase the duration of this Armor bonus by 0.5 seconds.

tyrande.1_1: Sentinel pierces the first Hero hit. Its width is increased by 25% and deals up to 250% more damage based on distance traveled.
tyrande.1_2: Increase Lunar Flare's range by 30%.  Quest: Hitting a Hero with Lunar Flare increases its damage by 5%, up to 150%.
tyrande.1_3: Activate to grant other nearby allied Heroes 40% increased Attack Damage for 5 seconds, and to reset the cooldown of Hunter's Mark.  Passive: Basic Attack damage increased by 30%.
tyrande.4_1: If Light of Elune's second charge is cast on a different target from the first, it heals for 80% more.
tyrande.4_2: Tyrande's Basic Attacks against Marked targets heal other allied Heroes near the enemy for 4% of their maximum Health.
tyrande.4_3: Activate to make Tyrande's Basic Attacks heal target allied Hero for 175% of the damage dealt. Lasts for 8 seconds.
tyrande.7_1: Basic Attacks decrease the cooldown of Light of Elune by an additional 0.75 seconds.
tyrande.7_2: Light of Elune grants the target 10 Spell Armor for 2 seconds. This effect stacks up to 2 times.
tyrande.7_3: Increase the cast range and duration of Hunter's Mark by 25%. Tyrande's Basic Attacks against targets with Hunter's Mark bounce  to nearby enemy Heroes.
tyrande.10_1: Grant all allied Heroes Stealth for 10 seconds and heal them for 380 (+4% per level) Health over 10 seconds. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.
tyrande.10_2: Deal 92 (+4% per level) damage per second and Slow enemies by 20% in an area. Lasts 6 seconds.
tyrande.13_1: Gain 5% Movement Speed. Light of Elune increases the target's Movement Speed by 20% for 3 seconds.
tyrande.13_2: Sentinel Slows enemies hit by 35% and reduces their damage dealt by 35% for 3 seconds.
tyrande.13_3: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Hunter's Mark by 2 second. Basic Attacks against marked targets reduce the cooldown of Lunar Flare by 4 seconds.
tyrande.16_1: Light of Elune removes Stuns, Silences, and Slows from its target.
tyrande.16_2: Reduce Sentinel's cooldown by 3 seconds. Heroes hit by Sentinel takes bonus damage equal to 6% of their maximum Health.
tyrande.16_3: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant a stacking 12% increased Attack Damage bonus for 4 seconds.
tyrande.20_1: Shadowstalk reveals all enemy Heroes for 10 seconds and heals for 75% more.
tyrande.20_2: Increase the Slow of Starfall to 60% and cause it to apply Hunter's Mark to enemy Heroes while inside of its area of effect.
tyrande.20_3: Increase Basic Attack range by 1. Every 8th Basic Attack casts a free Lunar Flare at a random enemy near Tyrande's position. This prefers Heroic targets.
tyrande.20_4: Increase Attack Speed by 20%. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce their damage dealt by 8% for 2 seconds. This effect stacks up to 5 times.

uther.1_1: Quest: Reduce damage from Heroic sources with Devotion.  Reward: After reducing damage 40 times, Holy Light's Mana cost is reduced from 80 to 60.  Reward: After reducing damage 80 times, Holy Light's Mana cost is reduced to 40, and its range is increased by 50%.
uther.1_2: Quest: Damage or heal Heroes 60 times with Holy Radiance.  Reward: Increase the duration of Devotion by 0.5 seconds.  Passive: Damaging or healing Heroes with Holy Radiance refunds 5 Mana and reduces its cooldown by 0.75 seconds.
uther.1_3: Quest: Basic Attack enemies 75 times.  Reward: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Hammer of Justice by 1.5 seconds.  Passive: Basic Attacks restore 1.5% of Uther's maximum Mana.
uther.4_1: Holy Light can be used on an enemy to do 40% of its healing amount as damage. When used this way, Uther receives its self-healing benefits, its cooldown is reduced by 6 seconds, and it refunds 45 Mana.
uther.4_2: Hammer of Justice increases Uther's Movement Speed by 25% for 3 seconds.
uther.4_3: Deal 13 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes increase this damage by 20% for 3 seconds. This can stack up to 3 times.
uther.7_1: Being Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced grants Uther 90 Mana and causes Holy Light's cooldown to recharge 200% faster for 6 seconds. This effect has a 20 second cooldown.
uther.7_2: Healing a Hero with a Basic Ability that is Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced grants them 50 Armor for 3 seconds.
uther.7_3: Activate to make target ally Unstoppable for 1 second. Cannot be cast on Uther. Basic Attacks reduce Hand of Protection's cooldown by 5 seconds.
uther.10_1: Make an allied Hero Invulnerable and increase their Movement Speed by 20% for 3 seconds.
uther.10_2: Deal 170 (+4% per level) damage and Stun nearby enemies for 1.75 seconds.
uther.13_1: For the next 5 seconds after using Holy Light, Uther's Basic Attacks heal him and nearby allied Heroes for 15% of the total amount healed by Holy Light.
uther.13_2: When used against Heroes, Hammer of Justice reduces the target's Movement Speed and damage dealt by 25% for 3 seconds.
uther.13_3: Every 30 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 50%.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
uther.16_1: Uther receives 125% bonus self-healing when targeting others with Holy Light.  This bonus is increased to 250% while he is below 50% Health.
uther.16_2: Increase the damage and healing of Holy Radiance by 10%. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes cause Uther's next cast of Holy Radiance to have its damage and healing increased by an additional 10%, stacking up to 7 times.
uther.16_3: Activate to reduce the Mana cost of Uther's next Basic Ability by 50 and its cooldown by 10 seconds.
uther.20_1: Divine Shield is also applied to all nearby allied Heroes and lasts 1 second longer.
uther.20_2: Divine Storm's radius is increased by 50% and its cooldown is reduced by 40 seconds.
uther.20_3: After Eternal Vanguard ends, Uther revives at the spirit's location with 50% of his maximum Health.  This effect has a 180 second cooldown.
uther.20_4: Increase Devotion Armor to 50 and its duration by 0.5 seconds.

valeera.1_1: Valeera regenerates an additional 3 Energy per second.  Reward: After Gathering 20 Regen Globes, increase Valeera's maximum Energy to 120.
valeera.1_2: After teleporting with Ambush, Cheap Shot, or Garrote, regenerate 10 Energy per second for 5 seconds.
valeera.1_3: Each Combo Point spent grants 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing its damage by 75%. Stores up to 3 charges.
valeera.1_4: Activate to make Valeera's next damaging Ability and subsequent Abilities within 4 seconds Slow targets by 20% for 4 seconds.  Activating Crippling Poison does not break Stealth.
valeera.4_1: Reduces the Energy cost of Sinister Strike by 10.
valeera.4_2: Valeera's Basic Attacks deal 40% additional damage to enemies affected by Garrote.
valeera.4_3: Ambush, Cheap Shot, and Garrote grant 15% Movement Speed for 3 seconds and award 2 Combo Points.
valeera.4_4: Activate to make Valeera's next damaging Ability and subsequent Abilities within 4 seconds reduce enemy healing received by 50% for 4 seconds.  Activating Wound Poison does not break Stealth.
valeera.7_1: Sinister Strike now hits with both blades, dealing 125% additional damage, but its range is reduced by 1.
valeera.7_2: Quest: Each time Blade Flurry damages an enemy Hero, its damage increases by 6, up to 90.  Reward: After damaging 15 Heroes with Blade Flurry, permanently reduce its Energy cost by 20.
valeera.7_3: Eviscerating an enemy with 3 Combo Points grants 150% Attack Speed. Lasts 3 seconds or 3 Basic Attacks.  Passive: Basic Attacks restore 2 Energy.
valeera.10_1: Create a cloud of smoke. While in the smoke, Valeera is Unrevealable, can pass through other units, and gains 60 Armor, reducing damage taken by 60%. Valeera can continue to attack and use abilities without being revealed. Lasts 5 seconds.  Using this Ability does not break Stealth.
valeera.10_2: Valeera is enveloped in a Cloak of Shadows, which immediately removes all damage over time effects from her. For 1.5 seconds, she becomes Unstoppable and gains 75 Spell Armor, reducing Ability Damage taken by 75%.  Using this Ability does not break Stealth.
valeera.13_1: Teleporting with Ambush reduces the cooldown of Vanish by 4 seconds.
valeera.13_2: Increase the duration of Cheap Shot's Blind by 2.5 seconds.
valeera.13_3: Using Garrote on a Hero reduces their Spell Power by 40% for 6 seconds.
valeera.16_1: Sinister Strike deals 50% additional damage and generates an additional Combo Point when used against Silenced, Rooted, or Stunned enemy Heroes.
valeera.16_2: Ambush deals 50% additional damage and reduces the target's Armor by an additional 10 if no other enemy Heroes are within 4 range of the victim.
valeera.16_3: Activate to instantly restore 100 Energy.  Activating Thistle Tea does not break Stealth.
valeera.20_1: While in the Smoke Bomb, Valeera regenerates an additional 40 Energy per second.
valeera.20_2: Whenever Valeera uses Vanish, she also gains Cloak of Shadows.
valeera.20_3: Increase Garrote's damage over time by 100%. Valeera's Basic Attacks refresh the duration of Garrote.
valeera.20_4: Increases Valeera's Movement Speed while Vanished by an additional 20%.

valla.1_1: Increase the number of Hungering Arrow bounces by 1.  Quest: Hitting an enemy Hero with the initial impact of Hungering Arrow refunds 40 Mana and permanently increases the damage of its initial impact by 6.
valla.1_2: Quest: Hitting a Hero with Multishot grants 2 Hatred and permanently increases its damage by 2.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes with Multishot, increase its damage by 40.
valla.1_3: Quest: Every 50 Basic Attacks against Heroes increases Hatred's damage bonus per stack by 1%, up to 6%.  Gambit: Gain 25% bonus Attack Speed. Every death reduces this bonus by 5%.
valla.4_1: Increase the range of Multishot by 20%. Multishot also fires 3 grenades that deal 100 (+4% per level) damage and refund 25 Mana after hitting enemy Heroes.
valla.4_2: Increase Vaults Basic Attack damage bonus from 6% to 15% per stack of Hatred. If this attack kills its victim within 1.5 seconds, the Mana cost and cooldown of Vault are refunded.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Vault by 5 seconds.
valla.4_3: Vault no longer has a Mana cost. Casting Vault resets the cooldown of Hungering Arrow.
valla.7_1: Hungering Arrow deals 150% additional damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
valla.7_2: Multishot Slows enemies by 20% for 2.5 seconds. Hungering Arrows deals 25% more damage to Slowed enemies.
valla.7_3: Increase the Movement Speed bonus of each stack of Hatred to 2%.
valla.10_1: Rapidly attack enemies within 10 range for 60 (+4% per level) damage per hit, prioritizing Heroes over Minions. Valla is able to move and use Vault while strafing. Lasts for 4 seconds.
valla.10_2: Launch a wave of Shadow Beasts that deals 250 (+4% per level) damage and Stuns enemies in the target area for 0.5 seconds.  Stores up to 2 charges.
valla.13_1: Hitting a Hero with Hungering Arrow heals Valla for 4% of her maximum Health, and Multishot heals for 2%.
valla.13_2: Basic Attacks heal for 10% of the damage dealt, increased by 2% per Hatred stack.
valla.13_3: Activate to consume all Hatred, granting 3 Spell Armor per Hatred consumed for 5 seconds.  Passive: Gain 15 Spell Armor, and each stack of Hatred heals for 1.2 (+4% per level) Health per second.
valla.16_1: While at max Hatred, Multishot's cooldown recharges 50% faster.
valla.16_2: While at max Hatred, increase all damage dealt by 10%.
valla.16_3: Every 3rd Basic Attack against the same Hero deals an additional 5% of their maximum Health as damage.
valla.20_1: Hitting an enemy Hero with Strafe increases its duration by 0.125 seconds. Strafe also fires penetrating bolts in a line for 34 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds.
valla.20_2: Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Rain of Vengeance by 5 seconds.  Passive: Each stack of Hatred increases your Attack Speed by 2%. While at max Hatred, gain an additional 30% Attack Speed.
valla.20_3: Gain 2 additional charges of Vault. Drop 3 Caltrops while Vaulting that deal 60 (+4% per level) damage and Slow enemies by 40% for 1 second.
valla.20_4: Gain 20% Basic Attack range. While at max Hatred, gain an additional 30% Basic Attack range.

varian.1_1: Quest: Every time Lion's Fang hits a Hero, increase its damage by 7, up to 175.  Reward: After hitting 25 Heroes, the Slow is increased to 50% and its duration is increased to 2 seconds.
varian.1_2: When Parry blocks a Hero's Basic Attack, Heroic Strike's cooldown is refreshed and the next one does 40% more damage.
varian.1_3: Quest: Hit 50 Heroes with Basic Attacks. Quest: Participate in 5 Hero Takedowns. Quest: Gather 15 Regeneration Globes.  Reward: Completing a Quest grants 10 Base Attack Damage. Completing all 3 Quests grants an additional 30 Base Attack Damage.
varian.4_1: Silence a target Hero and force them to attack Varian for 1.25 seconds.  Passive: Maximum Health and Health Regeneration increased by 40%.
varian.4_2: Smash a target enemy, dealing 185 (+4% per level) damage and lowering their Armor by 25 for 3 seconds, causing them to take 25% increased damage.  Passive: Base Attack Damage increased by 100%. Passive: Maximum Health and Health Regeneration reduced by 10%.
varian.4_3: Basic Attacks reduce Heroic Strike's cooldown by 9 seconds, and increase Varian's Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds.  Passive: Attack Speed increased by 100%. Passive: Base Attack Damage reduced by 25%.
varian.7_1: Increase Lion's Fang's healing from Heroes by 75%.
varian.7_2: Basic Attacks heal Varian for 1% of his maximum Health. While below 50% Health, they also heal him for 50% of the damage dealt.
varian.7_3: Every 30 seconds, Varian's next Basic Attack will heal him for 350 (+4% per level) Health. When a nearby enemy Minion or Monster dies, the cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds.
varian.10_1: Parry grants Protected, preventing all incoming damage while active. Additionally, Parry's cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds, but it loses 1 charge.
varian.10_2: Reduce Charge's cooldown by 8 seconds and Mana cost from 45 to 22. Additionally, Charge can be cast on allied Heroes.
varian.13_1: Charge deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 4% of their maximum Health.
varian.13_2: Heroes hit by Heroic Strike receive 40% reduced healing for 4 seconds.
varian.13_3: Activate to throw a sword at a target Hero that deals 50 (+4% per level) damage, and up to 1400 (+4% per level) bonus damage to their Shields.  Passive: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal up to 200% bonus Physical Damage to Shields.
varian.16_1: Activate to place a Banner that grants 25% increased Movement Speed to nearby allied Heroes. Lasts 12 seconds.
varian.16_2: Activate to place a Banner that grants 20 Armor to nearby allied Heroes, reducing damage taken by 20%. Lasts 12 seconds.
varian.16_3: Activate to place a Banner that grants 20% increased Spell Power to nearby allied Heroes. Lasts 12 seconds.
varian.20_1: Being hit by a Hero Basic Attack reduces the cooldown of Taunt by 1 second.
varian.20_2: Colossus Smash affects all enemies near the target, and its cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds.
varian.20_3: Twin Blades of Fury increases Heroic Strike damage by an additional 25%, and Basic Attacks increase his Movement Speed by an additional 10%.
varian.20_4: Banner now also increases health regeneration and all healing received for nearby allied Heroes by 50%, and the cooldown is reduced by 50%.
varian.20_5: Activate to demoralize nearby enemy Heroes, reducing damage they deal by 40% for 5 seconds.

whitemane.1_1: For every Hero hit with Searing Lash, lower the cooldown of Inquisition by 1.5 seconds. Allies below 30% Health receive 25% more healing from Whitemane.
whitemane.1_2: Searing Lash deals 25% more damage to enemies. If the second strike hits an enemy Hero, they take an additional 25% damage and Whitemane gains 40% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
whitemane.1_3: Quest: Hit Heroes with Searing Lash.  Reward: Each Hero hit grants 3 permanent Health and 2 permanent Mana. Heroes hit with the second strike count as 2 hits.
whitemane.4_1: Increase Whitemane's Basic Attack range by 1.1. Whitemane gains 20% increased Basic Attack damage for each active Zeal buff.
whitemane.4_2: Desperate Plea's healing is increased by 30%. Increase this by an additional 10% for each active Zeal.
whitemane.4_3: Gain 5% Movement Speed. Increase this by an additional 5% for each active Zeal.
whitemane.7_1: Upon reaching 2 stacks of Desperation, Whitemane gains Zeal.
whitemane.7_2: Enemy Heroes hit by Searing Lash are marked for 3 seconds. Basic Attacks against them deal an additional 55 (+4% per level) Spell damage and remove the mark.
whitemane.7_3: Activate to make an ally Unstoppable for 1 second.
whitemane.10_1: Bolster the spirits of nearby allied Heroes, healing them for 300 (+4% per level) and granting them 40 Armor for 4 seconds.
whitemane.10_2: After 1 second, consecrate an area for 4 seconds, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage every 0.5 seconds to enemies inside. 25% of the damage dealt to Heroes is returned as Mana.
whitemane.13_1: Inquisition reduces all damage the target deals by 50%.
whitemane.13_2: If Searing Lash's second strike hits an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown to 1 second.
whitemane.13_3: Basic Attacks against Heroes increase the duration of all active Zeals by 0.75 seconds and lower the cooldown of Zeals activation by 4 seconds.
whitemane.16_1: Reaching 3 stacks of Desperation heals for 175 (+4% per level) and reapplies Zeal to allies with Zeal.
whitemane.16_2: Upon casting, Inquisition can chain to an additional enemy Hero near its target, dealing 50 (+4% per level) damage every 0.5 seconds. Affected enemies lose 10 Armor.
whitemane.16_3: Hitting a Hero with Searing Lash while they are being targeted by Inquisition Roots them for 1.5 seconds.  Passive: Reduce Inquisition's cooldown by 2 seconds.
whitemane.20_1: Scarlet Aegis heals for 50% more and makes affected allies Unstoppable for 2 seconds.
whitemane.20_2: Divine Reckoning deals 50% more damage and pulls enemies to its center the first time it hits them.
whitemane.20_3: Activate to cast a permanent Zeal on an allied Hero that costs no Mana and doesn't grant Desperation. Only one can be active at a time and has global cast range.
whitemane.20_4: Activate to blast an enemy Hero with holy fire, reducing their Armor by 25 and dealing 300 (+4% per level) damage over 4 seconds.

xul.1_1: When Bone Armor expires, nearby enemy Heroes take damage equal to 12% of their maximum Health.
xul.1_2: While Bone Armor is active, nearby enemies are Slowed by 35% for 1 second. Basic Attacks against Heroes that are Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed reduce the cooldown of Bone Armor by 2 seconds.
xul.1_3: While Bone Armor is active, Xul evades all Basic Attacks, but increases the cooldown of Bone Armor by 10 seconds.
xul.4_1: Reduce the cooldown of Spectral Scythe by 2 seconds and its Mana cost by 15.
xul.4_2: Increase Xul's Basic Attack damage by 15%.  Each enemy hit by Cursed Strikes reduces its cooldown by 1 second, up to 12 seconds.
xul.4_3: Bone Prison spawns 2 Skeletal Warriors.  These do not count towards Xul's Raise Skeleton maximum.  Quest: Spawn 80 Skeletal Warriors.  Reward: While fixating on an enemy, Skeletal Warriors gain 25% Movement and Attack Speed.
xul.7_1: Cursed Strikes heals for 70% of the damage dealt to Heroes.
xul.7_2: Every time a Skeletal Warrior attacks an enemy, restore 0.5% of Xul's maximum Health and 0.2% of his maximum Mana.
xul.7_3: Increase the Shield amount of Bone Armor to 35% of Xul's maximum Health, and Xul gains 20 Spell Armor for its duration.
xul.10_1: After 0.5 seconds, release poisonous missiles that deal 630 (+4% per level) damage to all enemies hit over 10 seconds.
xul.10_2: Vector Targeting Summon 4 Frost Mages in a line that attack nearby enemies for 47 (+4% per level) damage a second and Slow them by 30% for 2 seconds. Last up to 15 seconds.
xul.13_1: Spectral Scythe spawns 2 additional scythes next to the first after 1.5 seconds, dealing 40% damage.
xul.13_2: Gain 5% Attack Speed for 3 seconds each time Cursed Strikes hits an enemy, up to 75%.
xul.13_3: Increase the Root duration of Bone Prison by 0.25 seconds.  Enemies Rooted by Bone Prison lose 25 Armor for 2 seconds.
xul.16_1: Enemy Heroes that are damaged by Spectral Scythe or Skeletal Warriors are Slowed by 30% for 2.5 seconds.
xul.16_2: Enemy Heroes who are damaged by Cursed Strikes or Skeletal Warriors deal 35% less damage for 3 seconds.
xul.16_3: Deal 230 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in a line.
xul.20_1: Poison Nova heals for 50% of the damage dealt and its duration is increased by 50%.
xul.20_2: Increase the Slow of Frost Mages by 20%.   Every 5th Spectral Scythe that hits enemy Heroes spawns a Frost Mage instead of a Skeletal Warrior at their location.
xul.20_3: Enemy Heroes hit by Spectral Scythe receive 75% less healing for 4 seconds.
xul.20_4: Each time Skeletal Warriors deal damage, reduce the cooldown of Bone Armor and Xul's Heroic Ability by 1.5%.

yrel.1_1: Increase Vindication's radius by 15%. Hitting an enemy Hero increases Vindication's healing by 45%. If more than one Hero is hit, the bonus is increased to 90%.
yrel.1_2: Casting a Basic Ability grants Yrel 35 Physical Armor for 2.5 seconds.
yrel.1_3: After damaging an enemy Hero with a Basic Ability, Yrel's next Basic Attack heals her for 140 (+4% per level).
yrel.4_1: Upon landing, Avenging Wrath grants other nearby allied Heroes 30 Armor for 4 seconds.
yrel.4_2: Divine Purpose heals the lowest Health nearby allied Hero other than Yrel for 275 (+4% per level).
yrel.4_3: Grant an allied Hero 30% Movement Speed for 3 seconds and remove all Slows and Roots from them.
yrel.7_1: Gain 5% Movement Speed. Yrel is no longer Slowed while Channeling Righteous Hammer, and instead this bonus is quadrupled.
yrel.7_2: Hitting an enemy Hero with Avenging Wrath at maximum charge deals 25% more damage and reduces its cooldown to 1 second.
yrel.7_3: Mounting is instant and grants 60% Movement Speed that decays over 3 seconds.
yrel.10_1: Surround Yrel in a barrier for 3 seconds, absorbing all damage taken and healing her for 50% of the damage received.
yrel.10_2: Yrel sanctifies the ground around her, gaining 50 Armor until she leaves the area.
yrel.13_1: Enemy Heroes hit by Vindication at maximum charge deal 40% less damage for 3 seconds.
yrel.13_2: Increase Avenging Wrath's Slow by 25% and duration by 0.75 seconds.
yrel.13_3: Hitting an enemy Hero with a Basic Ability at maximum charge grants 10% Spell Power for 10 seconds, up to 30%.
yrel.16_1: Righteous Hammer reduces the Armor of enemy Heroes hit by 20 for 4 seconds and deals bonus damage equal to 7% of their maximum Health.
yrel.16_2: Casting a Basic Ability reduces the cooldown of Divine Purpose by 2.5 seconds.
yrel.16_3: After casting a Basic Ability, Yrel's next Basic Attack splashes for 35% increased damage around the target.
yrel.20_1: Increase the amount that Yrel heals from damage received from 50% to 75%. Ardent Defender heals nearby allied Heroes for 100% of the healing received by Yrel.
yrel.20_2: Casting Avenging Wrath while inside Sacred Ground moves Sacred Ground to Yrel's location upon landing.
yrel.20_3: After 1 second, Yrel becomes Invulnerable and casts Hearthstone. Cannot be canceled.
yrel.20_4: Activate to become Unstoppable for 2 seconds.

zagara.1_1: Banelings can travel 50% further before exploding.
zagara.1_2: Reduces the cooldown of Infested Drop by 3 seconds and Roachlings have 30% more Health.
zagara.1_3: Nearby Ranged Minions deal an additional 125% damage, plus an additional 1% per 1000 Siege damage Zagara has dealt. Can be toggled on or off.
zagara.4_1: Activate to have Zagara's next Basic Attack apply 230 (+4% per level) damage over 5 seconds.
zagara.4_2: Basic Attacks deal 33% damage to three nearby targets.
zagara.4_3: Quest: Each Basic Attack against a Hero increases Zagara's Attack Damage by 0.2%.
zagara.7_1: Gain 2 additional charges of Banelings Barrage, but increase its cooldown by 2 seconds.
zagara.7_2: Banelings Slow enemies by 25% for 2.5 seconds.
zagara.7_3: Quest: Passively increases the radius of Infested Drop by 20%.  Reward: After hitting 12 Heroes with Infested Drop, it spawns an additional Roachling.
zagara.10_1: Summon a Devouring Maw that devours enemies for 4 seconds. Devoured enemies cannot fight and take 94 (+4% per level) damage per second.  Usable on Unstoppable enemies.
zagara.10_2: Summon a Nydus Worm on Creep anywhere that Zagara has vision. Zagara can enter a Nydus Worm and travel to any other Nydus Worm by right-clicking near it. While inside a Nydus Worm, Zagara regenerates 10% Health and Mana per second.  Stores up to 2 charges. Maximum of 4 Nydus Worms at a time.  Passive: Creep spreads 15% farther.  Passive: While on Creep, each Basic Attack reduces all of Zagara's cooldowns by 0.4 seconds.
zagara.13_1: Zagara is healed for 60% of the damage dealt by Hunter Killers' Basic Attacks to Heroes.
zagara.13_2: While on Creep, Zagara gains 20 Armor, taking 20% less damage.
zagara.13_3: Every 30 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 50%.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
zagara.16_1: When attacking Heroes, Hunter Killers and Roachlings deal additional damage equal to 1.75% of their maximum Health.
zagara.16_2: Reduce the cooldown of Hunter Killer by 4 seconds.  Hunter Killer now spawns a Mutalisk. Mutalisks have a bounce attack and last for 30 seconds.
zagara.16_3: While on Creep, Zagara gains 50% more Basic Attack damage and her attack range is increased by 1.1.
zagara.20_1: Devouring Maw deals 50% more damage. Takedowns reduce its cooldown by 25 seconds.
zagara.20_2: The cast range for Creep Tumor is increased by 2000%. Creep Tumors now last 600 seconds. While on Creep, Zagara gains an additional 10% Movement Speed.
zagara.20_3: Every 3rd Basic Attack also launches a Baneling towards the target.  Passive: Gain 20% bonus Attack Speed.
zagara.20_4: Zagara and her summons deal 20% more damage to enemies attacked by a Hunter Killer in the last 2 seconds.

zarya.1_1: Quest: For every 5 enemy Heroes hit by Particle Grenade, its recharge rate lowers by 0.4375 seconds, up to 3.5 seconds.  Reward: Once Particle Grenade has hit 40 enemy Heroes, its radius is increased by 15%.
zarya.1_2: For 3 seconds after gaining Shield Ally, every 5.35 (+4% per level) damage done by the bearer contributes 1 Energy to Zarya, up to 40 Energy per Shield.
zarya.1_3: Zarya's Basic Attack deals 50% additional damage to enemies in melee range. While above 40 Energy, Zarya's Basic Attack size is increased by 35%.
zarya.1_4: Regen Globes now instantly grant 20 Energy.  Quest: Spend 150 seconds at or above 50 Energy.  Reward: Gain an additional 20 maximum Energy.
zarya.4_1: Personal Barrier absorbs an additional 140 (+4% per level) damage.  Passive: Damage absorbed by Zarya's Shields contributes 20% more Energy.
zarya.4_2: Quest: Regeneration Globes increase Shield Ally absorb amount by 15, up to 300 permanently.  Reward: After collecting 20 Regen Globes, permanently reduce the cooldown of Shield Ally by 2 seconds.
zarya.4_3: Shield Ally increases the allied Hero's Movement Speed by 50% for the duration.
zarya.4_4: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier and Shield Ally grant 75 Physical Armor against the next 2 Hero Basic Attacks for 6 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%.
zarya.7_1: Particle Grenade deals 30 (+4% per level) more damage and Slows Movement Speed by 25% for 2 seconds to enemies hit by the center of the blast.
zarya.7_2: Hitting a Hero with Particle Grenade causes Basic Attacks against them to generate 2 Energy. Lasts 3 seconds.
zarya.7_3: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier explodes, dealing 110 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies.
zarya.10_1: Launch a gravity bomb that detonates after 1 second and draws enemy Heroes toward the center for 2.5 seconds. Affected Heroes take 30 (+4% per level) damage a second.
zarya.10_2: Launch a gravity bomb that deals 124 (+4% per level) damage and creates an expulsion zone for 3.5 seconds. Enemies who enter the affected area are knocked back and have their Movement Speed reduced by 50% for 1 second.
zarya.13_1: Personal Barrier makes Zarya Unstoppable for up to 2 seconds.
zarya.13_2: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier grants Zarya 75 Spell Armor for 3 Seconds, reducing the damage taken from Abilities by 75%.
zarya.13_3: While at or above 75 Energy, Zarya gains 20 Armor, reducing all damage taken by 20%.
zarya.13_4: Activate to consume all Energy and gain a Shield that absorbs 0.5% of Zarya's maximum Health per Energy consumed and lasts for 3 seconds. Zarya may only have one personal Shield active on herself at a time.
zarya.16_1: Causes Shield Ally to remove all disabling effects and reduces its cooldown by 3 seconds.
zarya.16_2: Shield Ally now grants an untalented Shield to a nearby ally upon impact.
zarya.16_3: While at or above 75 Energy, Zarya's cooldowns regenerate 25% faster.
zarya.20_1: Increases Graviton Surge's duration by 1 second and it Silences Heroes caught in its area.
zarya.20_2: Reduce Expulsion Zone's cooldown by 25 seconds and increase its duration by 1.5 seconds.
zarya.20_3: All Particle Grenade charges are returned at once.
zarya.20_4: Activate to reset the cooldown of Personal Barrier and Shield Ally.

zeratul.1_1: Increases the radius of Cleave by 33%.
zeratul.1_2: Quest: Gather Regeneration Globes to lower the Mana cost of Blink by 3, up to 45.  Reward: Upon gathering 15 Regeneration Globes, Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Blink by 1.5 seconds.
zeratul.1_3: Reduce the cooldown of Permanent Cloak by 1 second. Gain 30% Movement Speed while Stealthed.
zeratul.4_1: Cleave deals an additional 40% damage over 3 seconds.
zeratul.4_2: Dealing damage to enemy Heroes increases all damage dealt by 6% for 3 seconds, stacking up to 30%.
zeratul.4_3: Activate to gain 40% Attack Speed for 5 seconds.  Passive: Gain 20% Attack Speed.
zeratul.7_1: After 1.25 seconds, reactivate Blink to return to the point where it was cast from within 4 seconds.
zeratul.7_2: Singularity Spike takes 50% longer to explode. It can be reactivated to teleport to the target, granting 30% increased Move Speed for 3 seconds.
zeratul.7_3: Vorpal Blade gains a 2nd charge. Teleporting to an enemy with Vorpal Blade or entering Permanent Cloak causes Zeratul's next Basic Attack to deal 50% more damage.
zeratul.10_1: Activate to cast an untalented version of Zeratul's most recently used Basic Ability, dealing 50% less damage.  Passive: After using an Ability, Zeratul's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds deals 30% more damage.
zeratul.10_2: Slows time in an area to a near standstill, placing allies and enemies in Time Stop for 5 seconds. Zeratul is not affected.
zeratul.13_1: Zeratul gains a Shield equal to 20% of his Maximum Health over 3 seconds while under Permanent Cloak.
zeratul.13_2: Basic Attacks heal for 35% of the damage dealt.
zeratul.13_3: Every 30 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 50%.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
zeratul.16_1: Every third consecutive Basic Attack against the same target deals 125% bonus damage.
zeratul.16_2: If Cleave hits more than one enemy Hero, it deals 40% increased damage and its cooldown is reduced by 3 seconds.
zeratul.16_3: Deal 25% increased damage to enemies while they are marked or Slowed by Singularity Spike.
zeratul.20_1: Might of the Nerazim resets the cooldown of all Basic Abilities.
zeratul.20_2: Singularity Spike no longer costs Mana. Basic Attacks against enemies reduce its cooldown by 1.25 seconds, double versus Heroes.
zeratul.20_3: Reduce the cooldown of Vorpal Blade by 10 seconds. Casting Vorpal Blade grants Zeratul a Shield that absorbs up to 260 (+4% per level) damage for 3 seconds.
zeratul.20_4: Heal for 60% of Spell Damage dealt to Heroes.

zuljin.1_1: Grievous Throw now pierces through all enemies hit and restores 15 Mana per Hero hit. Additionally, Grievous Throw's mark is no longer removed by Basic Attacks.
zuljin.1_2: While Zul'jin is below 75% Health, he gains 10% Spell Power. While he is below 50% Health, his Basic Attack damage is increased by 15% and Basic Attacks against Heroes grant an additional stack of You Want Axe?.
zuljin.1_3: Quest: Zul'jin's first Takedown against each enemy Hero permanently increases his damage dealt by 2%.  Reward: After getting Takedowns on every enemy Hero, Basic Attack range is increased by 1.1.
zuljin.4_1: Increase Regeneration's healing by 25%. If Regeneration fully finishes, restore 10% of Zul'jin's maximum Mana.
zuljin.4_2: Activate to remove Roots and Slows.  Passive: Lower the cooldown and Mana cost of Regeneration by 40%.
zuljin.4_3: Lower the cooldown of Amani Rage by 10 seconds and gain 15 Armor while regenerating Health from it.
zuljin.7_1: Increase the duration of Grievous Throw's mark by 3 seconds and its damage bonus by 45%.
